name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: Death Threat from Beijing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lily4Congress Committee
body:
| [](http://links.lean-rightpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5d038d7bb28b45a2be61705c2e5e8bcb&_e=8YnlL6aj_mQT8RhsR7jGL2rOoQCg1j2oG7gXE_IFyVCP3pN7qI4ke1X0buQgbVPzwmwzr5tCxiOaPfOG1u8YhEn3Hd54UQZKa8jHwcOD0UAMyEfFFkriFgontluBGzgmvUuBUTPnxfcJkXZvNAxOaRKRFUjQg90Qwp-Zqw4uqCczrdYTJgqt1AndefRk8jphg_DCulAfZKMrgKzfPGJE2-2O_qdjTiVOZ08jJpeTwnRbIubqBhQogCUT475HL-9tI73fblFWPaWIayYQ6O_8hjz9O-nINF1X68xoyOI-MatUVHYBBrWQyE21pkOIbzkWZA2Ba68YTGRFJnr6S56vcPCmRyECD4w0_j1rq6MQdq_hN-cX7HZc50pgkuSpf06OwoikLUS0CMpL6KhoI9a-DC34dJ_9ihI2m50Rf1EMUm4%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Yes. I received a death threat from Beijing because I love Liberty, Freedom, and the United States of America. More on that in a minute.

Right now, I want to introduce myself.

_My name is Lily Tang Williams, and I fled Communist China and escaped the evil Communist indoctrination. I'm running for Congress because I fear the country I love is becoming like the country I left._

You see: I was born to illiterate working-class parents in China's western Sichuan province just before Mao's Cultural Revolution. I grew up in extremely poor living conditions with food rationing, social chaos, and indoctrination into Communism.

At a young age, I learned a hard lesson about surviving in a Communist regime: conform and keep your thoughts private. Do not trust anyone, even your friends.

Everything changed when an American exchange student showed me a pocket-sized version of "The Declaration of Independence." Even with my limited English skills, I could understand most of these words: "We hold these truths to be self-evident...." It's like a lightbulb came on. I had never heard such beautiful words before, and I loved them so much that I spent many hours with my American friend to learn more about these new concepts and America.

_**I had a new dream: I wanted to go to America.**_

In 1988, I made it to America with only $100 in my pocket, which I borrowed, along with a $1,200 loan from my sponsor. I spoke very little English. In the 33 years since I have enjoyed living in this great country. I received a graduate degree, got married, raised three children, started my own business, and was naturalized as a U.S. citizen in 1995.

Fast forward to today: I've spoken out against Communism and Socialism appearing on Fox News, Tucker Carlson Tonight, Fox Business, Newsmax, Timcast, Huckabee TV, John Stossel, Joe Pags Show, Gothix TV, Shawn Ryan Show, Epoch Times TV, and Glenn Beck Radio.

I've authored opinion articles for The Epoch Times, Town Hall, National Review, Union Leader, Concord Monitor, and Granite Grok.

_And here's where the death threats from Beijing started: when I decided to run for Congress._

The Democrats decided they could not let my story reach the ears of Americans because they hope to enact their Socialist Agenda.

But more importantly, you and I cannot afford to let the woke liberal elite plunge the America we know and love any further down the dark path of Communism and trample on our God-given rights.

**[Please, will you stand with me and make a special donation of $25, $50, or $100 to stand with me?](http://links.lean-rightpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5d038d7bb28b45a2be61705c2e5e8bcb&_e=8YnlL6aj_mQT8RhsR7jGL2rOoQCg1j2oG7gXE_IFyVCP3pN7qI4ke1X0buQgbVPzwmwzr5tCxiOaPfOG1u8YhEn3Hd54UQZKa8jHwcOD0UAMyEfFFkriFgontluBGzgmvUuBUTPnxfcJkXZvNAxOaRKRFUjQg90Qwp-Zqw4uqCczrdYTJgqt1AndefRk8jphg_DCulAfZKMrgKzfPGJE2-2O_qdjTiVOZ08jJpeTwnRbIubqBhQogCUT475HL-9tI73fblFWPaWIayYQ6O_8hnajHO8GwfQXlI3CKGlcSE37LRtgegK3SFiWjdL4t8z6-nCFoEk9OHvOKOa5XwUndd47YmVZTGpoGlZh7mwdo67nJ35AQhm9vx_tLRmRK5bS07NH8qbUJVTQBYof5LoDwNsf2U5L4pnimuXXU474BJQ%3D)**

_Believe me. I'm not fear-mongering when I say you cannot imagine the horrors of Socialism and Communism. It is evil._

**[That's why I need you to stand with me and preserve the freedoms and values of our American heritage.](http://links.lean-rightpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5d038d7bb28b45a2be61705c2e5e8bcb&_e=8YnlL6aj_mQT8RhsR7jGL2rOoQCg1j2oG7gXE_IFyVCP3pN7qI4ke1X0buQgbVPzwmwzr5tCxiOaPfOG1u8YhEn3Hd54UQZKa8jHwcOD0UAMyEfFFkriFgontluBGzgmvUuBUTPnxfcJkXZvNAxOaRKRFUjQg90Qwp-Zqw4uqCczrdYTJgqt1AndefRk8jphg_DCulAfZKMrgKzfPGJE2-2O_qdjTiVOZ08jJpeTwnRbIubqBhQogCUT475HL-9tI73fblFWPaWIayYQ6O_8hmDpL40MajlWrwDWIJQ5UaKKhM_mjMJMToLA3gnVIwA3UG6iyCeHgx7I0Z8LfhvoqgiYYhu9ou-jgglPE3xtzA64JUw0rQMArj9v71va3BC84Uyl79t4mz9IsZmv31x3oXy-lB4_h5U9CNkLfrzwlHM%3D)**

For freedom,
Lily Tang Williams

**[P.S. Even if all you can afford is $5-- I will use every penny wisely in my campaign to defeat my liberal opponent who has been a rubber stamp for Biden's America-Last agenda. We can win this together.](http://links.lean-rightpress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5d038d7bb28b45a2be61705c2e5e8bcb&_e=8YnlL6aj_mQT8RhsR7jGL2rOoQCg1j2oG7gXE_IFyVCP3pN7qI4ke1X0buQgbVPzwmwzr5tCxiOaPfOG1u8YhEn3Hd54UQZKa8jHwcOD0UAMyEfFFkriFgontluBGzgmvUuBUTPnxfcJkXZvNAxOaRKRFUjQg90Qwp-Zqw4uqCczrdYTJgqt1AndefRk8jphg_DCulAfZKMrgKzfPGJE2-2O_qdjTiVOZ08jJpeTwnRbIubqBhQogCUT475HL-9tI73fblFWPaWIayYQ6O_8hj9VPrrRMeQHcU9zeWZ16M8yuNbsgEIcDqn4QQFroDkFvTTtMxxMzZwOgcmHBFuHweCB4yeyFwZ6gm6gzi4Pz9_mfk03ZEDX5He3CzRVnL9X3SWJC_2Qyzwx7Uv5GFGHFFWt-CBTCloY4SsKOdFCzMA%3D)**

**_I fear that the country I love is becoming like the country I left. That's why I am running for Congress. It's time for the majority to speak up and defend our country from the radical left and keep the American Dream alive for our children._******

clean_body: | Fellow American, Yes. I received a death threat from Beijing because I love Liberty, Freedom, and the United States of America. More on that in a minute. Right now, I want to introduce myself. My name is Lily Tang Williams, and I fled Communist China and escaped the evil Communist indoctrination. I'm running for Congress because I fear the country I love is becoming like the country I left. You see: I was born to illiterate working-class parents in China's western Sichuan province just before Mao's Cultural Revolution. I grew up in extremely poor living conditions with food rationing, social chaos, and indoctrination into Communism. At a young age, I learned a hard lesson about surviving in a Communist regime: conform and keep your thoughts private. Do not trust anyone, even your friends. Everything changed when an American exchange student showed me a pocket-sized version of "The Declaration of Independence." Even with my limited English skills, I could understand most of these words: "We hold these truths to be self-evident...." It's like a lightbulb came on. I had never heard such beautiful words before, and I loved them so much that I spent many hours with my American friend to learn more about these new concepts and America. I had a new dream: I wanted to go to America. In 1988, I made it to America with only $100 in my pocket, which I borrowed, along with a $1,200 loan from my sponsor. I spoke very little English. In the 33 years since I have enjoyed living in this great country. I received a graduate degree, got married, raised three children, started my own business, and was naturalized as a U.S. citizen in 1995. Fast forward to today: I've spoken out against Communism and Socialism appearing on Fox News, Tucker Carlson Tonight, Fox Business, Newsmax, Timcast, Huckabee TV, John Stossel, Joe Pags Show, Gothix TV, Shawn Ryan Show, Epoch Times TV, and Glenn Beck Radio. I've authored opinion articles for The Epoch Times, Town Hall, National Review, Union Leader, Concord Monitor, and Granite Grok. And here's where the death threats from Beijing started: when I decided to run for Congress. The Democrats decided they could not let my story reach the ears of Americans because they hope to enact their Socialist Agenda. But more importantly, you and I cannot afford to let the woke liberal elite plunge the America we know and love any further down the dark path of Communism and trample on our God-given rights. Believe me. I'm not fear-mongering when I say you cannot imagine the horrors of Socialism and Communism. It is evil. For freedom, Lily Tang Williams I fear that the country I love is becoming like the country I left. That's why I am running for Congress. It's time for the majority to speak up and defend our country from the radical left and keep the American Dream alive for our children.** | Paid for by Lily4Congress Committee Lily4Congress Committee PO Box 406 Weare, NH 03281 Copyright (C) 2024 Lily4Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Trump wins easily unless this happens
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
President Joe Biden cannot secure a victory against Donald Trump in any scenario.

|
---
| | | [President Biden cannot secure a victory against Trump in any scenario.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_4_24_un_fr1&n=1)

---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_4_24_un_fr1&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
A massive new poll of the 2024 election cycle surveyed three head-to-head scenarios. The results are shaking up the political establishment:
1. Biden vs. Trump: Trump wins by a comfortable margin.
2. Trump vs. Kennedy: Kennedy wins in close race.
3. Kennedy vs. Biden: Kennedy wins in a landslide.

This fifty-state poll from Zogby, distinguished by its unprecedented scale and precision, surveyed over 26,000 likely voters nationwide, _achieving a remarkably low margin of error of just 0.6%_.
Unlike typical polls, this survey meticulously calculates the winner in each state to predict the electoral vote outcome—the only measure that truly determines our next president.
The results are unequivocal: [President Joe Biden cannot secure a victory against Donald Trump in any scenario](https://www.kennedy24.com/spoiler?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_4_24_un_fr1&n=3)—be it a direct matchup or a three-way race including Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
The only scenario in which President Trump participates in the election and does not win is a direct head-to-head with Kennedy, in which Kennedy emerges victorious.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_4_24_un_fr1&n=4)
In other words, if anyone is a spoiler in this race, it is President Biden! Why? RFK Jr. explained it in today’s press conference: "To be a spoiler, a candidate must not only lack the ability to win themselves but also obstruct another potentially winning candidate."
Under these criteria, it's evident that President Biden's continued candidacy might _inadvertently deliver the White House to Donald Trump.”_
In response to these findings, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. has proposed a bold initiative called the [No Spoiler Pledge](https://www.kennedy24.com/spoiler?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_4_24_un_fr1&n=5): a pledge for the weakest candidate in a head-to-head match to step aside based on a 50-state poll in mid-October 2024, surveying over 30,000 likely voters.
This proposed poll would assess head-to-head races between Biden and Trump, and Kennedy against Trump. Whichever candidate does worse head to head will step aside.
_We call on the Biden campaign to sign the pledge, so that if Trump wins it won’t be by accident, but only by beating the strongest challenger._
Right now, that challenger is Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. [With this pledge on the table, now is the time to keep him strong.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_4_24_un_fr1&n=6)
[Your support is crucial in this pivotal moment. Every donation helps RFK Jr. close in on his opponents and beat them in a two-way OR a three-way race.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_4_24_un_fr1&n=7)

Joe Biden's campaign co-chair just said on national television that "Joe Biden... stands for American values."

As someone who's actually served and fought for our country, I can tell you that's nothing but LIES.

Joe Biden hasn't spent a day serving anyone but himself, his corrupt family, and the DC insider political regime.

He's completely left America behind, all while using his judicial system to go after his top political rival and anyone who dares to speak out against his agenda.

**The truth is, career politicians like Joe Biden are completely removed from the American people, and they can NEVER truly represent us.**

_I 'm not that kind of politician, Fellow Patriot. _

I spent my life fighting terrorists in the desert as a U.S. Navy Captain, not securing deals with lobbyists like Joe Biden.

I've sacrificed for this country before, and I'll do WHATEVER it takes to keep the freedoms I fought for alive.

**I 'm running for U.S. Senate because we need leaders who will help FIRE Joe Biden and defend our God-given freedoms. **

**[**Will you join my team today to SAVE our country from Joe Biden and the woke, terrorist-loving Left?**](http://links.news4patriots.org/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6ffa2a099cd7483787f09b14a28be7ce&_e=SfL3d7zRjirsVwT1Su4xIePbOZBUaUbskx4qO-8VUWd7KZANOlL0BzatU5TxqdDClSae3OZtPfF7zh5WLseMMM5Maj4bj2COP78toblTKJFeF-lZLcrxknZq5ohimkEDuStXHJ7QYeKl8IzX5Crk3Lu3UfxlI8jbjMaygI40PcPtSlTLPvzaFVqUvsL0hCNnZ6C4LEsBevo6JjoVgqdaxxcMeEVcXT_ljNeyB6JBlJNErNL661B6kKa7Ghx5mNB253NBPD4xi_yjZN8Y1oYdzaeky3NQu09TtEMGP1GaaQQ%3D)**

Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he's lived it. Now, he's running for Senate to defend it from the next generation. Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he's not done fighting for our future. name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: Week 17: Legislative Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=82a09d7606&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

A presidential election is certainly upon us. It seems like every four years we see mayhem breaking out across our country. In 2020, BLM burned down some of our country’s major cities and upended the rule of law. Today, like the 1970s, our nation’s college campuses are being overrun by political activists. The last few weeks we have seen more and more [George Soros’](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=76e0441850&e=a7ab36849c) funded pro-Hamas protesters on many of America’s major public university and Ivy college campuses. Sadly, they will not stop at anything. These anti-Israel agitators erected encampments and took over buildings thinking that the adults had all vacated their posts and would bow down to their demands like sending in food.

Fortunately, several universities president’s shutdown their coordinated efforts, but other weak-kneed presidents allowed the protests to turn hostile and even violent, forcing local law enforcement and even frat boys to the scene. This morning my husband and I spent some time packing up our daughter from her dormitory since she just finished her first year of college. We were thankful President Crow, and his staff did the right thing because the pro-Hamas protesters were gone during our time on campus in Tempe.

This past Wednesday was one of the hardest days of my entire life. As many of you know, over the past few weeks I have received a lot of hate-filled messages from individuals on both sides of the abortion debate. The folks on the Left were quite upset by the recent Arizona Supreme Court’s ruling, and since I am married to one of the court’s justices, they felt the need to let me know how awful he is and the decision they made by _apparently_ following the law.

Let’s also keep in mind a few months ago, two Republican precinct committeemen in my legislative district 2 pleaded with me to encourage the legislature to agree on a competing ballot referral like the [15-week limit bill](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7800a5b807&e=a7ab36849c) from 2022 against Planned Parenthood’s [Arizona Abortion Access Act](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d93089ca32&e=a7ab36849c).

As I have mentioned in previous weeks, I have seen several potential competing ballot referral [ideas](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=abedb0872c&e=a7ab36849c) floating around the Capitol, but there isn’t a consensus between the House and Senate Republican caucuses to send even one of those ideas to the ballot. As a pro-life supporter, I don’t want the [Arizona Abortion Access Act](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3548396b84&e=a7ab36849c) enshrined into our state’s constitution, leaving me with very little choice than to step up and try to save our state knowing we had no real course of action to counter the horrific Planned Parenthood ballot initiative. You can read an [op-ed](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d2fba9c4a3&e=a7ab36849c) recently penned by the Honorable Jill Norgaard, a former state lawmaker on how devastating the Planned Parenthood initiative would be if the voters pass it come November.

Hopefully, we can now work together to defeat Planned Parenthood’s abortion on demand up until the moment of birth initiative, so it’s not enshrined into our state’s constitution. I believe at the end of the day we will save _more_ babies' lives. The Democrats’ initiative goes way too far, and we cannot allow it to ever become part of our state’s constitution. It is worth noting that future legislatures would never be able to change it, either.

Since last year I have been educating voters in my district about this horrific initiative. Now, it is time to step up and do your part, so Arizona does not turn blue. For those of you who have been reading my weekly legislative updates, I have included information on the counter campaign for months. Please go to [It Goes Too Far](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=eb6aba3236&e=a7ab36849c) and donate your time and treasure, and channel your energy to help save more babies lives in our state.

After the vote, someone sent me a message stating, “you are risking your own personal hopes and dreams to do what is right for Arizona. You are a hero. We thank you for seeing the big picture.” A group of ladies sent me flowers with the message “Courage over Comfort.” I am not going to further comment on the pre-Roe law because I spent more than 20 minutes on the Senate floor explaining my vote. You can watch or listen along right [here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=59a7600fcc&e=a7ab36849c). Most of you who know me understand I don’t talk a lot at the Capitol, and I am not very interested in media attention. I typically turn down most media requests. This week I told the media I had nothing further to add to my vote explanation.

After this pivotal vote, [The Patriot Post](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f70f179cdd&e=a7ab36849c) included an excerpt under _Cross-Examination_ titled “Arizona just helped Donald Trump”:
Given that the 2020 election was decided not by seven million votes, as Joe Biden claims it was, but by roughly 43,000 votes across three states — Arizona, Georgia, and Wisconsin — it’s reasonable to assume that those states will help decide the 2024 election. And yesterday, a couple of Arizona State Senate Republicans helped their Democrat counterparts overturn the Grand Canyon State’s near-total ban on abortions, and in doing so, likely helped Donald Trump’s chances of reclaiming the state’s 11 crucial electoral votes.
As [The Wall Street Journal](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=fc37220e43&e=a7ab36849c) reports: “Two Republicans joined with Democrats in the Arizona Senate to roll back the state’s nearly total ban on abortions, as some in the GOP look to reverse a significant political liability for the party ahead of the November elections. The move Wednesday comes a week after the Arizona state House also voted to repeal the ban. Three Republicans joined with all Democrats in that vote.” If political positions, however desirable in certain cases, are considered “extreme,” it tends to galvanize political opposition. And nowhere is this truism in greater evidence right now than on the issue of abortion. The Democrats have increasingly become [single-issue party](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c3ee140eee&e=a7ab36849c), and this moderating move in Arizona effectively blunts the issue. Here, the American people should remember that the difference between the parties on abortion is that the Republicans are willing to find a [middle ground](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1e772b67ce&e=a7ab36849c). The Democrats, on the other hand, have a party platform committed to abortion on demand _no matter what_. Thus, when it comes to abortion, the Democrats are the _real_ extremists.

The Senate also voted out several other bills on Thursday afternoon impacting Arizonans, including a [bill](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=73704cba52&e=a7ab36849c) I sponsored for [ABATE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0c57f27e29&e=a7ab36849c). The bill simply says that you need to cover your load from becoming loose on our roadways or you will face getting a fine. The government does exist for public safety, right? After the vote, the bill was transmitted to the governor for her signature. I don’t know about you but traversing our state’s highways and roadways can be precarious at times because people don’t always cover their loads and you end up trying to avoid ladders, lawn chairs, paint cans, etc. commuting to work or taking your kids to school. If Hobbs signs Senate Bill 1376, I hope it will help reduce accidents on our roadways and keep insurance premiums from further rising. Inflation is already killing our state’s families and livelihoods. Every little bit adds up.

On Thursday, an important election integrity decision came down from the Arizona Supreme Court defending legal inquiries in our state’s election law cases. After the November 2020 election, the AZGOP went to court challenging hand count audit procedures. The Republican Party brought forth an election lawsuit saying the state’s largest county broke Arizona Revised Statutes outlining how post-election hand count audits are conducted. Lower courts ruled the AZGOP’s claims were “barely colorable” and assessed $18,000 in attorney fees. At the appeal’s court level, they added on additional attorney fees for Arizona’s Secretary of State. You can read the court’s opinion [here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=089326167e&e=a7ab36849c) stating they reversed and vacated the attorney fees levied against the party.

Next week, the State Senate might conduct legislative business on two different days. Since Hobbs vetoed our border bill earlier this session, next Wednesday’s Senate Committee on Military Affairs and Public Safety (MAPS) will hold a [hearing](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8cf1a68909&e=a7ab36849c) on the House-sponsored Secure the Border Act [HCR 2060](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2ca391de73&e=a7ab36849c) for the voters to decide in November. Speaker Toma introduced this bill a few months ago. I previously mentioned it in my weekly legislative update because I attended Speaker Toma’s press conference after the bill had been introduced. Be on the lookout for a strike everything amendment in MAPS committee that would also include punishments for border-related crimes to further empower local law enforcement. Stay tuned. The Republicans are committed to stopping Biden’s border invasion.

Take care,
Shawnna

P.S. To those Star Wars fan, may the 4th be with you.

name: Heinrich HQ
subject: The next six months will fly by
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Monthly recurring contributions are so important in powering our work to re-elect Martin. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84338189/471237271/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240504_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjVmZjIzNC04MDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LwsjqoQ6ZsUb8KTO6uWc7SfGFNB-NnDoztLoqyc84Xk=&emci=994a5bc9-7c0a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=db5ff234-800a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=252045)
---
We’re about six months out from Election Day, folks. These six months will fly by, and it’ll make a _huge_ difference to know we can count on your support from month to month. In the next few weeks, we’re connecting with voters as early primary voting starts in New Mexico and ramping up our volunteer program. We will also file how much we’ve raised before our big pre-primary deadline. As we get closer to November 5, we’ll contact more voters, face more deadlines, and scale up our operations even more. **That’s why monthly recurring contributions are so important in powering our work to re-elect Martin.** While Martin’s hedge fund executive opponent avoids talking about many of the issues working families care about most, our campaign is connecting with New Mexicans who share Martin’s people-first values. **[Will you support our efforts to keep New Mexico and the Senate Majority blue by committing to a monthly contribution of any amount?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84338190/471237272/2144451455?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240504_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjVmZjIzNC04MDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LwsjqoQ6ZsUb8KTO6uWc7SfGFNB-NnDoztLoqyc84Xk=)** | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84338191/471237273/2144451455?recurring=true&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240504_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjVmZjIzNC04MDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LwsjqoQ6ZsUb8KTO6uWc7SfGFNB-NnDoztLoqyc84Xk=)
---
Thank you for helping build a brighter future for New Mexico.
— Heinrich HQ
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Dan Cox
subject: BREAKING: ATF LAWFARE CASE THROWN OUT
body:
DAN COX DEFEATS CORRUPT BIDEN ADMIN. IN SECOND AMENDMENT CASE. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/coxforcongress/breaking-atf-lawfare-case-thrown-out?e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| |
---
| |
# BREAKING: ATF CASE THROWN OUT OF COURT.
Dear -

Huge news I wanted to share with you that impacts our fight against BIDEN LAWFARE - waring against conservatives exercising their God-given constitutional rights.

By God's grace, my client and I just fought and defeated the BIDEN ADMIN and corrupt ATF and DOJ in defense of our beloved and magnificent SECOND AMENDMENT to the U.S. Constitution.

**_Yesterday, I was blessed to win a complete dismissal of all charges against my client for violation of his Speedy Trial Rights - a Sixth Amendment protected right detailed by federal law under the Speedy Trial Act of 1974. The case is an attack by the Biden _****_administration against conservatives who have been outspoken against him._**

But here is the catch: unless we have a Congress that will stand up to the rogue law fare and hold the deep state's feet to the fire, ending the persecution of law abiding conservative Americans, we will have an increase of this dark hour. We will lose America forever.

For over 20 years I've been fighting for your Constitutional rights in Court and in government, including six years as an elected official in both local office and state office. Please stand with me to win the open seat in Congress to take our fight and stand for liberty to the Halls of our national government. [Please help me with your generous assistance tonight ](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=51907d8f56&e=5bb5efcda7)so I may go to Congress and fight side by side with President Trump to end the law fare of Deep State and return true equality, calm, and constitutional law and order to government. Thank you.

Freedom and Victory,
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=68bf889095&e=5bb5efcda7)
Dan Cox, U.S. House of Representative (R-MD6)
Candidate
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=7dfcc635fe&e=5bb5efcda7)
\--------------------------
Here is my presser:

4 MAY 2024
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:
Frederick, Maryland. Statement of Dan Cox from the Cox Law Center LLC concerning U.S vs. Krop

ATF CASE THROWN OUT: “Yesterday was a victory for the 2nd Amendment and innocent Americans whose lives have been politically targeted by the Biden Administration for harassment in violation of state, federal and constitutional law,” said Dan Cox of the Cox Law Center, LLC.

“Two years ago, Rob Krop was legally operating his Maryland businesses providing shooting ranges and firearms to law enforcement officials and law-abiding Americans, when officers of the ATF targeted him in a scheme to thwart local law enforcement, undermine legal gun ownership in Maryland, and ruin my client.”

“Yesterday morning,” Cox said, “in a stunning victory for justice, Federal court Judge Stephanie Gallagher agreed to my motion to dismiss all charges against my client."
“After two years of slander, harassment and violations of his constitutional rights and denial of due process by federal agents and prosecutors, Rob and his family can begin to try to rebuild their lives.”

In his published statement after the court’s ruling, Rob Krop explained the personal toll of government abuse: “They stole the last year of my life, losing my freedoms, stripped of travel privileges, unable to work at my place of business, draining me financially as I answer their asinine motions filled with blatant lies, and loss of business due to the horrible false story painted by the government to the media.”

He summarized yesterday’s victory: “Today, May 3rd, justice was served. I want to thank my God who was in control this whole time, giving me and my family clarity.... Today marks another strike against the corrupt ATF and again shows the gross negligence of this organization. They have no concern for the rule of law, and in fact, go so far to create their own. I want to thank my attorney Dan Cox, for had it not been for him and his relentless pursuit of the truth, I would not be standing here in this position today. A real attorney who cared about my outcome and not playing these silly inside, backroom games with the government. “

“Yesterday’s victory should be a wake-up call to the rogue Biden DOJ,” Cox stated, who have become reckless, political and vindictive, that we intend to hold them to account when they redirect their energies from prosecuting real crimes, and waste millions in tax-payer funding on politically motivated vendetta against upstanding citizens.//

clean_body: DAN COX DEFEATS CORRUPT BIDEN ADMIN. IN SECOND AMENDMENT CASE. | | | | | | | BREAKING: ATF CASE THROWN OUT OF COURT. Dear - Huge news I wanted to share with you that impacts our fight against BIDEN LAWFARE - waring against conservatives exercising their God-given constitutional rights. By God's grace, my client and I just fought and defeated the BIDEN ADMIN and corrupt ATF and DOJ in defense of our beloved and magnificent SECOND AMENDMENT to the U.S. Constitution. Yesterday, I was blessed to win a complete dismissal of all charges against my client for violation of his Speedy Trial Rights - a Sixth Amendment protected right detailed by federal law under the Speedy Trial Act of 1974. The case is an attack by the Biden administration against conservatives who have been outspoken against him. But here is the catch: unless we have a Congress that will stand up to the rogue law fare and hold the deep state's feet to the fire, ending the persecution of law abiding conservative Americans, we will have an increase of this dark hour. We will lose America forever. For over 20 years I've been fighting for your Constitutional rights in Court and in government, including six years as an elected official in both local office and state office. Please stand with me to win the open seat in Congress to take our fight and stand for liberty to the Halls of our national government. I may go to Congress and fight side by side with President Trump to end the law fare of Deep State and return true equality, calm, and constitutional law and order to government. Thank you. Freedom and Victory, Dan Cox, U.S. House of Representative (R-MD6) Candidate \-------------------------- Here is my presser: 4 MAY 2024 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Frederick, Maryland. I want to thank my God who was in control this whole time, giving me and my family clarity.... Today marks another strike against the corrupt ATF and again shows the gross negligence of this organization. They have no concern for the rule of law, and in fact, go so far to create their own. I want to thank my attorney Dan Cox, for had it not been for him and his relentless pursuit of the truth, I would not be standing here in this position today. name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Learn about the real American Founding
body:
This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo9d7n9ksjb5vf5ha2ijeds5lvvmvtr7na09h0ao_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg68ob1c9h2bs)
---
| |
Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding.

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl9krl4pe6b19lc4kos9poelk1r45u2ggr7mid1o_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg68ob1c9h2bs)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: easier said than done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here’s my final pitch to you:

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy again.** This could be my single most important update yet. Thanks for taking a moment out of your busy life to read this email.

I'm clocking thousands of miles flying across this country laser-focused on three key goals:
_**[GOAL #1:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zughkf7f62b0kt4g1rcoedohugppud42n23h96h0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66o72c9h2bs "GOAL #1:")**_ Reelect Donald J. Trump as President of the United States.
_**[GOAL #2:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za9k1dqmvasl0iqqo80cuktvsdrkha5h8061v7j0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66o72c9h2bs "GOAL #2:")**_ Save our Conservative Majority in the U.S. House of Representatives.
_**[GOAL #3:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqg1tmqlasfan7iahtars7et3r0vim1itjhas9jo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66o72c9h2bs "GOAL #3:")**_ Win a supermajority in the U.S. Senate.
Obviously, this is easier said than done. Especially when Joe Biden just raked in $25 million in a single fundraiser with Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and half of Hollywood.

The Radical Left Democrats may have enough in their warchest to annihilate our America First candidates up and down the ballot. That means our chances of accomplishing those three goals would be reduced to ZERO.

_**[So here's my final pitch to you. I'm partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we've NEVER SEEN BEFORE.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztjupoajii8puk27qk6o7flvik5643hkv77eq5t0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66o72c9h2bs "So here’s my final pitch to you. I’m partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we’ve NEVER SEEN BEFORE. ")**_

The Radical Left Democrats have an army of Liberal megadonors on their side... But if EVERY America First Conservative pitches in JUST a few bucks - we'll surge ahead and shock the world.

PLEASE:

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjdm3bvik1mnf9bj2or6bps3dg2ku2lc7o53b990_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66o72c9h2bs "Vivek Ramaswamy")
---

**Even a small amount can help build our movement!**
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1p7v9oj89bc0dcpvh2srj0poil0ud44n90rag30_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66o72c9h2bs "DONATE NOW")
---
Time is of the essence so I'll wrap this up, but we really need your help.

If the Radical Left Democrats keep outraising us and manage to win this election, we could face the very real possibility of a complete Liberal takeover of our country.

_**[I hope you'd agree America - as we know it - wouldn't survive something like that. Please join me now while there's still time to prevent that dark reality.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5nu7nadhpcf8k3qcl4odreq1tcdsj1l4pk93m6o_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66o72c9h2bs "I hope you’d agree America – as we know it – wouldn’t survive something like that. Please join me now while there’s still time to prevent that dark reality.")**_

No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you.

Thanks for all you do,
Vivek Ramaswamy
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z15lq6vg6p3phfq9u2i0qosra068o3ea95ghlplo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66o72c9h2bs "DONATE NOW")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvfdvg8uen4ahhui6n4kbf93lvdnst8tfldil1l0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66o72c9h2bs "Please take my Election Year Check-In!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zubh5dd8jrsa2aglutispeoehsbaihbcbkrfqrpg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66o72c9h2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrdvv0pg14anrrblh8galfgibpq8hhbo7oiimjn8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66o72c9h2bs "START MY ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Learn about the real American Founding
body:
This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze2glap5v8gedes2d0618af0pre0ok8cl56fs0s8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66p70s1h2bs)
---
| |
Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding.

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z70pksv2uirv0gir7n7f4gjpeu31f1ulddsju7so_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg66p70s1h2bs)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
Are you sitting down?

Friend,

I don't mean to alarm you, but I recently read this very troubling headline:
**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS "REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zetqhoq4cha4mtk01kcpufk45mmr5tifhqs3l7lg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjg69pb2cph2bs)**

subject: The people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left
body:
In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.
%recipient.md5_hash%

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zciua5cif0i6opr7767k7gu0tgifhsjomn1cgbn8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob5clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online course, ["The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism,"](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znp3hkb36ca67gmoc9h51cpt751bo9ghmdm9f1vo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob5clh2bs) is now available to own on DVD.

In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

He explains the origins of 1960s radicalism and its rejection of midcentury liberalism; he reveals how these radicals came to dominate government and the universities beginning in the late 1970s; and he explores the rise of a neoliberal oligarchy in America and that oligarchy's alliance with the cultural Left in President Obama's second term.

This course seeks to understand the key people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left and to provide solutions for defending the American way of life today.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online course and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you the DVD Box Set of the course for a gift of $100 or more.

**Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism" on DVD.**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/american-left-support-dvd](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq5rcgmgi06ne3uvn542ho527ektsrd6t560grs8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob5clh2bs)

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: [2] Vivek Ramaswamy, Steve Scalise
subject: RE: Abandoned. Desecrated. Spied on.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey, it’s Vivek – never before in the history of the world has a truly great country fallen so far from grace in such a short time.

| |

---
| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znpm9bg8crm3qj0sn1ga7ub039o03sjmfhd5sq80_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob6cph2bs "Vivek Ramaswamy")
---

My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy.** I hoped to email you on a lighter note but I didn't have another choice with everything happening right now.

The unholy alliance between Joe Biden, the corrupt Deep State, the DC Swamp, the Liberal Media, and the Radical Left Democrats is a national disgrace.

_**[We, the American People, will never forget what they've done to us. Luckily, we have a plan to stop these radicals who:](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zorc13b8nc3p4f3t4g4h8c8dtnqg9e99oq4nc9ng_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob6cph2bs "We, the American People, will never forget what they’ve done to us. Luckily, we have a plan to stop these radicals who: ")**_

**- Desecrated** Easter Sunday with wokeism
**- Arrested** the leader of the Republican Party
**- Removed** Trump from the ballot in key states
**- Raided** Mar-a-Lago with armed agents
**- Censored** Conservative voices
**- Spied** on Catholic worshippers
**- Gutted** election integrity measures
**- Peddled** the Russia Hoax for years
**- Threw** open our border to illegals
**- Abandoned** Americans in Afghanistan
**- Caved** to the Chinese Communist Party
**- Moved** to pack the Supreme Court
**- Forced** propaganda into classrooms

And the list goes on and on and on! Never before in the history of the world has a truly great country fallen so far from grace in such a short time. If the Radical Left Democrats somehow win control of the White House, the Senate, and the House... America will be lost forever.

_I know this to be true. You know it too._ But when everything is on the line, moments like this separate the strong from the weak. And make no mistake - the future of our country hangs in the balance.

_**[That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME. Together, we're rallying the STRONGEST American Patriots from across the country and building the biggest surge of grassroots support this country has ever seen.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn01ketal578a2nui25nnr96m34f5t93ivfb5gco_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob6cph2bs "That’s why I’m partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME. Together, we’re rallying the STRONGEST American Patriots from across the country and building the biggest surge of grassroots support this country has ever seen. ")**_

If you consider yourself a strong American Patriot - like the two of us do - I'm personally asking for your full commitment right here and right now.

The resources we collect today will help build the largest GOP voter turnout operation in history, deploy an army of volunteers in swing districts, run hard-hitting ads in battleground states, harvest ballots where it's legal, and help make this the most secure election EVER.

**THAT** is how Conservatives will win in a landslide...

**THAT** is how we take control of the White House, Senate, AND House...

**THAT** is how we stop the Radical Left Democrats from destroying America...

**THAT** is how we save our country as we know it...

**AND THAT** is how we send shockwaves through the heart of the Deep State, DC Swamp, and Liberal Media...

_**[I'm asking for 100% participation from every strong American Patriot reading this. If that's you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It's the only way we win. So what do you say? Can we count on you?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze2k128rjqmatjl0hf625puakp6gg6bdk0dc8k5g_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob6cph2bs "I’m asking for 100% participation from every strong American Patriot reading this. If that’s you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It’s the only way we win. So what do you say? Can we count on you? ")**_

If you can't afford to pitch in $100 or $50 right now, I understand completely. If you can spare JUST $5 or $10, it will still go a long way in the fight for what we believe in. I only ask that everyone contributes SOMETHING.

No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you.

Thanks for all you do,
Vivek Ramaswamy

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z25981omthspbjclmvrnssc3t05qt2cv4m8mu6g0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob6cph2bs "Please take my Election Year Check-In!")
---

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8c5fsj4gh43jv2kk0eusrtdusdsbslpnafe7v5o_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob6cph2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

_What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats?_

| | | [START HERE >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zofkp9vuvu465kkn9ae9qeu530jp7bs9k1gad2p8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob6cph2bs "START HERE")

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I don’t mean to alarm you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Are you sitting down?

Friend,

I don't mean to alarm you, but I recently read this very troubling headline:
**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS "REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoiaiug4f4beblf43qd58dn89h5p691mqcdu4vgg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob3c3h2bs)**
To put it simply, Friend, _**if the Democrats register more voters than us between now and November, we can kiss our chances of taking back the Senate goodbye.[Point blank.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0vsl5l5ufa6krl95n27t0nbacl601s6ur7q96og_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob3c3h2bs)**_

In order to FIGHT BACK against the far-Left, we rely on the most up-to-date voter data possible...

_... but as of this morning, your 2024 Voter Verification Questionnaire was still INCOMPLETE._
**[Please don't delay. The NRSC needs to hear from you ASAP.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1jk3a4unvfq2jm9rubdeg6l500bbnt03701pl8o_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cji60ob3c3h2bs)**

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDkxMjQifQ/h41YD-uWdnbW5R0by_ISng)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here.

You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY— but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

**This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.**

The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion, the American Veterans Center is bringing the Parade BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as a T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country.

**[Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDkxMjQifQ/A9tFP5qVdT4D4sKCp9ZPyA)**
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDkxMjQifQ/ApU_FP_cOBlG8JwSbWx6oA)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDkxMjQifQ/T9p_UkLUTzcKXrMr6tfavQ)
---

---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDkxMjQifQ/TW7U2l4HZcDfc5nbh2OQMw)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.
* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDkxMjQifQ/wZi-8npcvPWwZwgsWxIyaA) If you’ve been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best ways you could possibly do it.

**And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get.**

You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C. for the parade is difficult.

I am honored to say that we will have several World War II veterans with us for this year’s parade... but I don’t know how many more years we’ll have that precious opportunity.

So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion and what might be the last chance these great men have to gather together, **I encourage you to help us honor them while we still have them with us.**

And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms.

Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.
Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.

_I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._

**Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please —[if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDkxMjQifQ/GxA-8ykcyg2gXcmm1ZIFnw)**
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDkxMjQifQ/gZ8dT5xPZSfoELWBKcrLVQ)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDkxMjQifQ/eeDIZTfH70VbY2JTSEH1GQ)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTI2LTA4MGNmN2M2MzFmNjRlNGE5YTMyOTQyNjBmMzY2YTEyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/Q9re9QW1PRc4SEg4rWeLvw) to unsubscribe.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: We need to fix our broken education system
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs4cVuRiNk
State of education

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os4cVuRiNk

From the
Desk of Dr. Ben Carson:
Hello,
I don't
believe the majority of the public really knows what is being
taught to our children and grandchildren.
They
assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing
up-that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone
has a chance at success.
From what
I've seen, this isn't always the case. However, I want to know
what you've seen.

Dr. Ben
Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute
I believe
that children as young as elementary age are being taught to
reject our American values.
They are
told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it
overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our
Constitution is "out of date" and needs to be "modernized."

Progressives are rewriting our nation's history and they are
doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let
this happen!
This year
I'm going to be meeting with political leaders and educational
"experts" across the country. I'm going to make sure people know
what is really happening in our schools.
I want to
be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest
to the issue. Specifically, I would like to include your
thoughts.
The
American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded,
has created a unique survey. We're trying to gauge the state of
America's Educational System by surveying people like you.
I'd like
to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better
understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You
can access the survey here...
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63134426:s4cVuRiNk:m:3:2627245898:E32F049156C1FBDA7E94DAB3054C82A1:r
Thank you
for your consideration.
Regards,
Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

You were added to the system April 25, 2023.

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Our course on the American Founding—Now on DVD
body:
This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders
%recipient.md5_hash%

| | | This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9NgG6l5SleNnyjQK2vQnOA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoGeFCP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3JlYWwtYW1lcmljYW4tZm91bmRpbmctZHZkP3NjPTAwMzAwTjAyNDJMMTVET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yZWFsX2FtZXJpY2FuX2ZvdW5kaW5nX2R2ZCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDUwNVcDc3BjQgpmM7lHN2ba_FJdUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| |
Hello Friend,

Thomas G. West, professor of politics at Hillsdale College, is one of the great scholars and teachers of the American Founding.

That's why we're so excited to offer a course that explains his core teachings about the American Founding, **which is now available on DVD.**

In this course, Dr. West sits down with David Azerrad, his former student and current professor at Hillsdale's Graduate School of Government, to reveal the truth about the American Founding.

As Dr. West explains, the Founders' political theory is so foreign to Americans today--even to scholars and teachers of American history and politics--that the task of uncovering the truth about the Founding is like unearthing something from a "deep and long-forgotten pit."

This course goes about this task by examining the actual words and actions of the Founders, and it brings their theory to life by comparing it to the dominant views of contemporary America.

The result is an exciting and often surprising account of how the Founders established a free government in America and what they thought was necessary to sustain it.

As you know, our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

And now, for any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for **" The Real American Founding: A Conversation,"** by clicking the link below.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/real-american-founding-dvd](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9NgG6l5SleNnyjQK2vQnOA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoGeFCP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3JlYWwtYW1lcmljYW4tZm91bmRpbmctZHZkP3NjPTAwMzAwTjAyNDJMMTVET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yZWFsX2FtZXJpY2FuX2ZvdW5kaW5nX2R2ZCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDUwNVcDc3BjQgpmM7lHN2ba_FJdUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

I hope you'll join us in this fun and important work of sharing the truth about the American Founding with your fellow Americans.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---
---
| |
---

We’ve accomplished some incredible things together over the years.
**#1** We built the greatest economy in **HISTORY.**
**#2** We took on the **DEEP STATE.**
**#3** We made America the most **FEARED AND RESPECTED** country on Earth.
But I would LOVE to hear which of our great accomplishments YOU are most proud of! [**Before I go to bed tonight, can you leave me a quick personal note? body:
Here’s my final pitch to you:

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy again.** This could be my single most important update yet. Thanks for taking a moment out of your busy life to read this email.

I'm clocking thousands of miles flying across this country laser-focused on three key goals:
_**[GOAL #1:](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fB1PcnyGzccRyGCbBXBj7g~~/AARclAA~-UHGUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "GOAL #1:")**_ Reelect Donald J. Trump as President of the United States.

_**[GOAL #3:](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fB1PcnyGzccRyGCbBXBj7g~~/AARclAA~-UHGUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "GOAL #3:")**_ Win a supermajority in the U.S. Senate.
Obviously, this is easier said than done. Especially when Joe Biden just raked in $25 million in a single fundraiser with Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and half of Hollywood.

The Radical Left Democrats may have enough in their warchest to annihilate our America First candidates up and down the ballot. That means our chances of accomplishing those three goals would be reduced to ZERO.

_**[So here's my final pitch to you. I'm partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we've NEVER SEEN BEFORE.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fB1PcnyGzccRyGCbBXBj7g~~/AARclAA~-UHGUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "So here’s my final pitch to you. Time is of the essence so I'll wrap this up, but we really need your help.

If the Radical Left Democrats keep outraising us and manage to win this election, we could face the very real possibility of a complete Liberal takeover of our country.

Vivek Ramaswamy

| | Dear Friend,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online course, ["The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism,"](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fbabdc57f9994314bd3df0f0be0bab83&_e=Qdh-1fqz6mLyPfkOWxv7AxDMKWjUczvYb1dx-FERDB4fg7ppfaqf-rI2-taOQ98HtfKL0yVAE5j5vSbotv13noU1FnzpUB0Hk6QjNmeV9UHQv3Wf5Yo3lj8Puvdk7bm4xNB_LzXmrvUvWI_EzAkEq-1CIylSXJ-18MqzDlsWGBBZ3Ik3YT05uj94Ke0naRsVLdGNr5jWMVIFWVnESxbDTsQdtkFqg5TtSaTgjQWGH432CqfnQSVdmZcOgNZJwW8CJV7SdL7BXBryeX-8oYCSyBOAOWtkR50zPs8uc29glyvwmUPoyWALKAVlqDyITDdSgOHl-Xwh_mPkAUO64ecVq8x4LXLDYI-kijBvkrVB59cs7efQu8qFRaniV6dex7y6iop8TPJ6_l_Iao01jsvKOYSe978zvCg3X_2AYHFg-1Y%3D) is now available to own on DVD.

In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

He explains the origins of 1960s radicalism and its rejection of midcentury liberalism; he reveals how these radicals came to dominate government and the universities beginning in the late 1970s; and he explores the rise of a neoliberal oligarchy in America and that oligarchy's alliance with the cultural Left in President Obama's second term.

This course seeks to understand the key people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left and to provide solutions for defending the American way of life today.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online course and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you the DVD Box Set of the course for a gift of $100 or more.

**Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism" on DVD.**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/american-left-support-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fbabdc57f9994314bd3df0f0be0bab83&_e=Qdh-1fqz6mLyPfkOWxv7AxDMKWjUczvYb1dx-FERDB4fg7ppfaqf-rI2-taOQ98HtfKL0yVAE5j5vSbotv13noU1FnzpUB0Hk6QjNmeV9UHQv3Wf5Yo3lj8Puvdk7bm4xNB_LzXmrvUvWI_EzAkEq-1CIylSXJ-18MqzDlsWGBBZ3Ik3YT05uj94Ke0naRsVLdGNr5jWMVIFWVnESxbDTsQdtkFqg5TtSaTgjQWGH432CqfnQSVdmZcOgNZJwW8CJV7SdL7BXBryeX-8oYCSyI8Ypnu3w5ysq-EhkOjHhvSX6DJHvlDuBLARtLpxtPFxkpviOkZc_SOGDuFHpDhl3OK03rHpYyE4cqikUwhvTjCOLZo3T_gJjnDO2smwlkjHHJ54fV8pzRKFrTcM2eAXrIYR_ecZRzIFtx0jZEuSVP0%3D)

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09

| | Dear Friend,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online course, ["The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism,"](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=049a605bf86b4e509507f9bc29baa8c6&_e=fmm70hlyqRVEXz5w00l3Yk2evvCCphGX2HqHNTomP1Bgq88f502tH8x3EtP-ZZurtSvT2H8PfBFoSyWr1N6sui_XkQxgZsrnYtR0mxGAFBHst5wBZJwCKHvSVStmiBJ_5zORtSoVkKnzCqCqpsQZgWDJyRch2ZpO2wws9jD45RhPwR6JPvTFQ06KDz7AxaRVSRGJg3mI4h6-YaevUqhfW7hDylDVk9txy4-BYOTRL-lJ-645AQBtBs8FKYvd-sVjDWx7ty8-0hK63GjK5so-SdI8Ob0hp_mgf9Imcl5V-02zav4Z5qdJZiM1yC3togTv89NYCutpWjjwIjtR-sKwJ6wrsXIBbtDU-BZFrm-D47vx_IrV7noI_5bjXS471ITf8mVsDioZ6LnuNxEvK6t7vjsmT78VhRLTk0IMVe94QSU%3D) is now available to own on DVD.

In this eleven-lecture course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, examines the transformation in American politics since World War II.

He explains the origins of 1960s radicalism and its rejection of midcentury liberalism; he reveals how these radicals came to dominate government and the universities beginning in the late 1970s; and he explores the rise of a neoliberal oligarchy in America and that oligarchy's alliance with the cultural Left in President Obama's second term.

This course seeks to understand the key people, ideas, and aims of the modern Left and to provide solutions for defending the American way of life today.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online course and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you the DVD Box Set of the course for a gift of $100 or more.

**Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism" on DVD.**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/american-left-support-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=049a605bf86b4e509507f9bc29baa8c6&_e=fmm70hlyqRVEXz5w00l3Yk2evvCCphGX2HqHNTomP1Bgq88f502tH8x3EtP-ZZurtSvT2H8PfBFoSyWr1N6sui_XkQxgZsrnYtR0mxGAFBHst5wBZJwCKHvSVStmiBJ_5zORtSoVkKnzCqCqpsQZgWDJyRch2ZpO2wws9jD45RhPwR6JPvTFQ06KDz7AxaRVSRGJg3mI4h6-YaevUqhfW7hDylDVk9txy4-BYOTRL-lJ-645AQBtBs8FKYvd-sVjDWx7ty8-0hK63GjK5so-SVj9uKQ6nEjwlCj0UBENeZxq7fFXeIuxJXLfu26GxDrLyGn52dcfdjk4KbLhUELFiYKQ7lhzvzEjzOwaN1YpLc7qGUCRm41euKNyTrZ_Vcg_eH-dpSGT8R9Gys7jdB_Me4xFbAgnuXiWDhOopgE4YBM%3D)

name: Wisconsin Victory Team
subject: 📣WisGOP Day of Action!📣
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Our action-packed Saturday was a force to be reckoned with⭐
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-mltkyit-didthutlhu-p/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mltkyit-didthutlhu-r/) Friend I hope you're doing well! I'm thrilled to share some fantastic news with you all. Today's statewide Day of Action was a resounding success, all thanks to our incredible organizers and volunteers!Our teams mobilized across the state from dawn till dusk, spreading our message and igniting enthusiasm everywhere we went.Here are the highlights:
* **Engagement** : From door-to-door canvassing to phone banking and community events, our outreach efforts were met with enthusiasm and receptiveness. The conversations we had and the connections we made will resonate for weeks to come.
* **Results** : Our hard work paid off. We connected with thousands, secured early-vote commitments and absentee ballot requests from hundreds of low-propensity voters, assisted legislative candidates with collecting nomination signatures and engaged with many at local events across Wisconsin.

None of this would have been possible without the dedication and commitment of our organizers and volunteers.As we celebrate, let's remember our work isn't done. The momentum we've built must continue. Together, we can bring about the change we so desperately need.Did you miss our Day of Action? Join us next week as we continue our grassroots efforts! Looking forward to seeing you there!Leslie Hubert | Wisconsin Victory State Director **Want to help us reach more voters and ensure victory in November? **_**Make 2024 the greatest comeback in the history of comebacks by sending us**_ _**$20.24**_ _**today! Your**_ _**$20.24**_ _**will help us reach at least**_ _**12 new voters!**__**We have no time to waste! The Democrats will do anything to stop President Trump, take control of the House and Senate, and take away our legislative majority. Please don't let that happen. Our team will continue to work hard to turn out the vote, but we cannot do it without your support.**_ [DONATE $5 NOW](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mltkyit-didthutlhu-y/) [DONATE $15 NOW](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mltkyit-didthutlhu-j/) [DONATE $20.24 NOW](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mltkyit-didthutlhu-t/) [DONATE $25 NOW](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mltkyit-didthutlhu-i/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mltkyit-didthutlhu-d/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mltkyit-didthutlhu-h/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mltkyit-didthutlhu-k/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mltkyit-didthutlhu-u/) PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. WWW.WISGOP.ORG | Republican Party of Wisconsin148 E. Johnson StreetMadison, WI 53703 [Preferences](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.updatemyprofile.com/y-mltkyit-931243C5-didthutlhu-x) | [Unsubscribe](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-u-mltkyit-didthutlhu-m/)

body:

My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy.** I hoped to email you on a lighter note but I didn't have another choice with everything happening right now.

Never before in the history of the world has a truly great country fallen so far from grace in such a short time. If the Radical Left Democrats somehow win control of the White House, the Senate, and the House... America will be lost forever. I know this to be true. You know it too. The resources we collect today will help build the largest GOP voter turnout operation in history, deploy an army of volunteers in swing districts, run hard-hitting ads in battleground states, harvest ballots where it's legal, and help make this the most secure election EVER. Can we count on you? " If you can't afford to pitch in $100 or $50 right now, I understand completely. If you can spare JUST $5 or $10, it will still go a long way in the fight for what we believe in. I only ask that everyone contributes SOMETHING. No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I don’t mean to alarm you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Are you sitting down?

Friend,

I don't mean to alarm you, but I recently read this very troubling headline:

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election. "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:" If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents. There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts. "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?" I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have 1) a Conservative House Majority, 2) a Conservative Senate, and 3) a Conservative in the White House. If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. Folks,

I'm a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2023 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left 's agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn't do it without you. That's why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2023, but there's just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my April fundraising goal, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They've not only taken notice, but they're taking action. They've called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat Republicans in 2024 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can't happen.
**I NEED YOUR HELP. I 'M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we're going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left's Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We've got to start May off right, and I'm hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

subject: Let's win the White House and Heal America!

body:
Team Kennedy is gaining traction among those disillusioned with the corrupt two-party system.

|
---
| | | | [Let's win the White House and Heal America!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=true_contender_5_4_24_r_nd1&n=1)
