|
---
Dear Peter,
As we edge closer to the 2024 Presidential election, a narrative has been crafted by some media outlets and political pundits attempting to label Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as a "spoiler" in this critical race.
However, recent analyses and polling tell a different story—one where RFK Jr. emerges not just as a legitimate contender, _but as the ONLY candidate who can reshape the American political landscape for the better_!
As Teddy Macker in _Tablet_ discovered by attending a recent Team Kennedy rally, our supporters know exactly why RFK Jr. is best suited to lead America.
**_His eyes were opened_ to the well-funded efforts by the corporate media and party bosses to silence Team Kennedy, as RFK Jr. continues to campaign on a hopeful message.**
As Macker notes, the political establishment, which has been caught hiring homeless people to disrupt Team Kennedy rallies, isn't able to stop our incredible polling momentum!
| "The extreme resistance Kennedy elicits within the DNC—and by extension much of the mainstream media— _arguably reveals something large moving beneath the surface of our politics_.”
---
RFK Jr. represents more than an alternative; he embodies the leadership necessary to address the pressing challenges of our times.
With a focus on skyrocketing inflation, ending corporate monopolies, protecting our environment, and stopping endless foreign wars, RFK Jr. is committed to policies prioritizing every American and growing the middle class.
Team Kennedy is gaining traction among those disillusioned with the corrupt two-party system. A majority of independent voters, who now represent 52% of all registered voters, see RFK Jr. as a beacon of hope and a viable option outside of the political establishment.
More from Macker,
| “The DNC and mainstream media (and to a lesser extent, for now at least, the RNC) make Kennedy out to be an untethered fringe figure few take seriously. _Polling does not support this contention_."
---
With six months remaining, we continue to need your support to amplify our message and build on this momentum. [With your help, we can reclaim America!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=true_contender_5_4_24_r_nd1&n=3)

clean_body: Team Kennedy is gaining traction among those disillusioned with the corrupt two-party system. | | | | | | Dear Peter, As we edge closer to the 2024 Presidential election, a narrative has been crafted by some media outlets and political pundits attempting to label Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as a "spoiler" in this critical race. However, recent analyses and polling tell a different story—one where RFK Jr. emerges not just as a legitimate contender, but as the ONLY candidate who can reshape the American political landscape for the better! As Teddy Macker in Tablet discovered by attending a recent Team Kennedy rally, our supporters know exactly why RFK Jr. is best suited to lead America. His eyes were opened to the well-funded efforts by the corporate media and party bosses to silence Team Kennedy, as RFK Jr. continues to campaign on a hopeful message. As Macker notes, the political establishment, which has been caught hiring homeless people to disrupt Team Kennedy rallies, isn't able to stop our incredible polling momentum! | "The extreme resistance Kennedy elicits within the DNC—and by extension much of the mainstream media— arguably reveals something large moving beneath the surface of our politics.” RFK Jr. represents more than an alternative; he embodies the leadership necessary to address the pressing challenges of our times. With a focus on skyrocketing inflation, ending corporate monopolies, protecting our environment, and stopping endless foreign wars, RFK Jr. is committed to policies prioritizing every American and growing the middle class. Team Kennedy is gaining traction among those disillusioned with the corrupt two-party system. A majority of independent voters, who now represent 52% of all registered voters, see RFK Jr. as a beacon of hope and a viable option outside of the political establishment. More from Macker, | “The DNC and mainstream media (and to a lesser extent, for now at least, the RNC) make Kennedy out to be an untethered fringe figure few take seriously. Polling does not support this contention." With six months remaining, we continue to need your support to amplify our message and build on this momentum. | The two-party political machine is pulling out every dirty trick and shady tactic because they know Robert F. body:
The dangers of a Trump presidency
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5000adeb-606e-40da-bdec-ad351a6445de/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, Often, in our discourse about the insanity of the MAGA-controlled GOP, we forget about specifics--_**the horrific things Donald Trump will do if elected.**_ Below is an excerpt from Trump's most recent Time Magazine interview. It will send a chill down your spine. _**Trump's telling us RIGHT NOW that given the chance, he'll enact policies reminiscent of the worst dictators in world history.**_ Read it for yourself: **A summary of what Trump promises to do if elected:** _* **Deport 11 million people,** destroying their lives, inciting violence in our streets, separating families and the rest of the misery this entails_ _* **Send in the military to do it,** directly violating our Constitution, and creating the kind of chaos that leads to mass violence and the destruction of civil rights. _ _* **Monitor your menstrual cycle.**_ A government entity that could be run by Steve Bannon or Ted Cruz will keep tabs on menstruation, _arresting you and "collaborators" for exercising reproductive rights, miscarriages, use of birth control and more._ [**We're asking that you re-read the above, then reach deep and make a $5, $10, $20 or other split contribution between President Joe Biden's reelection campaign and Blue Amp Action. Or we may wake up in an America in November that doesn't resemble America.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e427550-aa7c-4922-af8f-3025b1271e7f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, as always, for having the courage to take on this existential fight for our country and our democracy. Cliff
---

---

---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Soros-Funded Protests Colluding with Progressive DAs? | New Podcast Episode + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f8c3bbbb96&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Are Soros-funded campus protest groups colluding with progressive prosecutors?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9c1dab2156&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Ben Mannes_
Many locations where organizations linked to George Soros have funded a national wave of anti-Israel protests on college campuses which directly correlate to prosecutors whose elections were also funded by Soros. This week, Philadelphia joined this unfortunate group with encampments appearing at the University of Pennsylvania. Soros-funded prosecutors have dropped or refused charges against protesters who have been arrested for a myriad of offenses related to the antisemitic occupations on American college campuses. The correlation in funding between groups committing intimidation, harassment, and assaults toward Jews and the elected law enforcement officials refusing to prosecute them raises uncomfortable questions of conflict and corruption.
**Why It Matters.** As noted in a new report from New York Post, the National Students for Justice for Palestine organization is funded by a number of nonprofits that themselves are funded by Soros and others. At three colleges, US Campaign for Palestinian Rights (USCPR), a Soros-funded group, pays “fellows” who start protests on campus. The Post reports that the USCPR pays up to $7,800 to community-based fellows and between $2,880 and $3,660 for campus-based “fellows” who are expected to spend eight hours per week organizing “campaigns led by Palestinian organizations,” and are trained to “rise up, to revolution.” Since 2017, the USCPR has received at least $300,000 from Soros’ Open Society Foundations. The group has also received $355,000 in funds from the Rockefeller Brothers Fund since 2019.

**Quotable.** “The conflict issue requires an analysis of the closeness of the relationship,” said former federal prosecutor and Chester County DA Thomas Hogan. “I never recused myself from prosecuting an official from my own political party, having prosecuted the close friend of my own campaign finance director. Of course, since I was prosecuting, not declining to prosecute, the dynamics were different.” **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cc13f7f96b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[From The Editors: The $67 court fee we refuse to pay](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=81c2a63b8f&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_From the Editors_
Pennsylvania is better than most states when it comes to open records requests. When a citizen is denied a request, he or she may appeal to the Pennsylvania Office of Open Records. The OOR is a quasi-judicial agency that reviews the request, reviews the government’s response, and issues a legal judgment on the merits. If, after this ruling, the citizen is disappointed, they may still elevate the matter to court on their own behalf, but at least they’ve had the chance for an outside body to review. The OOR is incredibly successful in carrying out its mission, and we believe it does an extraordinary job of weighing the legal issues of each appeal.
**Why It Matters.** But once the appeals start, court fees make the process more onerous, and let the government push individuals around in a way the law doesn’t intend. "_Broad + Liberty_ ’s reporter, Todd Shepherd, filed an RTK with the Philadelphia District Attorney’s Office back in 2021. The appeal at the OOR was in his favor. The city decided to take the matter to court. The case has been stalled for a variety of reasons, but recently Shepherd intended to file a Motion of Nonparticipation. This motion would keep the court case going, but would signal to the court that Shepherd did not intend to appear at any hearings related to the case. In other words, Shepherd was going to let the OOR’s final determination be his legal argument, and there was nothing left for him to do but let a judge decide if the OOR was correct. The only way Shepherd could file this motion in Philadelphia court is to pay a $67 filing fee.”
**Quotable.** “If a government can herd or guide a citizen into a situation in which they will face death by a thousand cuts — or perhaps better to say death by a thousand fees — then the government will start to take that choice more and more over time. The answer here is for fees to be waived in RTK matters in which the requester was not the appellant. Or, at the very least, a citizen should be able to file a motion for nonparticipation free of charge in matters they did not instigate.” **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=442d46b982&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Podcast**
---
| **We Need to Fix Trust in Elections – Here's How**
* * *
** _Voices of Reason_ | Ep. 4**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=326a880e07&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Join us for this installment of _Voices of Reason_ , hosted by _PoliticsPA_ and presented by L2 Data Inc. in partnership with _Broad + Liberty_.
|
---
|
# **4\. Lightning Round**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Rest in peace, Earl M. Baker](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3f91c076c2&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: God made dogs to keep us humble](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=21e6089d3d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Pennsylvania Prison Society visit to Delco prison presents mixed bag of findings](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ad7af22b4b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Health and wellness in the Holy Land](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d871989bea&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Should taxpayer-funded organizations be subject to the state Right to Know Law?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=27bff190ba&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Gregory Wrightstone: Gov. Shapiro’s misguided attempt to cure a very healthy climate](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=190943df5a&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
It’s always hilarious to hear Democratic politicians complain that the mainstream press isn’t treating them fairly. Their Republican opponents would have a lot to say about that, we’re sure. This week at _POLITICO_ , [Jack Shafer pushes back on President Biden’s whining about the press](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=02f51f8a99&e=b7b3eddce2), noting that the commander-in-chief “is so press averse that members of his own party have begged him to spend more time with reporters.” Meanwhile, former President Trump is happy to sit a long, fairly contentious [interview with TIME magazine](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2a7391782e&e=b7b3eddce2), despite their long-standing animosity to him. You can’t complain about the press if you’re afraid to talk to them!
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded exclusively by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

Right now, polls show me locked _neck and neck_ with Mitch McConnell's handpicked GOP challenger. And with dark money groups like the Koch network and shady MAGA billionaires already spending big in Nevada to flip this seat, I just can't afford to miss important goals like this.

Folks,

I’ve reached out to you a couple of times about hitting my April fundraising goal.

Y’all know me and that I never stop working for you and this country. But I have to admit that despite my best efforts... we missed it.

I have one more chance to hit my target by midnight, and I’m counting on you to step up and chip in—[**even if it’s just $1.**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=62cf43b8f8674c65a54310dae9458747&_e=1S85AOzmWFmbSE4w4V27026znN7iWwb6Hg8hrb7wlkhVs2z_9VHi3vvrfLukJ3vtsAs2VB_4K4oWzi9vxkbVBCTc0LeNJ6m3u6eC0zKlEbPiPMN-irEMSrM43B1ZvoEdtkckmMqFK-mkavexGodGBLYy2sXZMiKSfPM_9Uq2ByRGM0wXpNzpKNrE48pObEGg5jRtkrAdTvpXGeWcCT7tEVGld2kDN3c4GwmSfOzfcuYr68gp7oplT8HuFEwWHH958HmKzkcUzQM2WVq6qvVifkL8JSvIFdSQ8R8Q9R_ljatLUng8ZGvcoI_G35m0N4SiYjw6VMv6Y1AmSqYp1nYo5knumZW2S0g2UpRob3V_cuE66BskVCKenkf-Lpnkgwxqw_z5Yyvs05K-XNfoq5wmqw%3D%3D)

I’m down to my last straw here and scrambling to fix this situation. My team reviewed all the support from the past few days, and I still need just a few more donors from your area.

I know you’re always there for me when the going gets tough. So, when my team asked who we should reach out to make up ground, you were top of mind.

I am counting on you. All I need is just a pinch more support from your area. [**_Chip in $1, $3, or maybe $5 if you can here._**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=62cf43b8f8674c65a54310dae9458747&_e=1S85AOzmWFmbSE4w4V27026znN7iWwb6Hg8hrb7wlkhVs2z_9VHi3vvrfLukJ3vtsAs2VB_4K4oWzi9vxkbVBCTc0LeNJ6m3u6eC0zKlEbPiPMN-irEMSrM43B1ZvoEdtkckmMqFK-mkavexGodGBLYy2sXZMiKSfPM_9Uq2ByRGM0wXpNzpKNrE48pObEGg5jRtkrAdTvpXGeWcCT7tEVGld2kDN3c4GwmSfOzfcuYr68gp7oplT8HuFEwWHH95Co8zfKC_MngKcSk7iyBW5FxDUe0tNc5ZFg49AMcqjaD_oR1ot7IIvO573Kyo2Lgti85X2hwyp1Joel700rSorbZGGSSAQJLHX_rWqWQEkRz1ZaeLJXotUc_rM61tea_PcYl10n0ZDYd9ZvuOh6Afug%3D%3D)

Thanks,
JNK _Folks,

I’m as nervous as a pregnant Jenny. **_April’s halfway over, and I’ve yet to meet any of my fundraising goals..._**

It’s been a difficult road for Republicans on their fundraising recently. Biden’s been riding a gravy train with biscuit wheels, getting million-dollar donations left and right.

# [Add your name: Investigate and punish Ted Cruz for campaign finance violations >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c195b3d-fab4-4d15-aa37-4c94b96005ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde5c73f3-3875-43a4-a1fc-85aceb552bff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [Recent investigations](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83ec32a0-8066-419d-9096-c0d51fdfee86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) show that Texas Sen. Ted Cruz has been involved in some shady business dealings regarding his podcast and how he receives compensation. MSNBC host Chris Hayes called Cruz's actions "a serious ethical and campaign finance scandal in the making." It appears Cruz has been directing funds totaling over $630,000 to Truth and Courage PAC, a group dedicated to his reelection campaign, from iHeartMedia, the company that distributes his podcast. There are rules about outside employment for members of Congress, so Cruz is attempting to skirt those rules with this arrangement – but it raises real ethical concerns, and could be a campaign finance violation, since there is a $5,000 limit on how much an officeholder is permitted to solicit for a super PAC. This is unacceptable. Ted Cruz needs to be investigated for campaign finance violations, and if he's found guilty, he must be held accountable and punished. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | show that Texas Sen. Ted Cruz has been involved in some shady business dealings regarding his podcast and how he receives compensation. MSNBC host Chris Hayes called Cruz's actions "a serious ethical and campaign finance scandal in the making." It appears Cruz has been directing funds totaling over $630,000 to Truth and Courage PAC, a group dedicated to his reelection campaign, from iHeartMedia, the company that distributes his podcast. There are rules about outside employment for members of Congress, so Cruz is attempting to skirt those rules with this arrangement – but it raises real ethical concerns, and could be a campaign finance violation, since there is a $5,000 limit on how much an officeholder is permitted to solicit for a super PAC. This is unacceptable. Ted Cruz needs to be investigated for campaign finance violations, and if he's found guilty, he must be held accountable and punished. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action ( Already took this action? ) | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Lecture on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs6DgVRiN6

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os6DgVRiN6
While we see it most often among young people, a
socialist way of thinking is spreading broadly across the U.S.
and around the world.

Dear
Friend,

While we
see it most often among young people, a socialist way of thinking
is spreading broadly across the U.S. and around the world.

It is
critical to keep the facts, history, and results of both
Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism at the forefront of the
national conversation.

That's
why I'm sending you this email today. I would like to personally
invite you to watch the new Hoover Institution video lecture,
Socialism vs. Capitalism for free.

You can
sign up for this four-chapter lecture here:
https://resources.hoover.org/socialism-vs-capitalism-course-signup/

This
lecture is from Hoover's exclusive Policy Bootcamp and is led by
Peter Berkowitz-a Senior Fellow at Hoover who served in teh
previous administration as U.S. State Department Director of
Policy Planning.

Peter is
an academic expert on political philosophy, ranging from
constitutional conservatism to progressivism. Inside this lecture
he'll give you a deeper understanding of:

Distinctions between capitalism and socialism

Common criticisms of both economic systems

Disagreement between Karl Marx and John Locke regarding property
rights

Centralized economic planning and its failures

You
can activate your free online lecture right now by using this
secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/socialism-vs-capitalism-course-signup/

Thank
you,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development

Hoover Institution | Stanford University

With
its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford
CA USA 94305

name: Jon Tester
subject: Fred & Christine
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ)
---
Hi folks,

Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding day in 1905. That was a couple years before they picked out a flat piece of grassland just outside Big Sandy to homestead. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42914?t=7&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ) That patch of loamy, alkaline clay-soil is the same one where I grew up; where Sharla and I raised our kids, and where we still farm the land to this day.

Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating windstorms, bitter cold, fires, poisonous snakes—pretty much everything but locusts. They had a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill, their healthy son and daughters (including Helen, my mom), strong muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America.

I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking Americans like my grandparents. Folks like our teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that fights for them.

But the special interests trying to unseat me don’t care about that. Dark money groups are spending millions of dollars to misinform voters and replace me with a mouthpiece for their own agenda. They’ll do whatever it takes to elect their handpicked candidate because they don’t care about protecting our way of life—they’re just in it for power and influence.

**That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign differently. I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the mountains of cash these outside groups have earmarked to defeat me.**

[**Can I count on you to split a contribution between my people-powered campaign and Fight for Reform? With the election season in full swing, we need to fight back now**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42914?t=8&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Jon Tester will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42915?t=9&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42916?t=10&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42917?t=11&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42918?t=12&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42914?t=13&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ)
Your donation—no matter the amount—plants the seeds of our movement, ensuring we grow the resources we need to win.

Thanks for your support. Together, we can keep me in the Senate fighting for the little guy.

—Jon
Jon Tester is only asking for contributions of up to $5,000 from individuals, federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. Jon Tester is not asking for contributions in excess of that amount or any contributions from corporations, unions, or other federally prohibited sources.
---
| | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035.
Authorized by Jon Tester for U.S. Senate.
Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors.
Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible.
fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ).**

[Click here](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails/?t=4&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?t=14&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Fight for Reform »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26914?t=5&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ)

[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26915?t=6&akid=21367%2E4449941%2EfS-XxZ)

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Florida could turn the tide nationwide.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I understand if it seems like all hope is lost — but that couldn't be further from the truth.
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/15538?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240505-ChuckSchumer-DMPAbortionTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240505-ChuckSchumer-DMPAbortionTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=14591%2E9716520%2E97NXsj)
Hi. Chuck Schumer here, and there's something I need you to understand: **This November, not only is our one-seat Senate majority at stake — but so is the future of reproductive rights nationwide.**

I know Florida's already facing the sobering reality of extreme limits on abortion, and it'll only get worse now that DeSantis' six-week ban officially took effect on May 1.

That's why I'm thrilled that Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running to defeat Rick Scott and his massive personal fortune. **But I just heard that we're $14,624 behind on our $50,000 emergency goals.**

**With so much on the line, I can't sit and watch as Scott's expensive ads threaten Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's chances. So I've got to ask:[ Will you chip in $5 –– split between Debbie for Florida and the DSCC by midnight to help us protect our Senate majority and stay on track to kick Rick out of Congress?](https://go.dscc.org/go/15538?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240505-ChuckSchumer-DMPAbortionTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240505-ChuckSchumer-DMPAbortionTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=14591%2E9716520%2E97NXsj)**
| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/15538?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240505-ChuckSchumer-DMPAbortionTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240505-ChuckSchumer-DMPAbortionTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=14591%2E9716520%2E97NXsj)
---

Between Senate Democrats defending what experts call the "Senate map from hell," and Floridians bracing for a heartless crackdown on personal freedoms leveled by some of the most extreme far-right leaders in the nation, I understand if it seems like all hope is lost.

**But believe me — that couldn't be further from the truth.**

See, this November, Florida has an incredible opportunity to turn the tides: **Both an initiative to enshrine the right to abortion in the state constitution _and_ a competitor to retire Rick Scott will be on the ballot.**

If enough Floridians come out to demand the GOP stands down, not only would it reinstate reproductive health care access across the Sunshine State ... **_it could also be what ends Rick Scott's Senate career._**

**And if that happens, we might just be able to keep the Senate blue ... and _finally_ get federal protections for abortion across the finish line.**

But the only way we do that is if Debbie Mucarsel-Powell has your support ahead of major deadlines like this one –– **[so please, will you split a $5 gift between the DSCC and Debbie to help reach our $50,000 goals, beat her anti-choice opponent, and save our Senate majority and reproductive rights along with it?](https://go.dscc.org/go/15538?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240505-ChuckSchumer-DMPAbortionTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240505-ChuckSchumer-DMPAbortionTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=14591%2E9716520%2E97NXsj)**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Debbie for Florida and the DSCC.

Chuck Schumer

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Protecting a woman’s right to choose:
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Women are being forced to travel across state lines to receive essential abortion procedures. Some are even forced to carry pregnancies to term against their will.
Team,

As we mark Women's Health Month this May, we must confront the harsh reality facing women across our country.

Since the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , the fallout has been nothing short of devastating. **Many women are now being forced to travel across state lines to receive essential abortion procedures. Some are even forced to carry pregnancies to term against their will.**

Doctors are being placed in impossible situations, forced to deny life-saving treatment to their patients out of fear of criminal prosecution. In some states, women have faced criminal charges for experiencing a miscarriage. **This dystopian reality is the direct result of the extreme MAGA Republicans' agenda that my opponent, Mike Lawler, has supported and enabled.**

If we allow them to maintain power, it will only get worse. Lawler and national Republicans are poised to enact **a national abortion ban** if given the opportunity. That's why I'm running—to stop them.

**This isn't just an issue confined to red states.** If Lawler and Republicans have their way, they _will_ further roll back access to reproductive health care on a national level.

That's why it's imperative that Democrats take back the House. **But we can't achieve that without flipping NY-17.** **[Team, can I count on you to chip in $10 or any amount to help me defeat Mike Lawler and take back the House majority from the MAGA Republicans so we can protect access to reproductive clean_body: Women are being forced to travel across state lines to receive essential abortion procedures. Some are even forced to carry pregnancies to term against their will. Team, As we mark Women's Health Month this May, we must confront the harsh reality facing women across our country. Since the overturning of Roe v. Wade , the fallout has been nothing short of devastating. Many women are now being forced to travel across state lines to receive essential abortion procedures. Some are even forced to carry pregnancies to term against their will. Doctors are being placed in impossible situations, forced to deny life-saving treatment to their patients out of fear of criminal prosecution. In some states, women have faced criminal charges for experiencing a miscarriage. This dystopian reality is the direct result of the extreme MAGA Republicans' agenda that my opponent, Mike Lawler, has supported and enabled. If we allow them to maintain power, it will only get worse. Lawler and national Republicans are poised to enact a national abortion ban if given the opportunity. That's why I'm running—to stop them. This isn't just an issue confined to red states. If Lawler and Republicans have their way, they will further roll back access to reproductive health care on a national level. That's why it's imperative that Democrats take back the House. But we can't achieve that without flipping NY-17. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Yours in the fight, Mondaire Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He's ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he's doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = **= ** PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Nightmare Fuel: Kari Lake having a presidential election certification vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
If Kari Lake wins, she will be sworn in before the Senate certifies the results of the presidential election.
#

If you have been looking for a reason to make your first donation to Ruben Gallego's campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona, try this one:
**If Kari Lake wins, she will be sworn in before the Senate certifies the results of the presidential election.**
And if you think for a second that she would ever vote to certify a Joe Biden victory, please think again.
Joe Biden could win 10 by million votes and Kari Lake would say the election was stolen, vote against certification, and encourage insurrection to overturn the results.
Chaos, division, and no concern for American democracy. That’s Kari Lake.
[**So there it is: please contribute $3 to Ruben Gallego's campaign today to make sure Kari Lake never gets the chance to vote on certification of a presidential election.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240505-1-160&t=1&akid=2294%2E734936%2EShoQ0o)

With gratitude and strength for the fights ahead,
Ruben Gallego for Senate

| | Fellow Conservative, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=aba23db8bbc347f9a68657f21afe1338&_e=7cIXZhJ076gMiudZSVyuhwaoDwW40MRTfHmaD0z3MtSEuRl6vh8b_KgVtVzZgf4ykB_BbLZKMzZa-MpnwS3qE4v7zNIVcQ6UOVYybDWHqyUCcMvJ53pVi0xT1UAX5d-vE0swWdEFVXgbJSsK0vjuLBo1HMZ-Pk0C4ICs7NYCJHs35uei_Xmm9ZLuVvTETyiB42s1ITXg49Ex8i4QHU_Ggc2bI64OEehsbOl5WOyMWI-kOaiolEzZgYRkg9zMpKVjoUu30tpdPNDasPFGWISvMcQWqpoFOejAioFNxjbVHOP9czUoQwGNwqKlJ4slm3J4-rnOeVnTavJX4eQ6Sn1KYI1Q6VQvCKLPU3nze_ZxzlFb6dDATjSOCCKWtV22xI-MCYBNIu2iGshxE8k2o6zVeVNNHaCHp-DMCU7XrxTPUgLD8NSVylddmygLn-3mDLeGnQ5wS3nYqMbsKR2Myim9j_0HvqGYFBi84vj4InzrlcqE_3tJubU3PRXWmn_06fOp)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they’d rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=aba23db8bbc347f9a68657f21afe1338&_e=7cIXZhJ076gMiudZSVyuhwaoDwW40MRTfHmaD0z3MtSEuRl6vh8b_KgVtVzZgf4ykB_BbLZKMzZa-MpnwS3qE4v7zNIVcQ6UOVYybDWHqyUCcMvJ53pVi0xT1UAX5d-vE0swWdEFVXgbJSsK0vjuLBo1HMZ-Pk0C4ICs7NYCJHs35uei_Xmm9ZLuVvTETyiB42s1ITXg49Ex8i4QHU_Ggc2bI64OEehsbOl5WOyMWI-kOaiolEzZgYRkg9zMpKVjoUu30tpdPNDasPFGWISvMcQWqpoFOejAioFNxjbVHOP9czUoQwGNwqKlJ4slm3J4-rnOeVnTavJX4eQ6Sn1KYJheLtq0Wl-yJZM7L4I1NdKKxiTUbbh2IAnyT6P89pdzt5OxVEtIpDpO_BigXSQd_sOWJH9OO6eVsoLU1E8AAP1toLiK_LHBP6CyVtkD1dAiMka07x32-0FC1La-rC3yCMEslNoAdFKJdBJHK_pe-EWgpkDj6kiVI4NAUJtjt4jq) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There’s no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!

P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of _**$25 million**_ in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. You and I cannot give them any daylight. **[**Your prompt support is critical.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=aba23db8bbc347f9a68657f21afe1338&_e=7cIXZhJ076gMiudZSVyuhwaoDwW40MRTfHmaD0z3MtSEuRl6vh8b_KgVtVzZgf4ykB_BbLZKMzZa-MpnwS3qE4v7zNIVcQ6UOVYybDWHqyUCcMvJ53pVi0xT1UAX5d-vE0swWdEFVXgbJSsK0vjuLBo1HMZ-Pk0C4ICs7NYCJHs35uei_Xmm9ZLuVvTETyiB42s1ITXg49Ex8i4QHU_Ggc2bI64OEehsbOl5WOyMWI-kOaiolEzZgYRkg9zMpKVjoUu30tpdPNDasPFGWISvMcQWqpoFOejAioFNxjbVHOP9czUoQwGNwqKlJ4slm3J4-rnOeVnTavJX4eQ6Sn1KYKf8zbiLMxFcl9ji2eP4KA-4oObC93f6sWNqI2x2Dun3YuNA2aZqDQjNbCDyEVDkCt-HZzCQu5jCACodtM0SA5IqESHGTU4scBJx6lrS2weQzd7XinwJM0IaHNZ-ifA5Wx1lUDGp9hUkHFqQPb0QrzcEl-uqW8GElUSxAan1PrYw)** Please don’t delay.

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkxMjYifQ/igLcW7HRzdmFUoMn5CHRrA)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here.

You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY— but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

**This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.**

The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion, the American Veterans Center is bringing the Parade BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as a T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country.

**[Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkxMjYifQ/ylgoSk57srjSrDW4JRV1Og)**
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkxMjYifQ/9Moc7XsF4iWbgFTM_frNhg)
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkxMjYifQ/80iTIAQ4obRopejdpzo9QQ)
---

---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkxMjYifQ/ZbGvPFLMg5nnWChwTITrFw)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.
* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkxMjYifQ/yajQIz3678Pni36SXx8J8Q) If you’ve been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best ways you could possibly do it.

**And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get.**

You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C. for the parade is difficult.

I am honored to say that we will have several World War II veterans with us for this year’s parade... but I don’t know how many more years we’ll have that precious opportunity.

So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion and what might be the last chance these great men have to gather together, **I encourage you to help us honor them while we still have them with us.**

And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms.

Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.
Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.

_I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._

**Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please —[if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkxMjYifQ/4VfWzF7ptkHnk9eUrUbfKw)**
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---

---

The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Friend, I wanted to reach out to personally thank you.
I have so much to thank you for, so this message is a bit longer than usual. But in case you're short on time, I have to make sure that you see this first: **My end-of-week deadline is approaching, and we're still pacing dangerously short of my $50,000 goal.****[I hate that I have to ask, but this is incredibly important: If you have anything extra to spare, can you chip in $5 to help me hit this goal? We’ve made so much progress together already, but I need your help to make sure that we can continue this work for years to come.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84354118/471267763/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5016-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmVkYmM3Zi1lODBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKpW4s5hJ5kV6ByFCAovrYhi4S6RpwW90qX9p4xhnes=)**
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84354119/471267764/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5016-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmVkYmM3Zi1lODBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKpW4s5hJ5kV6ByFCAovrYhi4S6RpwW90qX9p4xhnes=)
---
If you have the time to keep reading, I hope that you'll take a moment to celebrate our recent wins.
In 2023, we really got to work. I introduced legislation to create a national paid leave program — legislation that I first introduced 10 years ago and have continued to advocate for since then. You immediately rallied behind me, voicing your support for this long-overdue legislation. **And today, support for paid family leave is higher than ever before** — including 85% of all voters in battleground states! Thank you for making this possible.
I also**released my Strategic Plan on Aging to make sure that our seniors can retire with dignity and financial stability.** From expanding existing programs like Medicare to helping more seniors remain in their homes, these proposals would drastically improve the quality of life for millions of seniors. Thank you for supporting my work to make this happen.
I'm also incredibly grateful for the outpouring of support from this grassroots team after **I introduced a resolution to finally certify the Equal Rights Amendment.****** This amendment would establish protections against gender-based discrimination in our Constitution, once and for all, giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights. Activists have been fighting for the ERA for 100 years, and it is truly an honor to carry forward their work today. Thank you for standing beside me in the fight for gender equity and reproductive freedom.
Lastly, I fought tirelessly to make sure that the National Defense Authorization Act included a pay increase for service members, investments to clean up toxic PFAS contamination and funding for hundreds of spots in my cyber security academy at over 400 schools. Thank you for helping me ensure that our veterans and service members get the benefits they deserve.

There have been so many other moments when you've stood beside me, and I am grateful for every single one of them. But our fight for progress is far from over. And now, Democrats are in the most difficult election year in recent memory.
Here in New York, Republicans just had their best election cycle in years. Now, they're directly targeting my seat. With a narrow 51-49 majority, we cannot afford to show any signs of weakness. **Missing my first weekly goal of May would be sending a crystal clear message to the GOP that this seat is up for grabs.** **[_So please, will you donate $5 or whatever you can spare before 11:59 p.m. to help me continue our fight for progress this year? Because I refuse to accept corporate PAC money, I'm counting on your help to make up the gap._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84354120/471267765/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5016-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmVkYmM3Zi1lODBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKpW4s5hJ5kV6ByFCAovrYhi4S6RpwW90qX9p4xhnes=)**

Kirsten

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84354126/471267771/1575385346?refcode=jtk5016-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmVkYmM3Zi1lODBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKpW4s5hJ5kV6ByFCAovrYhi4S6RpwW90qX9p4xhnes=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84354127/471267772/1575385346?refcode=jtk5016-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmVkYmM3Zi1lODBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FKpW4s5hJ5kV6ByFCAovrYhi4S6RpwW90qX9p4xhnes=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Left-Wing Groups And Long-Time Activists Reportedly Trained
Anti-Israel Protesters For Months
https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkbf84t48svmseutmq6cmh1b0jpepp8gbsqgafgo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cjj64o32c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kugn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnk9g64ob7k1imf831cugracphemjn9ctn6mjj4ttle1r7b91jm4qq3dtjmsqq2t5lmkqq8dhheipn9djhepqq4t9geup72t9h66qfb8biegqb7d9h6mi37cbkmmibcsjk6korb83ieuonadjhekp7ctd36up7b9dnmeon1djnk8iv0

Anti-Israel protesters at many of America’s universities have been
consulting with and sometimes trained by left-wing groups and

name: Team Cruz
subject: Team Cruz Grassroots Newsletter >> May 5, 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...** **[Radical Anti-Israel Protestors Target Houston Home Of Sen. Ted Cruz:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "The radical anti-Israel protestors have remained in check here in Houston, except for a small group that continues to show up in front of the home Senator Ted Cruz. As reported exclusively on FOX News: Cruz’s home in Houston has been the target of 14 protests since February, including a protest on Friday when one suspect was arrested. Cruz’s office said that the senator remains resolute in his support of Israel, while brushing off the protesters' tactics of "harassment or intimidation." "Senator Cruz will continue to stand with Israel and support Israel's right..." **[Bipartisan Senators Unveil Bill Limiting Kids’ Social Media Use:](http://trk.tedcruz.-Q)** "Sens. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) and Brian Schatz (D-Hawaii) are leading a group of bipartisan senators reintroducing a bill that would limit kids’ social media use by setting a minimum age for users and restricting access to the sites in schools. Schatz originally introduced a version of the legislation, called the Kids Off Social Media Act, in spring 2023. It would set the minimum age for online social media users to 13 years old, and prevent platforms from “feeding algorithmically-boosted content” to users under 17. Users under 18 must have parental permission to use apps like..." **[Cruz Condemns Biden's, AOC's Responses to College Protests:](http://trk.tedcruz.-X3jVZ3GjVVEbVZYIYeA)** "Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, criticized the responses of President Joe Biden and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y., to protests that have occurred on numerous college campuses, such as Yale University, Columbia University, and New York University, over the past week. "That is not peaceful ... Threats of violence and calling for the murder of your former students is not remotely peaceful," Cruz said on his "Verdict" podcast this week, The Daily Wire reported. "AOC — this is a sitting member of Congress. She's singling out Columbia and Yale. She's praising what's..." **[Sen. Ted Cruz Grills 'Complicit' Corporation For Public Broadcasting Providing Funding To Scandal-Plagued NPR:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, sent a scathing letter to the Corporation for Public Broadcasting (CPB) grilling the nonprofit that distributes federal funding to scandal-plagued NPR. "I write today to express deep concern about National Public Radio’s (NPR) departure from its stated mission 'to create a more informed public' and to ‘distribute programming that meets the highest standards of public service in journalism,'" Cruz began his letter to CPB president and CEO Patricia de Stacy Harrison on Thursday..." **[Texas Sen. Ted Cruz: Joe Biden Is 'Inviting Terrorists Into This Country':](http://trk.tedcruz.-JK5OOm47mWJQ)** "After months of talk, the impeachment trial for Secretary of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas, started and ended in just a few hours earlier this month. Senate Democrats voted to dismiss both articles of impeachment against Mayorkas. The Republican-controlled House impeached Mayorkas by a single vote margin on Feb. 13, recommending that he be removed from office over his handling of the US-Mexico border. Democrats said the charges against Mayorkas amounted to a policy dispute, not the "high crimes and misdemeanors" laid out as a bar for..." **[**Ted Cruz Needs Your Help To Build A Red Wave For 2024 >>**](http://trk.tedcruz.-cklBE2JbF_kNIcrj4oGQ)**
---
|
---
**“VERDICT w/ Ted Cruz” Podcast...**
---

name: LucasKunce.com
subject: We’ve gained some serious MO-mentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat has gained some serious MO-mentum, Peter.
Last year, Lucas earned the earliest endorsements for a Missouri challenger ever from statewide labor groups like the Missouri AFL-CIO and the Missouri Fire Fighters. And he’s since been endorsed by major national organizations like Social Security Works PAC, League of Conservation Voters, and End Citizens United.
Abortion Action Missouri just recently became the latest statewide organization to throw their support behind Lucas — cementing his position as the Democrat who can defeat Josh Hawley, the control-obsessed politician who’s spent his career crusading against reproductive rights.
**Now, Lucas needs one more critical endorsement — from you.[Will you join the grassroots, worker-led coalition standing behind Lucas Kunce’s campaign for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your personal endorsement today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240505_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=5447%2E614464%2Eea_0mM)**
**[Add your endorsement »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240505_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=5447%2E614464%2Eea_0mM)**
Lucas’ bold message of taking back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley is already resonating with Missouri voters — and all the national insiders propping up his campaign know it. So now, they’re determined to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to tear down Lucas and the grassroots movement we’re building together.
They know Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley this November — and that every endorsement, donation, and everyday person like you sharing Lucas’ message could make all the difference in what polls are already showing is a neck-and-neck race. **That’s why we have to ask:**
**[Will you join our worker-led, people-powered movement to elect Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your personal endorsement today? When you add your name, we send a signal to everyone watching our race that this movement is growing even stronger every day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240505_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=5447%2E614464%2Eea_0mM)**
**[Add your endorsement »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240505_endorse-lucas?t=4&akid=5447%2E614464%2Eea_0mM)**
It’s going to take an unprecedented amount of support from real people like you to elect Lucas, flip this seat, and take back power for everyday Missourians — and we’re so grateful that we’ve always been able to count on you, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240505-5447-footer&t=5&refcode2=5447_614464_ea_0mM&akid=5447%2E614464%2Eea_0mM)**
---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

That means you and I will have just eight months to build a 58-county, grassroots campaign capable of defeating Adam Schiff - with his _ActBlue_ allies and the war chest he's assembled during the two decades he spent in Washington, D.C. **[That why I'm humbly asking you to rush and emergency $35 contribution to my campaign today.](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ad0e440b8580499bb592e18b1de6d229&_e=bKh7lmbyqHuOxDNRC2U1t07ezdlLUbzWqlW32ChF0zIrs5mxFJfkcMRN3xYNOhcwBlBkEd4iF6zDGiW8CKWSam_2i4lp3ykEcMCBZKwcRKic8t3OAjeT2scdnhSQZnaGIE2Y9Us7mDgqOECvX9fJgvv0KQjkIwT2EoNR5AbP3ZgziJHlF7xQwGURzq-6RQ5hXo91uV9yQjtpBhy80kKYwTZBsCbesiRxzg9kaokSNfhVXICzQU477oo8FZ8ILLhgUOf7Haa9pxP56TwjKVuclMwXpzmcZ53KPBhoKe44pCrTAvQJjpxfssBr4BylZ2Meu-IF49PQFJ14o94yu0hYpx3s90yQpshPzR71TO71t_SoWeJlZMZke8_Ds790eqfcL4mRUxIbKKhekxXurGgPig%3D%3D)** There's no time to lose. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, **_"It's deja vu all over again."_** Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. 1️⃣ **_Kansas:_ Republican legislators failed to override veto of gender-affirming care ban**
In Kansas, Republican lawmakers were attempting to override the Democratic governor's veto of a bill that would block trans minors from receiving health care. name: Sheldon Whitehouse
subject: My work at the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Peter,

**I’m running for re-election in Rhode Island for the United States Senate.**[I’m hoping you’ll split a $15 donation between my campaign and Defeat Republicans](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84358117/471277556/509726796?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240505_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjODY5YmM5LWVlMGEtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OgoQZEiNZE83tjdcJyGhiG6zc-Zf3vdtOBZP9wF6BSU=) **– and here’s why.**

_It’s been clear for a long time that the Supreme Court has a corruption problem._ I recently published a law review article highlighting how this captured Supreme Court often simply makes up false facts to arrive at decisions that ultimately benefit partisan Republican special interests.

Take _Citizens United v. FEC_ as an example. Remember when the Federalist Society justices said that all the unlimited political spending they were unleashing would be “transparent”? Well, we’ve seen dark money in politics prove them wrong several billion times over.

Our system is designed to leave fact-finding to the lower courts that hear testimony, make credibility determinations, and review evidence. The Supreme Court is then supposed to defer to – and not alter – factual records in its decisions. Think about it: if the Highest Court in the Land makes up phony facts, there is nowhere else the parties can appeal to.

The captured Roberts Court has done a lot of this phony fact-finding in big decisions that have fundamentally changed life in America. The Dobbs decision that ended a fundamental freedom for women is another one that was built on made-up history. How are the American people supposed to trust a Court that makes up its own rules to concoct decisions that suit right-wing special interests?

[I won’t give up my fight to improve transparency and accountability at the Supreme Court, but I need your help. Split a contribution today to send me back to the Senate so I can protect American democracy and make sure our Court is giving Americans the fair shake they deserve.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84358118/471277571/509726796?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240505_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjODY5YmM5LWVlMGEtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OgoQZEiNZE83tjdcJyGhiG6zc-Zf3vdtOBZP9wF6BSU=)

name: Dave Reichert
subject: A Leader who will support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by We Stand With Dave Reichert (R)
body:
It’s time for change

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5e634f3aa6c0442bba23d7295473a9cd&_e=124CIF2H3mOk5kpogR3R6HZtwlH1Yb-EHkWlY8J3_GdhdA6cOdMeDFAoZZEFOpEGcoe5u3UbLSkcFOw_x4vGgc4OAZNtTEqag01bLPo5gTFBVD2f7HS80g7IIufvV8qCSnwh8xPGsaE28advRqRUqWiM7Pzy0w6thphZn0mz4lZPHZCCofQ-zAJ1qduUiVXehztW_r6Mz0aWr4vfU_1XQEz8qAxUyH_eExnOvtt3xJP5fOJmT7PB5w2eBOIxVjDR0JSWv3iPL_f1XbaVuf3w6pTNAdtVDjFnJ9gX2bOsiufW83Cw_XEWYybZWDFvgZm6RtF6_eNN-yrfRBywt39AWhXmPWNOK3LmTb9qk_tPxKty50oaLV797X3xV7lkmk7xXzTOJ0NqO3vRLE52mcN7TA%3D%3D)
---
Friend, Americans deserve leaders who will support citizens and help get America back on track.

_**Washingtonians are suffering from high prices and high rates of crime. It’s time we rein in the high cost of living in our state and restore public safety.**_
| [**RESTORE WASHINGTON**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5e634f3aa6c0442bba23d7295473a9cd&_e=124CIF2H3mOk5kpogR3R6HZtwlH1Yb-EHkWlY8J3_GdhdA6cOdMeDFAoZZEFOpEGcoe5u3UbLSkcFOw_x4vGgc4OAZNtTEqag01bLPo5gTFBVD2f7HS80g7IIufvV8qCSnwh8xPGsaE28advRqRUqWiM7Pzy0w6thphZn0mz4lZPHZCCofQ-zAJ1qduUiVXehztW_r6Mz0aWr4vfU_1XQL5ZT2kzmokBJaeDxApBGHsIURQDKFHqNN0pDJ9hv1FXdlH-yft2UA8EoR8JfLXgSi0nz-NWC5xxHjHgnhZcVJX1grTb9f1lmupMYjjRU4IVFaTNKUzEVqfwuXDZVz1r86LLFMyblwbdjV_h9gZ2RdVoQemoQWQPQn-H4wvv8EtEul62xE2AsHAIBQwf0hVRGw%3D%3D)
---
[**BRING DOWN INFLATION**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5e634f3aa6c0442bba23d7295473a9cd&_e=124CIF2H3mOk5kpogR3R6HZtwlH1Yb-EHkWlY8J3_GdhdA6cOdMeDFAoZZEFOpEGcoe5u3UbLSkcFOw_x4vGgc4OAZNtTEqag01bLPo5gTFBVD2f7HS80g7IIufvV8qCSnwh8xPGsaE28advRqRUqWiM7Pzy0w6thphZn0mz4lZPHZCCofQ-zAJ1qduUiVXehztW_r6Mz0aWr4vfU_1XQL5ZT2kzmokBJaeDxApBGHsIURQDKFHqNN0pDJ9hv1FXF4ia9uYL7pp9a9YjJHHCgtuTol_v5P05agqMgxUoF8vTU40Vv3TWHg6Cs7CH21Hmg2mOAATDFR6RxRzDiiJv5_DKw-Z4JZcjJIfF6bZ6lx9Kw7Vw5DcG9UM4aZ25ZNQQOMAamwYaFopcIwzaombSjQ%3D%3D)
---
[**RESTORE PUBLIC SAFETY**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5e634f3aa6c0442bba23d7295473a9cd&_e=124CIF2H3mOk5kpogR3R6HZtwlH1Yb-EHkWlY8J3_GdhdA6cOdMeDFAoZZEFOpEGcoe5u3UbLSkcFOw_x4vGgc4OAZNtTEqag01bLPo5gTFBVD2f7HS80g7IIufvV8qCSnwh8xPGsaE28advRqRUqWiM7Pzy0w6thphZn0mz4lZPHZCCofQ-zAJ1qduUiVXehztW_r6Mz0aWr4vfU_1XQL5ZT2kzmokBJaeDxApBGHsIURQDKFHqNN0pDJ9hv1FXhzPe3Jz1jPniae78ABDe-p-lkmgA4Gr9-kylwOf1QLQIM0wjOcd64WKP8notRdmk6AkYeJq4iI9DPlMYqBL_olp2Jlk4MbCZ6i3I4mf_SZkOh9LcXwVYOLjjIERgMs_jHSxj60QozbbHC7p3BZOEcg%3D%3D)
---

This means we have to _**ACT NOW**_ to support law enforcement, stop new taxes, and repeal regressive taxes. The Democrats are no friend to your wallet or safety. They have repeatedly undermined public safety and raised your taxes even further.

[**MAKE WASHINGTON SAFE**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5e634f3aa6c0442bba23d7295473a9cd&_e=124CIF2H3mOk5kpogR3R6HZtwlH1Yb-EHkWlY8J3_GdhdA6cOdMeDFAoZZEFOpEGcoe5u3UbLSkcFOw_x4vGgc4OAZNtTEqag01bLPo5gTFBVD2f7HS80g7IIufvV8qCSnwh8xPGsaE28advRqRUqWiM7Pzy0w6thphZn0mz4lZPHZCCofQ-zAJ1qduUiVXehztW_r6Mz0aWr4vfU_1XQL5ZT2kzmokBJaeDxApBGHsIURQDKFHqNN0pDJ9hv1FXJR7c-HKr6kkSRQszqN7qyTUHR1P-L5KaGk890zuWjm5i9WTb0E7ONbRfm03deHXCrshrGNHR4ubyqLrUF0mk1zUb94ep3pRehr0vHca9PJ8Z-b2XauLk64zgzhRMpAC4ekyHoXLSbPG_jt6Dfta-Hg%3D%3D)
---
[**LOWER TAXES**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5e634f3aa6c0442bba23d7295473a9cd&_e=124CIF2H3mOk5kpogR3R6HZtwlH1Yb-EHkWlY8J3_GdhdA6cOdMeDFAoZZEFOpEGcoe5u3UbLSkcFOw_x4vGgc4OAZNtTEqag01bLPo5gTFBVD2f7HS80g7IIufvV8qCSnwh8xPGsaE28advRqRUqWiM7Pzy0w6thphZn0mz4lZPHZCCofQ-zAJ1qduUiVXehztW_r6Mz0aWr4vfU_1XQL5ZT2kzmokBJaeDxApBGHsIURQDKFHqNN0pDJ9hv1FXJXaFdZtvsSoUHLbm_rTIuRbqymLYK16flVaJzG0qwIpfUmX4KWOIcgBguHM07qF0or6PnSq9n_xKhLONuc8EzFGdDqZbnHSLl8z5wurhu4gstei9dp25plQDmVTovTZ8ljfUt-Z0UiWoaGwdfHZCPA%3D%3D)
---

Washington needs a leader who will fight to protect citizens. Washingtonians have been left in the dust for too many years. I’m ready to work together and help the people of Washington reach greatness.

**Together, we’ll change what’s wrong, fix what’s broken, and do what’s right.**
We still have time to save our Great State from the despair of the Democrats. **[I’m kindly asking you to pitch in anything you can to help us save citizens from suffering any longer.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=5e634f3aa6c0442bba23d7295473a9cd&_e=124CIF2H3mOk5kpogR3R6HZtwlH1Yb-EHkWlY8J3_GdhdA6cOdMeDFAoZZEFOpEGcoe5u3UbLSkcFOw_x4vGgc4OAZNtTEqag01bLPo5gTFBVD2f7HS80g7IIufvV8qCSnwh8xPGsaE28advRqRUqWiM7Pzy0w6thphZn0mz4lZPHZCCofQ-zAJ1qduUiVXehztW_r6Mz0aWr4vfU_1XQEz8qAxUyH_eExnOvtt3xJP5fOJmT7PB5w2eBOIxVjDR94p8IVszlMniCuJPdwRpj-1lx2J9oKzrK-A2ZfkzoKVp24KS0O_xfCKXMOKyiF4g7ZeAizKt_TwlEY5Ew73zvIMZY_FlEbHVxn0X2vk8e_Z0It6hw5RcVfEt4mKr-07p6TLM5kwQYVS1YOU5hPiICg%3D%3D)**

Thank you for taking the despair of our State seriously. I can’t do this without you, and I know I’m ready to fight, but are you?

clean_body: It’s time for change | Friend, Americans deserve leaders who will support citizens and help get America back on track. Washingtonians are suffering from high prices and high rates of crime. It’s time we rein in the high cost of living in our state and restore public safety. | This means we have to ACT NOW to support law enforcement, stop new taxes, and repeal regressive taxes. The Democrats are no friend to your wallet or safety. They have repeatedly undermined public safety and raised your taxes even further. Washington needs a leader who will fight to protect citizens. Washingtonians have been left in the dust for too many years. I’m ready to work together and help the people of Washington reach greatness. Together, we’ll change what’s wrong, fix what’s broken, and do what’s right. We still have time to save our Great State from the despair of the Democrats. Thank you for taking the despair of our State seriously. I can’t do this without you, and I know I’m ready to fight, but are you? Thank you for your support, Dave Reichert Dave Reichert is Running to Change what's wrong, Fix what's broken, and Do what's right. Paid for by We Stand With Dave Reichert (R) P.O. name: Piper Perabo
subject: Helping Rural Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
You might know me from movies like Coyote Ugly and Black Butterfly, or you might have seen me in the hit show Yellowstone
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beliefs-of-the-radical-left)
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | Hi there, my name is Piper Perabo. You might know me from movies like _Coyote Ugly_ and _Black Butterfly_ , or you might have seen me in the hit show _Yellowstone_ in my role as environmental activist Summer Higgins.
---
|
---
| But here’s something you might not know: My character on Yellowstone was based on my real-life activism after I had dinner with the show’s creator and told him how I’d been arrested while protesting Bret Kavanaugh’s appointment to the Supreme Court.
---
|
---
| But my inconveniences that day were nothing compared to the suffering folks are enduring who have lost the right to make decisions about their own bodies! Which leads me to the reason I’m writing to you today: **If we want to restore Roe v. Wade or make progress on any of the other issues that matter to us, we need to elect more Democrats to Congress and that means organizing in rural America.** We need to flip seats in states and districts where Republicans currently
hold power. And to do that, we need to reach swing voters and even some
moderate Republicans and bring them over to our side.
But how do we do that in a nation as polarized as this one, especially when right-wing media is so pervasive and demonizing Democrats as radicals and communists every chance they get?
Well, the first thing we’ve got to do is stop letting them define us! In a moment, I’m going to show you a new video by No Dem Left Behind that challenges the false Republican narratives about the so-called “radical” left. It was written by Billy Ray, who wrote the film adaptation of The Hunger Games, and I provided the voiceover pro bono because I believe so strongly in No Dem Left
Behind’s work. [**Please take a look:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beliefs-of-the-radical-left)
---
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beliefs-of-the-radical-left)
---
| | | | No Dem Left Behind is doing the important and tough work of going into rural and working-class “red” states and districts where Republicans have been dominating for years and making sure Democratic candidates have the grassroots support and resources they need to connect with voters who feel “left behind” by the D.C. political crowd.
[**Thanks so much for taking the time to hear me out and for watching the video. I hope you’ll give my friends at No Dem Left Behind your support; they deserve it!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beliefs-of-the-radical-left)
---
| [ Support No Dem Left Behind](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beliefs-of-the-radical-left)
---
| Thanks again,
\--Piper
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | |
## No Dem Left Behind PAC
---
| 80M St. SE Suite 100
Washington D.C. 20003
---

| | |
---|---|---
| Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC.
Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: GIFFORDS
subject: $5 for the 5th of May
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We know what you might be thinking: Does $5 truly have the ability to make an impact?
#

Friends -
Today is the 5th of May, which is also the 5th month of the year.
[**So we thought it was only fitting to ask this: Will you make a contribution of $5 to GIFFORDS PAC in honor of today being the 5th of May?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240505-1-30&t=1&akid=8042%2E3935704%2Exteee7)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/46177?c0=giffords-em-may24.JukpNr&refcode=em240505-1-30&t=2&akid=8042%2E3935704%2Exteee7)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-may24.lpOBpz&refcode=em240505-1-30&t=3&akid=8042%2E3935704%2Exteee7)**
---
****
We know what you might be thinking: Does $5 truly have the ability to make an impact? The answer is 100% yes.
That’s because by the time you’ve gotten to this point in the email, many others have already chipped in their $5. And when everyone does their part and makes their $5 donation, that’s how we fuel our lifesaving work to elect gun safety champions and help pass gun safety legislation.
[**So please, will you use this link to make your $5 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240505-1-30&t=4&akid=8042%2E3935704%2Exteee7)
Thanks for your support,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=8042%2E3935704%2Exteee7) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Taylor Doggett
subject: When Harry decided to run for Congress, I told him I'd do everything I could to help him.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84366383/471294550/-742709655?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.05_B1_Promised-Harry_U1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjZhYTgwNzgtZjYwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bMhHMUpBOpO7lpf6qj2CwUDArbSlo7lgnQdjAabzsF0=)
---
Hey, it's Taylor, Harry's campaign manager!

This has been an incredible year so far. Seeing the support for someone like Harry restores my faith in politics and reminds me that real life heroes do exist.

Harry's had to overcome a lot to get to the place he's at right now. After the insurrection, his mental health was taking a toll on him. And honestly, I get sick seeing the hate he receives from MAGA Republicans on social media.

But when Harry told me he wanted to run, he said, _"if I don't, who will?"_

He's putting a lot on the line just to protect our democracy. **He's used to sacrificing a lot for people, it's what he spent most of his career doing.**

So I promised him that I would do everything I possibly could to help him get elected. I told him there was no stone I wouldn't overturn – _because he's the right person for the job._

clean_body: | = Hey, it's Taylor, Harry's campaign manager! This has been an incredible year so far. Seeing the support for someone like Harry restores my faith in politics and reminds me that real life heroes do exist. Harry's had to overcome a lot to get to the place he's at right now. After the insurrection, his mental health was taking a toll on him. And honestly, I get sick seeing the hate he receives from MAGA Republicans on social media. But when Harry told me he wanted to run, he said, "if I don't, who will?" He's putting a lot on the line just to protect our democracy. He's used to sacrificing a lot for people, it's what he spent most of his career doing. So I promised him that I would do everything I possibly could to help him get elected. I told him there was no stone I wouldn't overturn – because he's the right person for the job. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Taylor Doggett Campaign Manager Harry Dunn for Congress = = | = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | mailto:info@harrydunnforcongress.com Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress
