Friend,

Crime is increasing across the country, and states with governors who are tough on crime can greatly aid in the resolution of this issue. Each and every American deserves to feel safe in their home, their neighborhood, their school, and their place of work.

Our team is collecting answers to a simple question today.
**Would you be more likely to vote for a governor who is tough on crime, backs the blue, and keeps dangerous criminals in jail?**

This election is our historic opportunity for Democrats to take back the House. name: Eric Sorensen HQ
subject: Joe McGraw’s Culture War
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
[|
---](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/JCCUsCr0u3UjyKGAodRCqQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoGjUdP0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZjMpsDdm5EFKFVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | Peter, Today’s GOP is a party obsessed with imposing right-wing cultural views on the American people -- and you can count Eric’s opponent Joe McGraw among them. McGraw was in Kewanee for a town hall last week and he:
* Pushed for looser protections on the first amendment because, “we are able to put someone away for life or execute them without motive, but in the media they have to prove motive.”
* Floated the Great Replacement Theory and claimed Democrats were behind it.
* Implied judges – and therefore lawmakers – from diverse backgrounds are expected to “behave a certain way” because of identity politics, rather than doing “the right thing.”
* Called Governor J.B. Pritzker a dictator.

Holy dog whistles, Peter. **Joe McGraw is showing us what he**** _really_****believes, and we should all take him word for it. If elected, he’s all too happy to stand on the front lines of the extreme right’s backward culture war.** [**We must stop hatred in its tracks. Consider donating $5, or any amount, today. Only this grassroots team can make sure we aren't giving air to discrimination in this swing district.**](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/OekWT99tvJ8-cPjDk63jEg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoGjUdP0TjaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEyLTIwMjQ_~) | ****[Donate](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/OekWT99tvJ8-cPjDk63jEg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoGjUdP0TjaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEyLTIwMjQ_~)****
---
Unlike McGraw, Eric keenly understands that challenges our district and region face won’t be solved by the MAGA agenda. That’s why he’s working across the aisle to bring home more affordable healthcare, safer neighborhoods, and good-paying, sustainable jobs.
At a time when Congress has been repeatedly brought to a standstill by extremists, we need more of that, and less far-right talk radio takes.
However, McGraw did say one thing that made a whole lot of sense:
_“Tell your friends all hands on deck and that it’s the most important election of your lifetime.”_
[**That’s why in the *only* competitive race in Illinois, we need YOUR support. Donate $5 to make clear to Joe McGraw that we stand together to represent us, not the divisive MAGA right.**](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/OekWT99tvJ8-cPjDk63jEg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoGjUdP0TjaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEyLTIwMjQ_~)

clean_body: ~ | | Peter, Today’s GOP is a party obsessed with imposing right-wing cultural views on the American people -- and you can count Eric’s opponent Joe McGraw among them. McGraw was in Kewanee for a town hall last week and he: Pushed for looser protections on the first amendment because, “we are able to put someone away for life or execute them without motive, but in the media they have to prove motive.” Floated the Great Replacement Theory and claimed Democrats were behind it. Implied judges – and therefore lawmakers – from diverse backgrounds are expected to “behave a certain way” because of identity politics, rather than doing “the right thing.” Called Governor J.B. Pritzker a dictator. Holy dog whistles, Peter. Joe McGraw is showing us what he reallybelieves, and we should all take him word for it. If elected, he’s all too happy to stand on the front lines of the extreme right’s backward culture war. ~ | **~ Unlike McGraw, Eric keenly understands that challenges our district and region face won’t be solved by the MAGA agenda. That’s why he’s working across the aisle to bring home more affordable healthcare, safer neighborhoods, and good-paying, sustainable jobs. At a time when Congress has been repeatedly brought to a standstill by extremists, we need more of that, and less far-right talk radio takes. However, McGraw did say one thing that made a whole lot of sense: “Tell your friends all hands on deck and that it’s the most important election of your lifetime.” ~ Thank you, Eric Sorensen HQ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:____ ~ | ~ ---|--- ~ | | ~~** | Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois. name: John Fetterman
subject: Affordable broadband for 23 million households
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Broadband internet is no longer a luxury. It’s a necessity.
#
Big news Derek:
So far more than 23 million households (including over 700,000 in PA) have received internet access through the Affordable Connectivity Program, which helps folks who otherwise couldn’t afford it get connected.
But it was a temporary program, and it expired a few days ago.
**It’s simple: when a program works, we need to keep it. So I just introduced legislation to make it permanent. 🛜**
[**If you’re on board with ensuring families across Pennsylvania and the country have affordable internet access, sign on to my petition and let’s get this bill passed.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/jf-email-broadband-internet-petition?source=em20240505&akid=8978%2E434096%2E62NHYW)
**[Add your name »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/jf-email-broadband-internet-petition?source=em20240505&akid=8978%2E434096%2E62NHYW)**
Broadband internet is no longer a luxury. It’s a necessity — for completing school work, applying to jobs, paying bills, communicating with relatives, and everything else.
But the reality is many families simply cannot afford it, and the ACP has helped close that gap.
My new legislation — the _Promoting Affordable Connectivity Act_ — would guarantee that it remains fully funded without partisan politics getting in the way.
I ran for the Senate to fight for forgotten communities and tangibly improve working people’s lives, and this bill is one more way to do just that.
**But we’re going to need to push hard to get it passed.[That’s why I’m asking you to sign on to my petition now and call on Congress to make sure everyone has access to affordable broadband internet.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/jf-email-broadband-internet-petition?source=em20240505&akid=8978%2E434096%2E62NHYW)**
Thanks,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240505-8978-footer&t=1&refcode2=8978_434096_62NHYW&akid=8978%2E434096%2E62NHYW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

That's right. Murderous. As in, they don't mind illegal aliens coming here and murdering American citizens.

So, I implore you to make a personal sacrifice and stand with me as I face a horrific barrage of demeaning and downright evil attacks and threats.

**** Hi Peter, it’s Sherrod Brown. I’m personally reaching out to ask you to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue. My team and I have set an ambitious goal to raise $350,000 before the end of the month, and right now, we're falling way short, so we need all the help we can get. | Hovde’s campaign feels like it’s straight out of an episode from the TV show, Veep.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2553%2E35263%2Eqmrvoo)
Peter — It’s no secret that Eric Hovde’s campaign got off to a rocky start. The out-of-state megamillionaire failed to mention Wisconsin in his campaign launch video. And he’s made some _unbelievable_ statements on the campaign trail, most recently saying that he doesn’t believe people in nursing homes should vote. His campaign feels like it’s straight out of an episode from the TV show, Veep. Just listen to what Rachel Maddow had to say about his recent attempt to say the Pledge of Allegiance. _Trust us, you won’t want to miss this..._ [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3728?refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AT_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2553%2E35263%2Eqmrvoo) | | [WATCH THE CLIP](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3728?refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AT_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2553%2E35263%2Eqmrvoo)

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_ballot_access_final&n=1)

Peter, The New York ballot access situation is dire. Which is why Jill recorded a special video about this specific topic and the most critical need for the campaign at this moment:

[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_ballot_access_final&n=2)

Peter, we only have 3 weeks to collect signatures in New York so that voters in all 50 states can vote for Jill in November. We know we have been sending a lot of emails asking for donations, but it’s no exaggeration to say that if we don’t raise a significant amount of money in the next few days, Jill will lose ballot access in New York. We need supporters like you to give as much as you can today. **_Step up for Jill and real democracy RIGHT NOW by sponsoring signatures for Jill’s New York ballot access:_**

body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84373738/471312798/1993095773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTE3ZGYyLTAwMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HeanL4H-Fu9I5oXmjExdpjW106w8hpotSKhjkcsOoWo=&emci=ee291daa-9209-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=70e17df2-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, This May, with an election on the horizon, we hope your spring flowers won’t be the only thing blooming! This is a critical election year — and this month is especially important with the primary coming up soon. We need all hands on deck, and enough volunteers to knock on doors and get the message out about OLCV-endorsed candidates who will take bold action on climate. [**Will you donate today to help us grow?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84373740/471312799/1993095773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTE3ZGYyLTAwMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HeanL4H-Fu9I5oXmjExdpjW106w8hpotSKhjkcsOoWo=&emci=ee291daa-9209-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=70e17df2-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=2107230)[****](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84373741/471312801/1993095773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTE3ZGYyLTAwMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HeanL4H-Fu9I5oXmjExdpjW106w8hpotSKhjkcsOoWo=&emci=ee291daa-9209-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=70e17df2-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=2107230) Leading up to an election, our staff and volunteers work hard to grow OLCV with your dollars. It’s not possible for us to expand our reach without you watering our gardens. We need to expand our reach _now_ , because the more conversations we have and doors we knock on, the closer we are to electing climate champions who will help us fight for a just and equitable climate future in Oregon. Did you know that a gift of $50 is all it takes for OLCV to recruit one new volunteer? A donation of any amount is one that keeps giving back, because this new volunteer will then be trained to recruit **3** other new volunteers. All of these volunteers will then individually speak to **50** people about our endorsed candidates. So, if we can start **3,000** conversations with just **$1,000** , that means **15,000 conservations with $5,000**. [**Water our garden now so we can bloom!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84373743/471312803/1993095773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTE3ZGYyLTAwMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HeanL4H-Fu9I5oXmjExdpjW106w8hpotSKhjkcsOoWo=&emci=ee291daa-9209-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=70e17df2-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=2107230) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84373744/471312804/1993095773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTE3ZGYyLTAwMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HeanL4H-Fu9I5oXmjExdpjW106w8hpotSKhjkcsOoWo=&emci=ee291daa-9209-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=70e17df2-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=2107230)Imagine what our garden could do with just enough water and support from all of you; imagine how many more voters we could reach if we meet our goal of $5k! Just like a garden, once we’ve planted the seed, helped it grow, this seed will then help plant other seeds that will grow, and on and on. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84373745/471312805/1993095773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTE3ZGYyLTAwMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HeanL4H-Fu9I5oXmjExdpjW106w8hpotSKhjkcsOoWo=&emci=ee291daa-9209-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=70e17df2-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=2107230)We all know how important elections are - especially this year’s - for electing the right candidates who care about environmental justice, share our values, and will fight for a safe and healthy future in Oregon.****[**Help us grow our garden today so we can continue to enjoy its flowers!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84373747/471312806/1993095773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZTE3ZGYyLTAwMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HeanL4H-Fu9I5oXmjExdpjW106w8hpotSKhjkcsOoWo=&emci=ee291daa-9209-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=70e17df2-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=2107230) Sincerely,

name: The Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: Sick of the greedy fossil fuel lobby? Read this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC,[janepac
body:
And dive into the fight with us.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84374254/471313607/1328794144?refcode=ea.2670b1a8-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.2670b1a8-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2NzBiMWE4LTAwMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XR5-obDwEeMp6ylatGnKbNZeu8tPhla6-1Qubo4p2wQ=&emci=5ff4152e-8f09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=2670b1a8-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4823105)
---
Guess what? Today marks exactly _six months_ until the November election, and we are working tirelessly to shift the political landscape away from the fossil fuel industry’s grip. In 2020 alone, the fossil fuel industry pumped a staggering $139 million into our elections. Their goal? To buy influence and prop up candidates who prioritize their profits over our environment. Big Oil thinks it can buy silence, complicity, and power. But they can't drown out our commitment to fight back. **[Can we count on your donation (of any amount) to help counter the greedy fossil fuel industry’s influence and elect strong climate champions in 2024 and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84374260/471313617/2105508926?refcode=ea.2670b1a8-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.2670b1a8-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2NzBiMWE4LTAwMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XR5-obDwEeMp6ylatGnKbNZeu8tPhla6-1Qubo4p2wQ=)** | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84374261/471313621/2105508926?refcode=ea.2670b1a8-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.2670b1a8-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2NzBiMWE4LTAwMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XR5-obDwEeMp6ylatGnKbNZeu8tPhla6-1Qubo4p2wQ=)
---
Here at Jane PAC, we approach every race with nuance and precision — focusing our energy on races that often go unnoticed but where we can make the most significant impact: **the down-ballot races.** It’s in these local arenas, from city councils and county supervisors’ boards to public utility commissions, where we can truly steer the direction of environmental policy.
We’re not just throwing our weight behind any candidate; we're strategically backing those who can genuinely turn the tide against the corporate fossil fuel agenda.
**Just look at some of our key endorsements:**
**🌍 Port of Brownsville, Texas:**
The Brownsville Navigation District Commission governs the Port of Brownsville in South Texas and plays a critical role in our environmental future. We've endorsed the "Port for All" slate here due to the imminent threat of a massive LNG project not currently covered by President Biden's environmental pause. Electing this slate could shift the board majority, leading to more stringent regulations against projects that would increase the region’s production of fossil fuels and compromise the environment and Texans’ health.
**🌍 Greg Casar, TX-35:**
A vocal advocate of progressive environmental policies, Greg Casar cosponsored the Green New Deal and advocated for limiting endless fossil fuel subsidies. His dedication to sustainable policy makes him a crucial ally in combating climate change.
**🌍 Laura Friedman, CA-30:**
In California's 30th Congressional District, Laura Friedman emerged as a frontrunner in a crowded field to replace Rep. Adam Schiff. We supported her to ensure the continuation of strong environmental advocacy in a district pivotal for progressive climate policy at the federal level.
**🌍 Salt River Project, Arizona:**
We recruited volunteers for phone banks across Arizona — ultimately helping to elect three climate champions to the SRP Board in Arizona! This election was vital to steer one of the nation’s largest public power utilities toward adopting sustainable policies.
**🌍 Summer Lee, PA-12:**
We supported Summer Lee in her victory against a pro-fracking "Oily" Democrat who primaried her last month. Her re-election is crucial for maintaining integrity and progressive values in a district that’s spent decades under the influence of the fossil fuel industry.
**🌍 California State Legislature & Big Oil Referendum:**
This year, our focus in California is two-fold: We need to replace term-limited "Oily" incumbents with true climate champions in the state legislature. Additionally, we MUST defeat a big oil-backed referendum that would reverse an important law that safeguards CA communities from oil drilling.
**🌍 Portland, Oregon City Council:**
We endorsed candidates who are committed to environmental justice, and we’re helping to shore up their grassroots donor support, so that they can qualify for Portland's new Small Donor Elections public matching program! This year is the first election under the new city charter, which means the entire city council is up for grabs in November. Our strategy maximizes our impact, fostering substantial grassroots support for transformative local candidates.
**[Now, as we count down to the November election, your support becomes even more crucial. Are you with us? Help us continue our mission to elect climate champions and boldly confront the fossil fuel industry throughout 2024 and beyond. Chip in now — let’s make these next six months count!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84374262/471313622/2105508926?refcode=ea.2670b1a8-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.2670b1a8-000b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI2NzBiMWE4LTAwMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XR5-obDwEeMp6ylatGnKbNZeu8tPhla6-1Qubo4p2wQ=)**

clean_body: And dive into the fight with us. | Guess what? Today marks exactly six months until the November election, and we are working tirelessly to shift the political landscape away from the fossil fuel industry’s grip. In 2020 alone, the fossil fuel industry pumped a staggering $139 million into our elections. Their goal? To buy influence and prop up candidates who prioritize their profits over our environment. Big Oil thinks it can buy silence, complicity, and power. But they can't drown out our commitment to fight back. = | = Here at Jane PAC, we approach every race with nuance and precision — focusing our energy on races that often go unnoticed but where we can make the most significant impact: the down-ballot races. It’s in these local arenas, from city councils and county supervisors’ boards to public utility commissions, where we can truly steer the direction of environmental policy. We’re not just throwing our weight behind any candidate; we're strategically backing those who can genuinely turn the tide against the corporate fossil fuel agenda. Just look at some of our key endorsements: 🌍 Port of Brownsville, Texas: The Brownsville Navigation District Commission governs the Port of Brownsville in South Texas and plays a critical role in our environmental future. We've endorsed the "Port for All" slate here due to the imminent threat of a massive LNG project not currently covered by President Biden's environmental pause. Electing this slate could shift the board majority, leading to more stringent regulations against projects that would increase the region’s production of fossil fuels and compromise the environment and Texans’ health. 🌍 Greg Casar, TX-35: A vocal advocate of progressive environmental policies, Greg Casar cosponsored the Green New Deal and advocated for limiting endless fossil fuel subsidies. His dedication to sustainable policy makes him a crucial ally in combating climate change. 🌍 Laura Friedman, CA-30: In California's 30th Congressional District, Laura Friedman emerged as a frontrunner in a crowded field to replace Rep. Adam Schiff. We supported her to ensure the continuation of strong environmental advocacy in a district pivotal for progressive climate policy at the federal level. 🌍 Salt River Project, Arizona: We recruited volunteers for phone banks across Arizona — ultimately helping to elect three climate champions to the SRP Board in Arizona! This election was vital to steer one of the nation’s largest public power utilities toward adopting sustainable policies. 🌍 Summer Lee, PA-12: We supported Summer Lee in her victory against a pro-fracking "Oily" Democrat who primaried her last month. Her re-election is crucial for maintaining integrity and progressive values in a district that’s spent decades under the influence of the fossil fuel industry. 🌍 California State Legislature & Big Oil Referendum: This year, our focus in California is two-fold: We need to replace term-limited "Oily" incumbents with true climate champions in the state legislature. Additionally, we MUST defeat a big oil-backed referendum that would reverse an important law that safeguards CA communities from oil drilling. 🌍 Portland, Oregon City Council: We endorsed candidates who are committed to environmental justice, and we’re helping to shore up their grassroots donor support, so that they can qualify for Portland's new Small Donor Elections public matching program! This year is the first election under the new city charter, which means the entire city council is up for grabs in November. Our strategy maximizes our impact, fostering substantial grassroots support for transformative local candidates. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = -The Jane Fonda Climate PAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC,, authorized by Campaign for a Safe and Healthy California, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

clean_body: The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. For a limited time, join for just 1¢. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Peter, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: My toughest fight yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
If we lose Nevada, we lose the Senate. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84374420/471314105/2020196845?refcode=WTEFHQ12_20240505_RosenSplit_ND_v1s1&sourceid=1053615&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDlkZjc1ZC0wMTBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yoYcvRMlUPzdQaqSVMXmVs-Jemywkq7II6rB1hOU3wE=) Peter, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically.

**I'm officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate. Now, Republicans are zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat they need to win Senate control in November. Because if we lose Nevada, the entire Senate _will_ flip to Republican control.**

I've won tough races before, but this is shaping up to be the closest race I've ever faced. GOP megadonors like the Koch network are already pouring millions into this race to defeat me, and I can't fight back alone. That's why I'm reaching out for your urgent help as I face a major fundraising gap.

**We just ran the numbers, and it looks like I need to raise at least _$30,000_ by midnight to have the resources to keep this campaign on track, pull ahead in the polls, and defend this seat —****but right now, we're way short. **

**[Please, Peter, will you split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List right now to help us turn this around before it's too late? clean_body: If we lose Nevada, we lose the Senate. | = Peter, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically. I'm officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate. Now, Republicans are zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat they need to win Senate control in November. Because if we lose Nevada, the entire Senate will flip to Republican control. I've won tough races before, but this is shaping up to be the closest race I've ever faced. GOP megadonors like the Koch network are already pouring millions into this race to defeat me, and I can't fight back alone. That's why I'm reaching out for your urgent help as I face a major fundraising gap. We just ran the numbers, and it looks like I need to raise at least $30,000 by midnight to have the resources to keep this campaign on track, pull ahead in the polls, and defend this seat —but right now, we're way short. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for doing your part to help defend Nevada and the Senate. — Jacky Rosen = EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. = = Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Peter,
Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks.
But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**
If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, **so be it.**
And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and again), **so be it.**
**I wear their enmity as a badge of honor. The insults and attacks show that they’re terrified of how effective I’ve been — and I’m not letting my foot off the gas when it comes to defending our democracy from MAGA extremists like Trump, Carlson, McCarthy, or anyone else.**
[_**Please, help me take our work to the United States Senate — the last place Trump wants me to be — by splitting a contribution between Upset the Setup and my campaign of $3 or any amount you can spare.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84375662/471316008/443154033?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240505_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmOTg0NDc1LTAzMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aeZ99Uheyw-qjDnA2SEdZHIXI5RnDA8wxwAI2E_PMjg=)

clean_body: = Peter, Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, so be it. If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, so be it. And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and again), so be it. I wear their enmity as a badge of honor. The insults and attacks show that they’re terrified of how effective I’ve been — and I’m not letting my foot off the gas when it comes to defending our democracy from MAGA extremists like Trump, Carlson, McCarthy, or anyone else. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thanks for your support. name: Letitia James
subject: I'm only asking for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84376867/471317550/-1997846888?refcode=jtk1417-fr-nd&nvep=&hmac=&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDJmZjYyMy0wNTBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IoH0srDlpaWPVnadQOg1ErmmrbJCJw_Thtt7SlTKvTs=)
---
$5.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. [**That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $5 to my campaign today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84376868/471317551/-2022193277?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=5&refcode=jtk1417-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDJmZjYyMy0wNTBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IoH0srDlpaWPVnadQOg1ErmmrbJCJw_Thtt7SlTKvTs=) – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure _real_ wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe to toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is _not_ up for sale.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. Thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – but as we continue on into 2024, I must keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $5 to help me continue my fight for progress. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84376869/471317552/-2022193277?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=5&refcode=jtk1417-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDJmZjYyMy0wNTBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IoH0srDlpaWPVnadQOg1ErmmrbJCJw_Thtt7SlTKvTs=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84376870/471317553/-2022193277?&amounts=10,15,25,50,100,500&amount=5&refcode=jtk1417-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDJmZjYyMy0wNTBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IoH0srDlpaWPVnadQOg1ErmmrbJCJw_Thtt7SlTKvTs=)
---
Thank you for all of your support.

Letitia
With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families?

Peter, I’m thrilled by the wave of union momentum.

The latest high-profile win: the United Auto Workers just scored a major victory in Tennessee, winning an organizing vote at a Volkswagen plant.

In response, corporations are spending big on specialist union-busting law firms. They’re even suing to gut the National Labor Relations Board’s ability to enforce our laws.
**
I’m a union-endorsed Democrat running for Congress to pass the PRO Act, which will hold union-busters accountable and protect workers who are organizing for better pay and safer working conditions.
****
[Stand with our campaign and sign the petition: PASS the PRO Act now!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39N0rQdUDfGha5MKRKNLqrfF21k9vvDn0Q04kaW2ef5SaPizITK_AU9L5B28HR-ll61uu7yltClR0n51N1lkzXHsERASQ02cIQqfvxueDGbAejTorJK3TIBj5PwVAd4g0CdjQjF6qX9PNHKZiVebBXSpAqgmEWS7EoHJ3JZr9-NaPV0hr17Hv--VW2-KZRF8mKcF03dfmS7YP8Jx96HYtMZh1METanUrUkkCxNoV4HK-aGXgddLwPRGBjsHksG9crqhlS8_2JKNgzklHXNMElFx_EinTe2S39UDXXzD4iZ5vOSCQ83Y6S4HrvgoxP7th2nKjDIL-3aEm0AGwqO0Vvjm1-S8N_FRbabDCSSpWdx7BGBkYr3R6NBlDPK9V7sv73zoCVRWbAJ9scBirUAFUTjytbexJCe2BhIPRI_enqjH4HQEXvPC_3Xv2wV-_qRVAgqeXcuzvD1ST9Nc-RjiQ2zNQkuAk07qF_TGT9ZruZXfBXXPdZCjZfEwaDERIQqF0bEu3TJfZyR2ex7mLziteAN5yTkWntY7I_ze1BxA0nVG5A/463/XxVfBl-dT9yXBCEKYahw9w/h1/h001.2kCOpuNZC3xI2btJIGfcWF1pURzGQC43dlti8uyMzwM)
**
Defeating union-busting pressure tactics and winning an organizing vote is just the beginning of a long journey to a fair contract.

Starbucks is finally coming back to the bargaining table after simply ignoring Starbucks Workers United, as workers continued toiling without a contract.
**
The PRO Act would accelerate bargaining for the first contract, establishing a process for arbitration and mediation.
**
But to pass it, we need to take back the House. Will you stand with our union-endorsed campaign today?
**
[Sign the petition: pass the PRO Act now!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39N0rQdUDfGha5MKRKNLqrfF21k9vvDn0Q04kaW2ef5SaPizITK_AU9L5B28HR-ll61uu7yltClR0n51N1lkzXHsERASQ02cIQqfvxueDGbAejTorJK3TIBj5PwVAd4g0CdjQjF6qX9PNHKZiVebBXSpAqgmEWS7EoHJ3JZr9-NaPV0hr17Hv--VW2-KZRF8mKcF03dfmS7YP8Jx96HYtMZh1METanUrUkkCxNoV4HK-aGXgddLwPRGBjsHksG9crqhlS8_2JKNgzklHXNMElFx_EinTe2S39UDXXzD4iZ5vOSCQ83Y6S4HrvgoxP7th2nKjDIL-3aEm0AGwqO0Vvjmdcbu37HpOHahjKez3u6Pp2l48Qos1ymLslkxhRT_WDOXB05AVimERRpgSrzdkRbbmETz20UetDSPxuxtpmQDJmzhb0TJfi6j2gDxz18CrlTyz7K8SrRo_4iywG_3BuaZ0ppmTwwwG6hfAzuAOLmwDxoeM7QTAwCH6F5dFcWqR0qbvNbVFMpwlz_FN8tyRDCxvBXiahYBbbm-rCnVUQ1TkA/463/XxVfBl-dT9yXBCEKYahw9w/h2/h001.2jEiiBabAXIn2NYgR9pQOVTK3j2Jr3nXdB64msp-cbo)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Why is this so important to us?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
We are fighting for the Veterans who have endured decades of endless war.
#
Derek,
This election is the most important in modern American history, not just for what can happen during the next four years but for how it will impact generations to come.
Here's why this fight is so important to us.
**We are fighting for the Veterans who have endured decades of endless war** , both so they can get the care they deserve for the rest of their lives without it being privatized, and also to make sure we do not repeat the mistakes of the past.
**We are fighting for the freedoms many of us signed up to defend overseas.** No Veteran should come home from Iraq, Afghanistan or anywhere else with fewer rights than they left with.
**We are fighting because this country deserves a leader who respects our democracy,** not one who is willing to divide our country and tear it to pieces for a bit of power.
**There is no doubt, our kids, grandkids and their kids will all look back at this time and either be thankful for how we met the moment, or wonder how we got it so wrong.**
We are ready for this moment, but we asking you to join us so you can say the same:
[**VoteVets is one of the largest spending and most effective outside spending organizations for Democrats. Power our efforts in the election ahead with a $5, $25, $100 donation (or more).**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-may24.RUuZX0&refcode=em240505-1-30&t=1&akid=25091%2E3013755%2Ejprevt)

Hey there — I hope you’re enjoying your Sunday! Today officially marks six months to Election Day, and trust me, it’ll be here before we know it. I wanted to reach out personally this afternoon to share with you the importance of consistent, grassroots contributions. You see, folks, one of the things I’m most proud of is how strong our grassroots team is. We raised close to **$50,000** last month and **nearly 90%** of that came from grassroots contributions — people pitching $5 here and $10 there to power this campaign. **[So I have a bit of a different question for you today: Will you join our base of monthly supporters by pitching in a few bucks monthly?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84379258/471320474/-1858169296?recurring=6&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjZjZlZS0wNzBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMFPWjXZw4Z2at5OD5fb9rOIjZEuExcop7h6n0uF4z0=)** | [MAKE A MONTHLY CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84379260/471320478/-1858169296?recurring=6&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTZjZjZlZS0wNzBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMFPWjXZw4Z2at5OD5fb9rOIjZEuExcop7h6n0uF4z0=)

We raised close to $50,000 last month and nearly 90% of that came from grassroots contributions — people pitching $5 here and $10 there to power this campaign. = | = A strong base of recurring supporters is vital to ensuring that our volunteers have the resources they need to reach voters across the district. One-time contributions help us meet big moments or major deadlines like end-of-quarter, but recurring support helps us keep the trains moving. I was talking with our finance team, our monthly recurring support could use a boost. Only about 4% of our support each month comes from recurring grassroots donors. = = Thanks in advance for your support, friend. — Nikki = | **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

**Let’s be real - If you’re well-liked in the swamp, something is wrong.**

Senator Rick Scott didn’t come to Washington to make friends and bump elbows, he came to deliver conservative results for our country.

Sen. Scott is up for re-election, and I fear he may lose if we don’t step up. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84379945/471321493/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2U5MmM1MS0wOTBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6j-iftPqv2aSeOHI6pejWOLf-zPFOu8bY-bJDB77CoY=&emci=7cd9f03d-8009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=8ce92c51-090b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=15820338)

Peter, this year's Women's Health Month feels different.

At a time when we should be advocating for better care for women across the country, we're seeing women's reproductive rights being attacked at every turn.

From Alabama to Arizona to Florida, Republicans are doing everything they can to strip access to women's healthcare. We're seeing doctors avoid emergency care for pregnant women for fear of criminal prosecution. We're seeing women cross state lines to access the abortion care they need. And we're seeing critical in vitro fertilization (IVF) treatments stall due to murky laws made by Republicans with the sole purpose of causing confusion and distrust within the healthcare community. **It's more clear than ever that extreme politicians don't care about the rights and health of women.**

This month is a reminder that we should always be pushing for better access to women's reproductive care. And that's exactly what Kim is fighting for.

Kim will always stand firm in the fight for women to have access to the care they need when they need it. But she needs you to stand with her.

**[Can we count on you to add your name to our petition and stand with Kim against any GOP efforts to slash our healthcare and the rights of women everywhere?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84379950/471321501/-696929223?ms=em24_240505_whdpet_engg_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em24_240505_whdpet_engg_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em24_240505_whdpet_engg_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240505_whdpet_engg_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=HWdbuy/zQeXADeRDF9OOBDJLZ3appLjAd4uB9DXQQ6XsFnGKxdJRzmaE2ATMhTCLnGNRI19wNXeT4IoJjTYK6uFMOMkx9JRYNIICI0mdB+w9RiQgOV1pFrxzDcQvq4/Xeyj5lfhNTh/Yi5xsz0F7cRJIR8A7fTX/nxicDFjVTBM=&refcode2=8ce92c51-090b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2U5MmM1MS0wOTBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6j-iftPqv2aSeOHI6pejWOLf-zPFOu8bY-bJDB77CoY=&emci=7cd9f03d-8009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=8ce92c51-090b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=15820338)**

But my team just let me know that we didn’t reach our fundraising goal in April and we need to catch up this month. Our campaign is completely people-powered, as I'm not taking corporate PAC money , so I’m relying on supporters like you now more than ever to help us get back on track. Our country deserves better than MAGA extremist David Schweikert, and this is a winnable seat! Experts at the Cook Political Report and Sabato’s Crystal Ball have rated our race a TOSS-UP , and Roll Call has called AZ-01 a "key race." We need all hands on deck to defeat David Schweikert and, with your help, we can make that happen. Can one race could literally decide the future of our country as we fight to take back the People's House! | | | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, Kurt * | | = Paid for by Kroemer for Congress Kroemer for Congress PO Box 9413 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States | | ---|--- = = Email communication is a crucial part of our campaign, but if you no longer wish to receive emails about how you can be a part of the movement to defeat Republican David Schweikert, please

name: Dick Durbin
subject: It'll be here and gone like that 🫰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

**Donald Trump poses a serious threat to our country, even bigger than when he was first elected president.** He has sat behind the desk of the Oval Office, he's pushed and tested the limits of the presidency, and he's ready to enact one of the most draconian agendas in our history.
On the other hand, we have in President Biden a man who has been tried and tested, one of the most productive leaders in our history, and has fought to uplift every American.
Even as pundits counted President Biden out, he set his sights high and accomplished so much of his agenda in his first four years. Now, it's on us to give him four more so he can get the job done. And Peter, he'll need a Democratic Senate by his side to help him get it done.

That's according to an Emerson College/The Hill poll released this week - confirming that this key swing-state governorship is a TOTAL TOSS-UP. North Carolina voters need to know that raging antisemite Mark Robinson called the Holocaust "foolishness ... hogwash" and declared that he was "sick of seeing and hearing people still talk about the Nazis." On Monday, May 6 - Holocaust Day of Remembrance - we're running a TV and digital ad exposing Robinson's Holocaust denial in his own words. What we raise this weekend will determine whether we go statewide, or target only certain cities. Every $70 we raise means approximately 2,000 voters will see the ad. **FROM THE DESK OF** **DONALD J. TRUMP**
Fellow American, do you have a few minutes to talk?

name: Bob Casey
subject: 6 months out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2891%2E552475%2EmT8-6z)
We’re just 6 months out from Election Day, Peter, and if you’ve been waiting for the opportunity to make your first donation to my re-election campaign, it’s now.
Let me explain why, but if you don’t need an explanation, you can chip in here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240505-1?refcode=em20240505-1**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240505-1?refcode=em20240505-1&refcode2=2891_552475_mT8-6z&akid=2891%2E552475%2EmT8-6z)
Your donation _today_ will make a bigger impact than it will in a month or even a week from now because building a winning campaign requires careful planning and budgeting -- two things we can’t do effectively without getting grassroots support in the door right now.
To win in a battleground like Pennsylvania -- which has been described as the “swingiest of swing states” -- we have to invest early. We can’t win if we wait until Election Day to rebut Republican smears or reach out to voters across the Commonwealth.
That’s why we’re not waiting. My team is already putting in the work, but we need your help to keep going.
[**If you can give $5 to keep our ads on the air, or $5 to fight back against my opponent and his billionaire backers, or $5 to help my team reach voters across the Commonwealth, please do so today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240505-1?refcode=em20240505-1&refcode2=2891_552475_mT8-6z&akid=2891%2E552475%2EmT8-6z)
This race is going to be one of the most competitive and expensive on the map, but I know that if we work together now, we’ll win in November.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2891%2E552475%2EmT8-6z)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2891%2E552475%2EmT8-6z)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

body:

subject: A letter from Dianne Black
body:
Hello from the winner of the only contested Democratic primary on 3/12/24 in Mississippi: Dianne Black. My Volunteer Campaign Manager, Kelly Jacobs, and I are designating the month of May as “May I please have a donation for my campaign for US House of Representatives month?” Neither of
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/acOyna3tp/c?w=wwTFO4NpJvZxPC0q0vBXxODG7FOUc0b-QcIl7O98hZo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2FjT3luYTN0cD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImQ0ODdlYmZmLWQ3ZjUtNGFlYi1hZGIzLTFhZmNkMzc1NTliZiJ9)_**

|
---
| | Hello from Dianne Black
---
| | Hello from the winner of the only contested Democratic primary on 3/12/24 in Mississippi: Dianne Black. My Volunteer Campaign Manager, Kelly Jacobs, and I are designating the month of May as “May I please have a donation for my campaign for US House of Representatives month?” Neither of us feel comfortable asking for funds, but we need to raise $35,000 so we can invest in digital and radio advertisements for my campaign. May I please have a donation for my campaign? We need donations to get out the vote up and down our Mississippi ballots in the 21 counties that comprise Mississippi’s 1st Congressional District. It’s a tough district; former Attorney General Jim Hood failed to win this district and so did Brandon Presley when he ran for governor in 2023, even though they both live in the 1st CD. Mississippi is red, especially the 1st District, but we still need Democratic candidates to run for office to build our list of registered voters and in 2024 to help Joe Biden, Ty Pinkins and me along with everyone else on the down-ballot to win their elections. I am writing to ask you to please help Northern Mississippi Democrats get out the vote by making a donation to Friends of Dianne Black for US Congress. Yes, this is a difficult race, but achievable. I am the only female Democrat on the ballot which means WE have a chance to win (and also that it will be harder for me to raise money than men). My opponent, an incumbent extremist MAGA Republican, has no voting record of any achievements he has supported for the people of Mississippi to run on for his past two years in office. That should count for more votes for Democrats, right? May I please have a donation for my campaign? The [progressive Democratic agenda/party platform](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/acOyna3tp/c?w=aJmXEJMJGSpZ4mPoVvwTMEibBrpfm3UkndgD34zJqC8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kZW1vY3JhdHMub3JnL3doZXJlLXdlLXN0YW5kL3BhcnR5LXBsYXRmb3JtLyIsInIiOiJjMTIzODU2ZC0xNDQ1LTQ2MmMtYTdlNi05Y2ZmYjVlMjRiNmIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJkNDg3ZWJmZi1kN2Y1LTRhZWItYWRiMy0xYWZjZDM3NTU5YmYifQ) has all kinds of ideas on what to do to restore Roe, address climate change, control guns of war, fully fund education and much more. If elected, I’ll be voting yes on Democratic policies that we support along with guidance from Speaker Jeffries and Mississippi’s Congressman Bennie G. Thompson and then signed by our re-elected President Joe Biden. Raising funds from you and others would allow our campaign to create sample ballots which we have found are a trusted way to get out the vote. We accept checks, CashApp or ActBlue.
* Send a check to: Friends of Dianne Black, PO Box 612, Olive Branch, MS 38654
* Cash App $dianneblackcongress (add your information, name, address, and place of employment for FED reporting purposes).
* Donate to Dianne Black using ActBlue, the Democrat Party’s official donation website at [www.actblue.com/donate/dblk](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/acOyna3tp/c?w=ZdQN9Uhal7Wg4VRhYS2jg6Ee7X5jqDSpZ-fP8c2xkLc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2RibGsiLCJyIjoiYzEyMzg1NmQtMTQ0NS00NjJjLWE3ZTYtOWNmZmI1ZTI0YjZiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZDQ4N2ViZmYtZDdmNS00YWViLWFkYjMtMWFmY2QzNzU1OWJmIn0)

Thank you for helping us raise needed funds and making May a successful month so we can plan our GOTV spending strategy which will help President Biden and Ty Pinkins. Sincerely, Dianne Black, nominee for US Representative
---

Friends,
Yesterday, our campaign manager Andrea sent you a first look at our new TV and digital ad. She also explained we’re facing a small budget gap to ensure we can keep airing this ad to key Democratic primary voters. Can you rush a donation to help us reach this important goal so we can reach the voters we need to win this primary election?

subject: waiting for your input on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Your response is crucial for our Q2 strategy
| | |
---
Friend — Debbie here.
I'm in this race because with so much at stake this fall — from abortions to gun safety to democracy itself — Florida deserves better than power-hungry extremists like Rick Scott.
Unlike him, hardworking people like _you_ are at the heart of my campaign. **So as we enter the second quarter of the election year, I __ need to know what's on your mind, what keeps you up at night, and which issues I should focus on the most. **
**_[Will you please share them on my Q2 Strategy Survey today? Your insight as a grassroots supporter is key to my success in this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84385149/471331322/843202167?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1183-su-nd&refcode=jtk1183-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTMyNTAyNTEtMTAwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UIqLF7VUGhkb07UWv-Ap4hwtnDSdRqahQ5GGTZ70MiU=&emci=c39552d6-7409-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=13250251-100b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=3969733)_**
| | [Take the Survey Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84385150/471331323/843202167?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1183-su-nd&refcode=jtk1183-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTMyNTAyNTEtMTAwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UIqLF7VUGhkb07UWv-Ap4hwtnDSdRqahQ5GGTZ70MiU=&emci=c39552d6-7409-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=13250251-100b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=3969733)
---
I’ve watched as a loud, angry minority pushed Florida down a path of hatred and division while chipping away at our most precious democratic rights, values, and institutions.
Extremists like Rick Scott and Ron DeSantis are at the center of the GOP's nationwide attack on abortion rights and personal freedoms, programs that level the playing field for the underprivileged, protections from both natural disasters and man-made ones like gun violence, and _anyone_ who dares to disagree with them.
_**Ya no más —** _**enough is enough**. I refuse to stand by and watch any longer. I'm committed to fighting back. _And I know I'm not alone._
**With you alongside me, we can fight back against their extremism and build a kinder, safer, and smarter future for our children together.** **And as we iron out our Q2 campaign strategy, your input is __ uniquely __ valuable. So p****lease, friend: _[Will you speak up on my survey by 11:59 p.m. to help me build a strategy strong enough to flip Florida blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84385151/471331324/843202167?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1183-su-nd&refcode=jtk1183-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTMyNTAyNTEtMTAwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UIqLF7VUGhkb07UWv-Ap4hwtnDSdRqahQ5GGTZ70MiU=&emci=c39552d6-7409-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=13250251-100b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=3969733)_**
| | [Take the Survey Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84385152/471331325/843202167?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1183-su-nd&refcode=jtk1183-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTMyNTAyNTEtMTAwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UIqLF7VUGhkb07UWv-Ap4hwtnDSdRqahQ5GGTZ70MiU=&emci=c39552d6-7409-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=13250251-100b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=3969733)
---
I can't do this without you. Thank you,

Debbie
|

name: DLCC Headquarters
subject: Can you imagine?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
Far-right candidate Mark Robinson won the GOP nomination for NC governor, and he’s dead-set on upholding the GOP’s supermajority and passing an extreme agenda that would irreversibly harm the state. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Imagine living in a state where your rights are suddenly stripped away.** Where extreme policies attack your quality of life, freedom, and justice. It's not exactly a fairytale, is it? Well, this isn’t a hypothetical scenario – it’s a _real threat_ for North Carolinians. Far-right candidate Mark Robinson just won the GOP nomination for governor, **and he’s dead-set on upholding the GOP’s supermajority and passing an extreme agenda that would irreversibly harm the state.**
* He’s called the LGBTQ+ community “filth.”
* He threatened to use his AR-15 against the government if it _“gets too big for its britches.”_
* He wants to outlaw all abortion and return to a time when women couldn’t vote.

**This cycle, dismantling Republican supermajorities isn’t just a political strategy – it’s a crucial fight to protect people in states like North Carolina against right-wing candidates like Robinson and unchecked GOP power.** [Without your support, extremists could impose a far-right agenda in places like North Carolina that could ripple across the entire country. clean_body: Far-right candidate Mark Robinson won the GOP nomination for NC governor, and he’s dead-set on upholding the GOP’s supermajority and passing an extreme agenda that would irreversibly harm the state. | | | | | ---|--- Imagine living in a state where your rights are suddenly stripped away. Where extreme policies attack your quality of life, freedom, and justice. It's not exactly a fairytale, is it? Well, this isn’t a hypothetical scenario – it’s a real threat for North Carolinians. Far-right candidate Mark Robinson just won the GOP nomination for governor, and he’s dead-set on upholding the GOP’s supermajority and passing an extreme agenda that would irreversibly harm the state. He’s called the LGBTQ+ community “filth.” He threatened to use his AR-15 against the government if it “gets too big for its britches.” He wants to outlaw all abortion and return to a time when women couldn’t vote. This cycle, dismantling Republican supermajorities isn’t just a political strategy – it’s a crucial fight to protect people in states like North Carolina against right-wing candidates like Robinson and unchecked GOP power. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC ** | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: MOLLY WON!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’ve got some really good news for you today.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240505-2&t=1&akid=652%2E587540%2E5r7_zM)
Hey Peter, we have an urgent update about one of our endorsed candidates, **Molly Cook**.
The votes have been tallied: **Molly Cook won her special election!!!!!!**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240505-2?refcode=em20240505-2&amount=5&refcode2=652_587540_5r7_zM&akid=652%2E587540%2E5r7_zM)
**Peter, we could not have made this happen without your support.**
Molly’s win is HUGE for her campaign to fill the seat again in November. Voters will get to see Molly in action _immediately_.
**From day one, Molly will fight like hell** to reclaim abortion rights and pass common sense firearm safety regulations to keep our schools and our communities safe. **We just have to get her *reelected* come November!**
**Peter, Molly’s win is evidence that we can elect every one of our endorsed candidates with the right amount of support behind us.[Will you contribute $5 to celebrate today’s win and help us replicate it for every endorsed Leaders We Deserve candidate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240505-2?refcode=em20240505-2&amount=5&refcode2=652_587540_5r7_zM&akid=652%2E587540%2E5r7_zM)**

Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve

subject: Have you seen the latest news out of Louisiana?

body:
We need your help to uphold fairness.
|
---

**Team: You may have seen recent headlines about Trump-appointed judges striking down a new, more representative congressional map for Louisiana.**
**But you should also know that the fair maps movement is fighting back.** Louisianans are appealing this decision to the Supreme Court to preserve voting rights and representation for Black communities. And at All On The Line, we’ll keep organizing and advocating for a democracy that lifts up every voice. But we need your help.
[**Can you rush us a donation now to fuel our fight against gerrymandering and help protect new and improved maps across the country from attacks like the ones we face in Louisiana?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84385369/471332459/-178066241?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_mayfun_email_20240505-AOTL-LARR-Olivia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlMTQ3N2I1LTExMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iMtZ3DpK6p6agYTZ5JDJy6Xtl9mIOGXNIbd3Es3qERU=)

The new congressional map in Louisiana represents a huge step forward for giving every voter an equal say in who represents them, and would help balance the scales that have long been tipped against Black voters. Rejecting a representative map would be a big setback for our fair elections, and a big win for anti-democracy extremists.
We will continue to push back against attempts to corrupt the democratic process. And if we all do our part, we have a fighting chance to win — for Louisianans, and for all Americans.

clean_body: We need your help to uphold fairness. | Team: You may have seen recent headlines about Trump-appointed judges striking down a new, more representative congressional map for Louisiana. But you should also know that the fair maps movement is fighting back. Louisianans are appealing this decision to the Supreme Court to preserve voting rights and representation for Black communities. And at All On The Line, we’ll keep organizing and advocating for a democracy that lifts up every voice. But we need your help. = = The new congressional map in Louisiana represents a huge step forward for giving every voter an equal say in who represents them, and would help balance the scales that have long been tipped against Black voters. Rejecting a representative map would be a big setback for our fair elections, and a big win for anti-democracy extremists. We will continue to push back against attempts to corrupt the democratic process. And if we all do our part, we have a fighting chance to win — for Louisianans, and for all Americans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks for your vigilance, team. — Olivia Olivia Mendoza Director of Litigation and Policy All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600, Washington, D.C. 20005 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

body:
& other reasons Marsha Blackburn deserves the boot

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84385992/471334191/-849459103?refcode=ea.94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDUwMjM2OS0xMjBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DL0rvLzM29UxV67ne_KjNjX17v-W6Wv1GVMwxX0bUA=&emci=7f05b6a8-6309-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=46764483)
---
Folks — The pundits and the naysayers are quick to count me out. They say Tennessee is a “red state” and that’s that. **But here’s what I know: Marsha Blackburn may have an “R” next to her name on the ballot, but this isn’t your granddad’s Republican Party.** Marsha has gone so far off the rails — prioritizing corporate PACs and special-interest donors over the hardworking folks in Tennessee. Not to mention, her dangerous stances on everything from abortion access to protecting communities from gun violence are out of touch and extreme. Frankly, voters are sick of it. And I’m sick of it. **That’s why my campaign is building a multi-racial, multi-generational, multi-party coalition to bring real change to our state and send a Senator to Washington who actually gives a damn.** _We’ve seen grassroots donations come in from every county in Tennessee and every state in the country!_ But, Marsha has over $8 million in cash to spend against us, and we need more resources to build a winning coalition and show the naysers the strength of this grassroots movement. **_[So I’ll be completely honest: If you’re only going to donate once to our campaign, now is the time to do it. Will you make your first contribution today to give Marsha the boot?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84385993/471334192/209297649?refcode=ea.94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDUwMjM2OS0xMjBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DL0rvLzM29UxV67ne_KjNjX17v-W6Wv1GVMwxX0bUA=)_** Thank you for believing in this movement as much as I do. \- Gloria [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84385994/471334193/209297649?refcode=ea.94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDUwMjM2OS0xMjBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DL0rvLzM29UxV67ne_KjNjX17v-W6Wv1GVMwxX0bUA=)
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84385995/471334194/209297649?refcode=ea.94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDUwMjM2OS0xMjBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DL0rvLzM29UxV67ne_KjNjX17v-W6Wv1GVMwxX0bUA=) Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

[There’s a movement afoot for change — join us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84385997/471334196/-849459103?refcode=ea.94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDUwMjM2OS0xMjBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DL0rvLzM29UxV67ne_KjNjX17v-W6Wv1GVMwxX0bUA=&emci=7f05b6a8-6309-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=46764483) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84385998/471334197/209297649?amount=25&refcode=ea.94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.94502369-120b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDUwMjM2OS0xMjBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DL0rvLzM29UxV67ne_KjNjX17v-W6Wv1GVMwxX0bUA=)

clean_body: & other reasons Marsha Blackburn deserves the boot | Folks — The pundits and the naysayers are quick to count me out. They say Tennessee is a “red state” and that’s that. But here’s what I know: Marsha Blackburn may have an “R” next to her name on the ballot, but this isn’t your granddad’s Republican Party. Marsha has gone so far off the rails — prioritizing corporate PACs and special-interest donors over the hardworking folks in Tennessee. Not to mention, her dangerous stances on everything from abortion access to protecting communities from gun violence are out of touch and extreme. Frankly, voters are sick of it. And I’m sick of it. That’s why my campaign is building a multi-racial, multi-generational, multi-party coalition to bring real change to our state and send a Senator to Washington who actually gives a damn. We’ve seen grassroots donations come in from every county in Tennessee and every state in the country! But, Marsha has over $8 million in cash to spend against us, and we need more resources to build a winning coalition and show the naysers the strength of this grassroots movement. = Thank you for believing in this movement as much as I do. \- Gloria = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Team Swalwell
subject: Is anyone rooting for this guy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Trump can’t even catch the support of those who worked closest with him in the White House |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84386353/471335480/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDM4ZDlhNy0xMzBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MqnfDliF7f_h1sccrsKpPvhN6frTm2_FNxyQCkH5gks=&emci=08fbd69c-7609-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=fd38d9a7-130b-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=7878003)
Friend, We’ve seen many people turn on Trump (rightfully so) over the past couple of years. **It’s almost as if the ones who worked closest to the former failure-in-chief are the ones sounding the loudest alarm!** Another former White House aide under Mark Meadows, _**Cassidy Hutchinson, spoke about being open to voting for Biden this November.**_ Add her name to the list of people from the Trump camp who have turned their back on him!
| [STOP MAGA »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84386354/471335481/1496393311?&refcode=E8319-20240405-WhiteHouseAide-SB-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDM4ZDlhNy0xMzBiLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MqnfDliF7f_h1sccrsKpPvhN6frTm2_FNxyQCkH5gks=)

Look, we have to wonder: Who’s even on this guy's side anymore? But former elected officials speaking out against Trump won’t do much to shake his base. In fact, we know it only adds to their rage over the “liberal witch hunt” that's after him. _**Our only way to beat Trump this November is at the ballot box, with grassroots supporters like you on our side.**_

Friend, We’ve seen many people turn on Trump (rightfully so) over the past couple of years. It’s almost as if the ones who worked closest to the former failure-in-chief are the ones sounding the loudest alarm! Another former White House aide under Mark Meadows, Cassidy Hutchinson, spoke about being open to voting for Biden this November. Add her name to the list of people from the Trump camp who have turned their back on him! | = Look, we have to wonder: Who’s even on this guy's side anymore? But former elected officials speaking out against Trump won’t do much to shake his base. In fact, we know it only adds to their rage over the “liberal witch hunt” that's after him.
