name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: a dark day for the Sunshine State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend , it's with a heavy heart I’m reaching out to tell you that as of May 1, 2024, reproductive rights are effectively gone in Florida.
When the Florida Supreme Court upheld Ron DeSantis' already-unconstitutional 15-week ban last month, they gave the green light for his even worse six-week trigger ban to take effect.
Even when 1 in 3 people only find out they're pregnant after six weeks have already passed.
Even when there are almost no exceptions for rape and incest.
Even when 75% of Florida voters oppose such extreme measures.
We haven't even gone a full day under this law, but one day is too many. And I know I'm not the only one who thinks so: abortion is a winning issue, and we've seen it in every election, red state or blue, since Roe v. Wade was overturned.
So this is not the end of our fight for abortion rights. It's just the beginning.
We can save our pro-choice Senate majority and codify reproductive freedom nationwide, but it starts with kicking out extremists standing in the way, like Sen. Rick Scott. I'm fighting every day to defeat him, but I need your help to reach my emergency $100,000 goal and win. Will you split $15 between my campaign and Serve America before midnight tonight to help me flip Florida blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Look, friend: This ban has ripped away my rights, the rights of my two daughters, and the rights of millions of women who will be put in danger across our state.
And just so we're clear: It's all because of the Supreme Court that Donald Trump built, and the Senators who allowed him to appoint the anti-abortion extremists who went on to reverse the protections of Roe.
Senators like Rick Scott, who proudly says that, were he still governor of Florida, he would've signed that extreme six-week ban.
He's been living in a bubble of far-right extremists. He refuses to accept that the tides are turning in Florida, or that everyday families simply do not support his toxic, anti-choice agenda. That's why I'm running to retire him.
If I make it to the Senate, I'll do everything I can to pass legislation that reinstates abortion rights nationwide. But my opponent is a mega-millionaire who can and will spend practically anything to bankroll his attack ads and drown us out.
I need your grassroots support today because without it, I simply won't make it to the Senate. So please, if you're with me in the fight for our freedoms and against extremist, out-of-touch politicians desperate to control us, will you rush $15 — split between my campaign and Serve America — before midnight to help me make reproductive rights the law of the land once more? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Together, we will win.
Thank you,
Debbie
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84386558/471336367/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE4NTdhYjYtMTUwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I5AWc6diJdmI3hxz3xvb5Ez6UhH8sECyO3O68xtDubk=)
---
Hey there, folks — hope you’re enjoying your weekend. I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but we’re exactly _six months_ away from the November election, so I can’t miss the opportunity to ask [**if you’re able to commit to a monthly recurring grassroots contribution before the day is over.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84386559/471336368/1510686721?recurring=6&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE4NTdhYjYtMTUwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I5AWc6diJdmI3hxz3xvb5Ez6UhH8sECyO3O68xtDubk=) | [MAKE A MONTHLY CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84386560/471336369/1510686721?recurring=6&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE4NTdhYjYtMTUwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I5AWc6diJdmI3hxz3xvb5Ez6UhH8sECyO3O68xtDubk=)
---
If you have a minute, here’s why a few bucks a month could make a sizable difference in how we’re able to mobilize voters across Arizona.
If you step up right now and commit to $3 for the next six months, you’d have invested $18 by election night.
Still doesn’t seem like much? Well if you multiply that by everyone reading this email right now, our team would be**$347,868 stronger by Election Day.** Grassroots contributions truly do power our work to reach voters in every corner of Arizona.
Regular grassroots contributions allow us to host events from Casa Grande to Kingman (and everywhere in between), help us provide yard signs, buttons, and stickers for our supporters, and ensure that our volunteers have the tools they need to reach voters for the next six months.
[**If you have any room in your monthly budget to pitch in a few bucks to our team, it’ll go a long way to helping us build power Glendale.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84386561/471336370/1510686721?recurring=6&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE4NTdhYjYtMTUwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I5AWc6diJdmI3hxz3xvb5Ez6UhH8sECyO3O68xtDubk=)
[MAKE A MONTHLY CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84386562/471336371/1510686721?recurring=6&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE4NTdhYjYtMTUwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=I5AWc6diJdmI3hxz3xvb5Ez6UhH8sECyO3O68xtDubk=)

Thanks for everything, friend.
— Benjamin Nelson, Finance Director
Arizona Democratic Party

Regular grassroots contributions allow us to host events from Casa Grande to Kingman (and everywhere in between), help us provide yard signs, buttons, and stickers for our supporters, and ensure that our volunteers have the tools they need to reach voters for the next six months. = = Thanks for everything, friend. — Benjamin Nelson, Finance Director Arizona Democratic Party = P.S.: If now isn’t the best time to begin a monthly gift, we understand and appreciate your support and whatever level you’re willing to give today. = Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. RICK MCGUIRE, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. Here’s what’s on the line: • Janelle JUST won her primary election, which means Janelle will face off against MAGA insurrectionist Scott Perry in November. • Scott Perry has a war chest, backed by far-right special interest groups and millions of dark money dollars • We need to close the gap if we want to flip this seat blue, and fire an abortion ban-supporting, January 6th-planning, MAGA extremist who has been in office for 10 years too long. | | [HELP US FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84387135/471338179/-1176167507?source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_050524_1_2_OTL_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmU3YjAzNGQtMTcwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D6pvu2etdgfqMfyo4fwbG3l3suER2XuA800x2HTRuEk=)

• Scott Perry only had $500K in the bank at last count.
• We’ve set a fundraising goal of $250k to reach by the end of the month to cut his fundraising in half and show Scott Perry how strong we are.
• If we reach our goal, we can knock on more doors, print more yard signs, buy more TV ad spots, and spread our pro-choice, pro-democracy message to every corner of Central Pennsylvania.
• But if we want to defeat insurrectionist Perry we need the help of grassroots supporters like you to keep our momentum going.
[So, team: Now that you know what’s on the line and our plan to keep up with Perry’s dark money-filled war chest, can you contribute $10 right now to support Janelle today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84387138/471338182/-1176167507?amount=10&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_050524_1_2_OTL_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmU3YjAzNGQtMTcwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D6pvu2etdgfqMfyo4fwbG3l3suER2XuA800x2HTRuEk=)

clean_body: Fill out our official May priorities survey to let us know what’s on your mind. | Hi friend, | We’ve accomplished so much in Michigan, and now, I’m working to take our movement nationwide by electing Democrats who share our values. It’s no small task, and it’ll take even more people joining us to defeat Trump Republicans, protect our fundamental rights, and win this fall. So I’m reaching out to ask all of our supporters to share more about what issues you care about the most. We know what it takes to build a winning movement, and it starts by making sure we’re talking about the issues you most care about. Our country is at its best when we stand up and work together to defend what is right. Thank you for supporting this movement. — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

Peter: **Midnight tonight.** We’re only hours away from our April FEC deadline at midnight tonight, and some rather bad news just hit: Joe Biden is trailing in a number of national and battleground state polls. We’re running out of time to catch up. We’re running out of time to raise the resources we need to defend Joe from the MILLIONS of dollars being raised by Donald Trump from his billionaire donors and extreme MAGA base. **60 seconds.** You can make your first contribution to Joe Biden in less than 60 seconds. clean_body: We’re running out of time. | | | Peter: Midnight tonight. We’re only hours away from our April FEC deadline at midnight tonight, and some rather bad news just hit: Joe Biden is trailing in a number of national and battleground state polls. We’re running out of time to catch up. We’re running out of time to raise the resources we need to defend Joe from the MILLIONS of dollars being raised by Donald Trump from his billionaire donors and extreme MAGA base. 60 seconds. You can make your first contribution to Joe Biden in less than 60 seconds. Even a quick donation of $5 is enough to help keep Joe and Kamala in this fight. And with only hours left before our midnight deadline, NOW is the best time to rush your support. It might not seem like $5 will make the difference, but if everyone reading this email pitches in what they can, we’ll be able to go toe-to-toe with Donald Trump every step of the way. So, please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for your dedication to this campaign. Team Biden-Harris

| [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/6TQgfDgoIyVr_x5Yn2-dKQ~~/AAPPAAA~~) When Larry Hogan jumped into Maryland’s open Senate race, it shifted the entire Senate landscape and shifted Maryland from safely blue to a battleground state.

A lot of Hogan’s momentum comes from the perception that he’s a moderate voice in an otherwise extremist, out-of-touch GOP.

**_But Hogan’s veto record tells a very different story, Peter._**

In fact, we’re about to give you 5 clear examples proving that Larry Hogan would be just one more rubber stamp for the GOP’s agenda in the Senate, but before we do that: [**_Will you please chip in a split donation of $25 — just $5 for each reason listed below — to help us and Maxwell Frost take on Larry Hogan and win this critical battleground race?_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/6TQgfDgoIyVr_x5Yn2-dKQ~~/AAPPAAA~~) | [Donate $25](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/6TQgfDgoIyVr_x5Yn2-dKQ~~/AAPPAAA~~)

Here are 5 examples proving that Marylanders deserve better than Larry Hogan:
_He vetoed a $15 minimum wage.

He undercut workers by vetoing legislation that would have allowed them to deduct union dues from state income taxes.

He vetoed a bill to restore voting rights to more than 44,000 previously incarcerated Marylanders.

He vetoed common sense gun legislation mandating background checks.

He vetoed legislation to increase access to reproductive care by increasing the number of abortion providers in Maryland._
**Larry Hogan isn’t fooling anyone, Peter, and we can’t afford to let him represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate.[**_Will you please pitch in $25 split between our campaign and Maxwell Frost so we can boost our Maryland-first message, win this critical election, and defend our narrow Senate majority?_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/6TQgfDgoIyVr_x5Yn2-dKQ~~/AAPPAAA~~)

He vetoed a bill to restore voting rights to more than 44,000 previously incarcerated Marylanders. He vetoed common sense gun legislation mandating background checks. He vetoed legislation to increase access to reproductive care by increasing the number of abortion providers in Maryland. Larry Hogan isn’t fooling anyone, Peter, and we can’t afford to let him represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate.~ | | ~ ~ | ~ | Thanks! —Alsobrooks HQ ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. body:

Folks,

**_I have hope for my Liberal friends ...jellyfish have survived for more than 165 million years without a brain, so there is hope for a few of them._**

Just going over the numbers so far and it's looking like it could be one of my worst months in recent memory. I'm not asking for much, but a few dollars would go a long way.

name: Wesley
subject: The government is coming for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
No one is going to harm my family.

| [](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=bebfc58735a44795ba2fe9a38feb4bbe&_e=WkGoQ3zPxDen4iL-w2hsQQw1vEVsfPs-6bkN0gbS2OV9b5_-DmMiRKnZJab6gtf9n7R5x_Avng1pboCqbk6qFS-yQLMMpvk2brzBkD-McnIIzbj-oUxSOAlTpTA7jk86aLqAqs0Z4Fx7QWub6gfVGQN6h57vsG2bPzJ4JHrR9Uq-bIVhLik3dlpV2weVDGU6zr90joydJRSfaLDDvh2dlzSaCeqOAtfJTIY0JSLAIFAXl41MTdervGG_CV3IcKjiLT3y74eEBvnHEFI7WNDpRoTNVcW_vF132obmtigex5RdWVGn7Ew8TyiJsInhPUf8yAbTdVWK5f0UUvk2UIe3tA%3D%3D)
---
**THERE IS ZERO NEGOTIATION OVER THE SECOND AMENDMENT.**
Fellow American, I'm a gun owner, and I can promise you no one is going to harm my wife and children. ****

****LET 'S TAKE A SECOND AND TAKE A LOOK AT THE FACTS:

**6% OF ALL GUN HOMICIDES ARE AT THE HANDS OF AN AR-15

60% OF ALL GUN HOMICIDES ARE AT THE HANDS OF A HANDGUN

****** **The Left, who defunded the police, opened our border, and created a national migrant crisis, is dead set on diminishing our 2A rights.**

| [**PROTECT MY 2A**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=bebfc58735a44795ba2fe9a38feb4bbe&_e=WkGoQ3zPxDen4iL-w2hsQQw1vEVsfPs-6bkN0gbS2OV9b5_-DmMiRKnZJab6gtf9n7R5x_Avng1pboCqbk6qFS-yQLMMpvk2brzBkD-McnIIzbj-oUxSOAlTpTA7jk86lgzIxJwqgyIy19dkOOperFi4NPxduJ6j-exug7zKFVxrvKt5DHRRNrwiKbN0E98ZmGbH9jIlNqWnqizQXLCwhj1tdtjv8vfY9UygcriDzMVMxu8emBDC1I2mNME-MGwxPqi3nxmk6RyKNvhncaTp3gGiukO2KYxY5i67He-_Jhv3n6DS8gZc7AK-gCWWkXdNzF7xg0lvA_Ae1CxxbzkQQg%3D%3D)
---

The Left tries to tell you that civilian-made AR-15s are weapons of war. As a veteran, I've seen weapons of war, and I would not take a civilian-made AR-15 into battle. The Left is happy to blame AR-15s, but **I blame the homicidal maniac.**

[**PROTECT OUR RIGHT TO BEAR ARMS**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=bebfc58735a44795ba2fe9a38feb4bbe&_e=WkGoQ3zPxDen4iL-w2hsQQw1vEVsfPs-6bkN0gbS2OV9b5_-DmMiRKnZJab6gtf9n7R5x_Avng1pboCqbk6qFS-yQLMMpvk2brzBkD-McnIIzbj-oUxSOAlTpTA7jk86lgzIxJwqgyIy19dkOOperFi4NPxduJ6j-exug7zKFVzIvChZIwDPOr0HMzsSkpF4dIV2qWUJxazJII1o8jfavfDfloKYWUiiRc5lRuEgQVfX0JAmP6v-aU50PFdgtfMrhGRV3TCP4-8AO40fXpJASbYNs_PtPy8hAxHxnx1G27_wpDlpSg22_VuTNTXheS2FUose4K4ZiiGvzmvq4WSDhg%3D%3D)
---

To walk into the Capitol daily, I have to walk through metal detectors. I walk by brave men and women who carry weapons every single day. **Serving in Congress does NOT make me more important than my children.**

[**PROTECT OUR FAMILIES**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=bebfc58735a44795ba2fe9a38feb4bbe&_e=WkGoQ3zPxDen4iL-w2hsQQw1vEVsfPs-6bkN0gbS2OV9b5_-DmMiRKnZJab6gtf9n7R5x_Avng1pboCqbk6qFS-yQLMMpvk2brzBkD-McnIIzbj-oUxSOAlTpTA7jk86lgzIxJwqgyIy19dkOOperFi4NPxduJ6j-exug7zKFVxIJ7ysLKcNlp-lRmdmD8wsrpBhtnZHHi3txtsy11_bg5l3fL9SY-HWzQTCLL2DkrhOyKqJwCicH3m-Xfe6NBKiX2QHwWLjalDPZG3ma0HAN_MfYjsbSmHoZynMJqNIVhdh1I8ngE5nYn7vF_rlVvSAQmGM4d1di8o18dYPd4B8Xg%3D%3D)
---

**So, instead of eroding our Second Amendment rights, let 's protect our children. Our children should have the same protections that we have in Congress. **
More than 400 million guns are in circulation around the country.**The overwhelming majority of gun owners are law-abiding citizens.**

**I refuse to allow our Second Amendment rights to be further eroded by disarming our population, making our country less safe, and bringing us closer to communism. Because that 's how it happens: you disarm your population, and then the government takes control. **

**[We cannot allow this to happen. This fundamental right to bear arms has never been more critical.](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=bebfc58735a44795ba2fe9a38feb4bbe&_e=WkGoQ3zPxDen4iL-w2hsQQw1vEVsfPs-6bkN0gbS2OV9b5_-DmMiRKnZJab6gtf9n7R5x_Avng1pboCqbk6qFS-yQLMMpvk2brzBkD-McnIIzbj-oUxSOAlTpTA7jk867w-yeeNAz3VXdmE1jwTZc3hPsfmm99ztHyk3Dg31XBlmkRo8ksIstq34Vk2ZAgfz4jTvSdE4ksplALZDtD1GWfKc3IQYchEwYMcqQjlg4jSVKKACd_mudHxvXQKhx8eeLp86alV2zi0Um-pmU8t56OYfcFKuixl156gvD4y-UG6lWXiliWeG52LVG7AZalBE)**

_Wesley_

[](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=bebfc58735a44795ba2fe9a38feb4bbe&_e=WkGoQ3zPxDen4iL-w2hsQQw1vEVsfPs-6bkN0gbS2OV9b5_-DmMiRKnZJab6gtf9n7R5x_Avng1pboCqbk6qFS-yQLMMpvk2brzBkD-McnIIzbj-oUxSOAlTpTA7jk867w-yeeNAz3VXdmE1jwTZc3hPsfmm99ztHyk3Dg31XBl25KsmkfIVyK9O8-BLl8fmxvf1KGIWei1tRQCClmpugGgwwMA4XNNee2K3t59KSrJh3AAvtOMGowsodT3YBom6QEJAogoWgXVC-M2_LmXtwgiaVoubSpjMPvzesZyTFRCqXrVT0RQXfR1hvfPhcrzr)

**_Changing Washington won 't be easy, but graduating from West Point and serving in the United States Army, being deployed to combat zones, and flying Apache helicopters over Iraq has prepared me for tough fights and big challenges.

I truly believe nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and our way of life in the Houston area._**********

clean_body: No one is going to harm my family. | THERE IS ZERO NEGOTIATION OVER THE SECOND AMENDMENT. Fellow American, I'm a gun owner, and I can promise you no one is going to harm my wife and children. ** LET 'S TAKE A SECOND AND TAKE A LOOK AT THE FACTS: 6% OF ALL GUN HOMICIDES ARE AT THE HANDS OF AN AR-15 60% OF ALL GUN HOMICIDES ARE AT THE HANDS OF A HANDGUN **** The Left, who defunded the police, opened our border, and created a national migrant crisis, is dead set on diminishing our 2A rights. | The Left tries to tell you that civilian-made AR-15s are weapons of war. As a veteran, I've seen weapons of war, and I would not take a civilian-made AR-15 into battle. The Left is happy to blame AR-15s, but I blame the homicidal maniac. To walk into the Capitol daily, I have to walk through metal detectors. I walk by brave men and women who carry weapons every single day. Serving in Congress does NOT make me more important than my children. So, instead of eroding our Second Amendment rights, let 's protect our children. Our children should have the same protections that we have in Congress. More than 400 million guns are in circulation around the country.The overwhelming majority of gun owners are law-abiding citizens. I refuse to allow our Second Amendment rights to be further eroded by disarming our population, making our country less safe, and bringing us closer to communism. Because that 's how it happens: you disarm your population, and then the government takes control. Wesley Changing Washington won 't be easy, but graduating from West Point and serving in the United States Army, being deployed to combat zones, and flying Apache helicopters over Iraq has prepared me for tough fights and big challenges. I truly believe nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and our way of life in the Houston area.******** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Hunt for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Copyright (C) 2024 Hunt for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
I promise I’ll keep this message short. | |

I hate to bother you on a Sunday, Derek, but we really need your help today. I promise I’ll keep this message short. As you read this, Trump and his MAGA allies are pummeling President Biden and Democrats nationwide with attack ads. They’re spending millions of dollars in an attempt to reach voters across the country. We can be sure they won’t let up anytime between now and Election Day, and neither can we. We simply can’t afford to sit idly by while MAGA extremists dominate the conversation with divisiveness and fear-mongering. It’s critical we have the resources to fight back. **Can you make your first contribution of 2024 using the link below to help?** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-elect-dems-2024**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtr6i0NfiYyLJ8wy5K3FsOoEfDFlYKtEmR-Pm-AvEuATnI0Fk3w5n-J_4ssTSoAM2OWfnf-7y3jS3lDtsjW4apL8YiwSnmDqZEb9B6rlRlYmRCZocuJ3D-7lMJcngWD4yoIkHVPMZmVK5-mL_wS9xlJPwIsSVY1oSGRIuXTLtZ8x2z08-8qLH8-M73Et0QCCLzKKoeuYD89w2yh-Mg0FZoYF0Nv368oSTvLzJO7t6rjVKbbT5f-UT94p-IDDN4-zLgQI3r1Q1ZnZqVW_D0xR1SV2c_mrKVXwGFY9--80srEh4fcoP7ce8uvBxwNk4qClPa39eBnadshafm7esB6HAnfyYJEmrSNWMQPRZNIW-NttyWb2R3lg4IbVKrj5mYReGM/463/xC9_Ws72RE6PpV-AD-rCdQ/h0/h001.huK6uWv0nWAcU0B7Z5Gr814e8POZpEJXnTR7oVNX2cU) I promised to keep this short, so I’ll leave this note here and let you get back to enjoying your weekend. clean_body: I promise I’ll keep this message short. | | I hate to bother you on a Sunday, Derek, but we really need your help today. I promise I’ll keep this message short. As you read this, Trump and his MAGA allies are pummeling President Biden and Democrats nationwide with attack ads. They’re spending millions of dollars in an attempt to reach voters across the country. We can be sure they won’t let up anytime between now and Election Day, and neither can we. We simply can’t afford to sit idly by while MAGA extremists dominate the conversation with divisiveness and fear-mongering. It’s critical we have the resources to fight back. Can you make your first contribution of 2024 using the link below to help? I promised to keep this short, so I’ll leave this note here and let you get back to enjoying your weekend. But please know anything you pitch in today will go a very long way in supporting the DNC’s mission. Thank you for everything you do. Becca Becca Santos Seetahal Online Fundraising Director Democratic National Committee Text JOIN to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . Team, this is it. We’ve made it to May, and our election is nearly two weeks away. This is a make-or-break moment for our campaign.
Folks throughout OR-05 are already casting their ballots, and with polling showing Janelle **neck-and-neck with her opponent** , we know this is going to be close.
So we need to make sure we cover all of our bases.
That includes running more ads to share Janelle’s message with undecided voters, a robust get-out-the-vote plan to make sure people can cast their ballots, and working to connect with Oregonians.

clean_body: What are you waiting for? | = Hi Peter, it’s Sherrod Brown. I’m personally reaching out to ask you to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue. My team and I have set an ambitious goal to raise $350,000 before the end of the month, and right now, we're falling way short, so we need all the help we can get. I’m counting on folks like you to donate $3 so we can win what has become the toughest reelection battle of my life. The time to act is now, so I’m asking you to please give again to help me defend my seat in Ohio and keep the Senate blue. = | = Hitting our goal is more important now than ever before. Why? Because the odds are stacked against me: • The GOP named me one of their top targets for defeat, and CNN says I’m one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country. • My opponent, Bernie Moreno, is spending millions of his own dollars to fund his campaign and flood the airways with his pro-Trump message. • Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs made a record-breaking ad reservation in Ohio – all in an attempt to take me down and flip the Senate red. The polls show me neck and neck with my opponent, which is why every dollar is absolutely critical. It won’t be easy, but we CAN pull ahead IF folks like you chip in to help us get the resources we need to spread our pro-worker message. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Mark Takano will go through immediately: = = = Thank you for standing with me, = Sherrod Brown | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Peter, we’re asking for just $3 today. _No, that's not a typo._ We’re asking $3 because Senate Democrats need to defend 23 seats this year to keep their majority and prevent Republicans from passing a nationwide abortion ban. We’re asking for $3 because Mazie is one of them. And we’re asking for $3 because the only way we’ll fight off GOP-connected super PACs, spread the word about Mazie’s campaign, and power her fight for working families is **together.** $3 isn’t much by itself, but when Mike from Honolulu pitches in $3, Susan from Seattle adds $3 of her own, and countless other grassroots supporters follow their lead — it adds up quickly. Peter, we're gearing up to kick off our 2024 Rides Program!

In the last election, we provided more than 70,000 rides to the polls, helping Black voters turn out in droves to elect Warnock and flip the Senate! This year, we’re fighting to re-elect Biden-Harris, take back control of the House, **_and send not one, but TWO Black women to the Senate!_**

**[This year is bound to be one of the most important election years of our lifetime and it’s up to us to fight as hard as possible to turn out Black voters on a greater scale than ever before. Will you donate $25 and sponsor a ride to the polls this election season?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqskv9NQB2VWDB7dxl6GOAMo1-W-NgiXdUOltrr0hMcvjECKpjvbDnzCkST-gdamgZCykCv953oxytwSRUzsjvE5mcMK1shq0mw1-gRcDNp2lUtFSX4xtcec5rmlg-GO59QxyXrf8Nv86ytpRhCJH7LAK28_OD97Dxfx0AuX4r9V_rHLKjlqSEZJpcsP55oyzWfizbqCvSzKrkWOG-_JY-Hb8liD1Hgp24a7-ifOcMTJmGTlPp5pje-nlxFneUxkAKvYLDme0wrN2n6go54g-WQhnXAcylUxMIkeYamIR_P1djjgZ550rky0k8gev7zupjVLodagx_tHqUh8CyLvkJu_wBnlPGoTX7F5xbkE91U451iS2739NMbFGOUkzVxJdPkltF882nw7mJt6bkWNvQuGgqqMrLYDrXfAO5GWRSSVLhY3qF7Y-y5XhetSriv9w6hEI0-AxrARhNAOfsaYmruH/463/Z6mSRQneTz6daLRKFWH-nw/h2/h001.7RRPnEZV1xBLXFOAHDbLpUk8j8hrFDfWDPX4lmA1P10)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately to The Collective PAC.

name: Charity Barry
subject: Stauter Endorses Charity Barry for Congress!
body:
6 Months from now, Polls will be closed - Will you join us now?
| | | |
---
---
| Stauter Endorses Charity Barry!
---
---
| I am honored to announce that Marilyn Stauter has endorsed my candidacy!
Marilyn is a long-time, dedicated Republican activist that understands what it takes to get a job done!

---
| | |
"I've known Charity Barry for a number of years and have served with her in organizations where she has exhibited excellent leadership skills and cooperation. I am proud to support her and encourage others to get behind Charity for 2nd District Representative."
~ Marilyn Stauter
---
|
Thank you, Marilyn!
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Six months from now, we won't be able to go back and do more...
---
| Six months from now, on November 5th, the polls will be closed and the votes we earned will be getting counted by clerks and poll workers across the district...
How will you feel? Confident you did all you could to preserve this great nation?
Will you join Marilyn and many others in supporting our efforts today?
---
| | | Have you signed my nomination papers?* Could you gather a few more signatures from friends and family?*
Will you make phone calls for the campaign? Are you ready to get out and knock on doors? Will you join us in a parade? Would you volunteer at a fair, festival, or other community event?
There are many ways to get involved! Let us know how you want to get started!
---
---
| | [Join the Team!](mailto:charity@charitybarryforcongress.com)
---
| *If you have already started gathering nomination signatures to help me get on the ballot, let us know how you are doing! If not, just email and let us know you are interested in getting started! We need 1,000 - 2,000 signatures by June 3rd. Thank you!
---
| |
---
| Let's get out there and win back our House!
---
| |
---
| Sincerely,
Charity Barry Your Candidate for the 2nd Congressional District of WI
---
| |
---
---

Marilyn is a long-time, dedicated Republican activist that understands what it takes to get a job done! | | | "I've known Charity Barry for a number of years and have served with her in organizations where she has exhibited excellent leadership skills and cooperation. I am proud to support her and encourage others to get behind Charity for 2nd District Representative." ~ Marilyn Stauter | Thank you, Marilyn! | | | | | Six months from now, we won't be able to go back and do more... | Six months from now, on November 5th, the polls will be closed and the votes we earned will be getting counted by clerks and poll workers across the district... How will you feel? Confident you did all you could to preserve this great nation? Will you join Marilyn and many others in supporting our efforts today? | | | Have you signed my nomination papers? Could you gather a few more signatures from friends and family? Will you make phone calls for the campaign? Are you ready to get out and knock on doors? Will you join us in a parade? **Now,** I'm polling ahead of Ruben, and the Soros, Clinton & Obama lawyers have resorted to legal warfare, trying to force me off the campaign trail and into the courts. Just when we were ready to solidify our lead, this happened.

name: John Fetterman
subject: I really need to talk to you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| My senior Senator and friend Bob Casey is running for re-election!!! _Tammy Baldwin here — My colleague Bob Casey is running for reelection in Pennsylvania to defend our Democratic Senate majority. I hope you'll read this update from his fellow Pensylvania Senator, John Fetterman, and[chip in, if you can.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-casey.PWALcl&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=2555%2E35263%2EewsRIR)_ Hey Peter, it’s John. I really need to talk to you about my friend Bob Casey. The 2024 election is here — and **the GOP’s road to winning back the Senate runs right through PA.** Republicans are zeroing in on 2024’s battleground states as we speak. You can bet Mitch McConnell and the GOP’s shadiest billionaires will spend hundreds of million$ to attack Bob. This is *seriously* scary stuff, but you know what gives ME hope? This amazing grassroots team!!! The way we stopped the GOP in 2022 is the same way we fight back and re-elect Bob now: by bringing together an ✨all-star grassroots team✨ that can stand up to the GOP’s money by folks chipping in $5, $25, or more at a time. Together, we’ll defend PA’s Senate seat, as long as we don’t lose sight of the stakes. **Holding this seat is make-or-break for our Democratic majority.** [**With that in mind... please, Peter, split $10 or more between Bob’s campaign and Tammy Baldwin. We need to build a winning campaign between now and Election Day, so I’m asking for yinz guys to dig deep!**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-casey.PWALcl&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2555%2E35263%2EewsRIR) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Bob Casey and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-casey.kD9PQC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2555%2E35263%2EewsRIR)

name: Call for a Ceasefire via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie - "No, Mr. Netanyahu. It is not antisemitic or pro-Hamas to point out that in a little over six months your extremist government has killed 34,000 Palestinians'"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, as students
protest for Peace in Gaza across college campuses, Netanyahu tried to
distract from their message with accusations of antisemitism. Bernie
quickly pointed out that Netanyahu’s tactics were meant only to draw
attention away from the atrocities in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17094?t=1011&akid=5924%2E5885482%2E30kXCg ][IMG]

“No, Mr. Netanyahu,” Bernie said. “It is not antisemitic or pro-Hamas to
point out that in a little over six months your extremist government has
killed 34,000 Palestinians.” Bad faith accusations from Netanyahu, the
media, and right-wing lawmakers will not stop the movement for Peace in
Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17095?source=email-20240505&t=1012&akid=5924%2E5885482%2E30kXCg ]Add your name: End U.S. complicity in the unprecedented bombing
campaign against Palestinians. Permanent CEASEFIRE NOW!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17095?source=email-20240505&t=1013&akid=5924%2E5885482%2E30kXCg ]ADD YOUR NAME

Antisemitism, and all forms of bigotry, are vile and unacceptable. It is
also vile and unacceptable to mislabel a mass protest movement to distract
from the tens of thousands of murders carried out by the Israeli military
with American-made bombs. That’s why Bernie had to speak out.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17094?t=1014&akid=5924%2E5885482%2E30kXCg ][IMG]

President Biden and Congress must listen to the courageous protesters,
pro-Peace progressives, and the majority of American people who are
calling for an end to the massacre in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17095?source=email-20240505&t=1015&akid=5924%2E5885482%2E30kXCg ]Add your name: Demand President Biden and Congress broker Peace in Gaza
and END U.S. government support of the Netanyahu regime bombing civilians
and blocking humanitarian aid.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Senator Kennedy
subject: I always like to do my own research
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
“Abolish The Police! End Climate Change!” is what they keep screaming

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1d888552ed9b4950b3ec0306d174a431&_e=vtB4GXqzFhUgwquwbHOwl5N89fAk2GDk3dR2fdYZ-bli66ZXmN5pzfdzyoLIGFHJ60PXRTfBuFiE2fSDG2JMldrxARcczbgt_HuP4hRoZFkXej91p4L_Bng8FRAX3v-QgynACD0O11Gsxqm-B5cp6HezqaxtCEfTxcPkHCL0f1QgdKPHV_yVcE8VZXBj1Vgu5DgYCX7ZvBUKu50VCNuilxek-KcQxSvhfNv4l1olH_0-Y9NulfYVs5WpJOXcoXQj8mw4y5IceN5ZYPtuQaawk05Kn4EhSOcHMiX9pZcfSIISnVEcVkSDz2H4tGmWwblIQaG6hv_MqCbwdc49-8YxJedA_M_-rW50lt4VZVv9A7BAPkNMXxbpLdkQhXyWi7THmAEmPlaO3HqNTp_2ezmxpg%3D%3D)
---
Folks,

Any time we have a hearing in the Senate, I find it to be critical to do my research. I always make sure I'm up-to-date on all information pertaining to what we're discussing.

I'll lean on a pot of coffee and work late into the night if I have to to make sure all my I's are dotted and my T's are crossed.

But, sometimes, I like to do a little background research on the witnesses that my colleagues invite to testify.

This comes in handy when someone who is telling you to 'End Climate Change' has also called for 'Abolishing the Police'.

Context matters, folks.
_You see_ , the goat-milk latte crowd will follow the calling of the masses through every single warped, misleading idea any of them have.

He wants us to get rid of CO2, but he couldn't tell me much about what CO2 even is.

I'm fighting to the very end to call out far-left lunacy and keep the woke mob at bay, but without the support of folks like you, I don't stand a chance to do it.

_**[Will you help me fight today?](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=1d888552ed9b4950b3ec0306d174a431&_e=vtB4GXqzFhUgwquwbHOwl5N89fAk2GDk3dR2fdYZ-bli66ZXmN5pzfdzyoLIGFHJ60PXRTfBuFiE2fSDG2JMldrxARcczbgt_HuP4hRoZFkXej91p4L_Bng8FRAX3v-QgynACD0O11Gsxqm-B5cp6HezqaxtCEfTxcPkHCL0f1QgdKPHV_yVcE8VZXBj1VguAqNMA1t1xBRX1wcAmLOPHaioaV8mj10AhJfRzaBDV0d_6xTkfVZCU_c0sl6OutmcY0nNRavkWUzZW4ZOVORWi1PgQ1dGDqYWfJ8Lz_zilbRAndy2wgD7UZeIor-KLhPnMImstqlQmO_8GU_txevgB1JtklSzNwtFN5Ta1ojgNvomaut62hhcg2s8Xp1kdTPb)**_

Upcoming Events: Join Us for a Memorable Experience!
[Nashville, Tennessee](https://www.kennedy24.com/country-and-comedy-nashville?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_4_24_f1&n=2) \- Wednesday, May 15th at 7:00 PM
Our third "Night of Laughter with RFK Jr." will feature Nicole Shanahan, Russell Brand, and comic legends Rob Schneider and Jim Breuer, plus musical performances by Kayley Biship, John Carter Cash, and Ana Christina Cash.
[Castle Rock, Colorado](https://www.kennedy24.com/castlerock-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_4_24_f1&n=3) \- Saturday May 18th at 6:30 PM
Join us for an intimate reception with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the serene setting of Castle Rock, CO, where you'll enjoy an evening of engaging conversation, delightful hors d'oeuvres, and cocktails.
[Aurora, Colorado](https://www.kennedy24.com/denver-co-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_4_24_f1&n=4) \- Sunday May 19th at 3:00 PM
Catch RFK Jr. in Denver on May 19th for a dynamic rally at The Hangar at Stanley Marketplace. He'll share his vision to rebuild the middle class and curtail corporate power, aiming for a spot on ballots nationwide.
[Santa Monica, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/santa-monica-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_4_24_f1&n=5) \- Sunday, June 2nd at 6:00 PM
Join us for an exclusive reception with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Cheryl Hines at a private venue in beautiful Santa Monica. Enjoy an evening of hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, a fireside chat, and a unique photo opportunity.
[Manhattan, New York](https://www.kennedy24.com/manhattan-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_4_24_f1&n=6) \- Tuesday, June 4th at 6:30 PM
Join us for an exclusive dinner with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. in Manhattan on June 4th, 2024, to discuss Web3 policies and support his presidential campaign. Limited seats available for this intimate event.
[Edmonds, Washington](https://www.kennedy24.com/edmonds-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_4_24_f1&n=7) \- Sunday, June 9th at 4:00 PM
Experience an evening of elegance with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. at a stunning waterfront venue. This exclusive fundraiser offers a fireside chat, a Q&A session, and gourmet hors d'oeuvres and cocktails.
* * *
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/country-and-comedy-nashville?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_4_24_f1&n=8)
* * *
RFK Jr.: The Perfect Storm For An Independent Candidate
If there was ever any time in the last 200 years that an independent candidate could win the presidency, it’s now.
Even the traditional mainstream media admits that two-thirds of Americans don’t want to see a contest between President Trump and President Biden alone.
My opponents are worried, which is why you’re seeing so many dirty tricks, attacks, and condemnations from both President Biden, President Trump, and the Republican and Democratic parties.
Today, for the first time in American history, self-identified Independents outnumber both Republican and Democratic voters. And Independents favor me over President Biden or President Trump.
I was particularly interested in a recent poll by NBC, which never gives me favorable treatment, but acknowledges that 34% of Americans would consider voting for me.
And in a three-way race, 34% is enough to win the election.
Currently, polls show that about 20% of Americans have never heard of me and don’t know I’m running for President. So, we have some work to do to get the word out about my campaign.
But we also have a tremendous amount of headroom to grow our support.
**With every donation, we inch closer to making history. Your support is crucial to introduce our vision to the 20% of Americans still unaware of this historic campaign.**
[Invest in a true change—donate today to help us secure a victory that redefines American politics. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_4_24_f1&n=9)

RFK Jr.: The Perfect Storm For An Independent Candidate If there was ever any time in the last 200 years that an independent candidate could win the presidency, it’s now. Even the traditional mainstream media admits that two-thirds of Americans don’t want to see a contest between President Trump and President Biden alone. My opponents are worried, which is why you’re seeing so many dirty tricks, attacks, and condemnations from both President Biden, President Trump, and the Republican and Democratic parties. Today, for the first time in American history, self-identified Independents outnumber both Republican and Democratic voters. And Independents favor me over President Biden or President Trump. I was particularly interested in a recent poll by NBC, which never gives me favorable treatment, but acknowledges that 34% of Americans would consider voting for me. And in a three-way race, 34% is enough to win the election. Currently, polls show that about 20% of Americans have never heard of me and don’t know I’m running for President. So, we have some work to do to get the word out about my campaign. But we also have a tremendous amount of headroom to grow our support. With every donation, we inch closer to making history. name: Team Casey
subject: 6 months from now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Picture this...
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2893%2E552475%2ERgbeH7)
Peter, picture this:
**It’s 6 months from today.** You’re sitting up in bed after your alarm goes off. You go check your phone to see the time, and lo and behold it’s 8:00 in the morning. You go to check your calendar, and what do you see at the top? **It’s November 5th, Election Day, and you need to cast your ballot.**
It may seem far off, but Election Day will be here before we know it. It’s why there are canvassers on the ground who are knocking on doors and making phone calls, ensuring that **every voter’s voice is heard on November 5th.**
[**Our outreach strategy will be crucial, so we’re building the framework now and fundraising what we’ll need to reach every single voter. Can you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help these canvassers on the ground?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240505-2?refcode=em20240505-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2893_552475_RgbeH7&akid=2893%2E552475%2ERgbeH7)
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240505-2?refcode=em20240505-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2893_552475_RgbeH7&akid=2893%2E552475%2ERgbeH7)**
We are gearing up for November by gathering all the resources we need now. This includes hiring staff, opening up offices across Pennsylvania, and making a strategic plan for the next 6 months.
[**However, it requires significant resources to power our ground game, so we are asking if you can chip in $5 or whatever you can to help us get out the vote over these next few months.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240505-2?refcode=em20240505-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2893_552475_RgbeH7&akid=2893%2E552475%2ERgbeH7)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240505-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240505-2-el&refcode2=2893_552475_RgbeH7&akid=2893%2E552475%2ERgbeH7) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240505-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240505-2-el&refcode2=2893_552475_RgbeH7&akid=2893%2E552475%2ERgbeH7) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240505-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240505-2-el&refcode2=2893_552475_RgbeH7&akid=2893%2E552475%2ERgbeH7) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240505-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240505-2-el&refcode2=2893_552475_RgbeH7&akid=2893%2E552475%2ERgbeH7) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240505-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240505-2-el&refcode2=2893_552475_RgbeH7&akid=2893%2E552475%2ERgbeH7) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240505-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240505-2&refcode2=2893_552475_RgbeH7&akid=2893%2E552475%2ERgbeH7)

November will be here before we know it, so let’s get to work.
Thank you for your support.
— Team Casey

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: let me be clear about what is happening here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONGRESSIONAL PROGRESSIVE CAUCUS PAC, WEAREPROGRESSIVES
body:
|
---

_Emails like these are an important aspect of our progressive strategy so we can keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails,[click here.](https://act.weareprogressives.org/survey/less-emails/?source=em-header&t=1&akid=25172%2E3658908%2EC4VI_f) If you want to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.weareprogressives.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-header&t=2&akid=25172%2E3658908%2EC4VI_f)_

Peter, You know it. I know it. The current American political system is corrupt. You get to cast one vote. Billionaires get to spend hundreds of millions supporting or defeating candidates of their choice. That’s not democracy. That’s Oligarchy. And that’s why we must overturn the disastrous Supreme Court decision on _Citizens United_ and move toward public funding of elections. But, in the meantime, living within this corrupt campaign finance system, we have to fight back and support progressive candidates under attack from right-wing billionaires. So today, I am reaching out to ask you to make a contribution -- of $3 or anything you can afford — to the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC. If that’s all you need to hear, use this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cpc-em-may24](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/42152?c0=cpc-em-may24.-DAwo7&refcode=em240505-3-Ob&t=3&akid=25172%2E3658908%2EC4VI_f)** Otherwise, let me be clear about what is happening here, and what is at stake in November: Billionaire participation in elections is nothing new, but every election cycle, they become bolder and more influential. And the elections of 2024 are shaping up to be the most dangerous yet — with progressives, especially women and people of color, most often the target. That’s a big problem, because a government run by Donald Trump and the GOP would be an absolute disaster for working people. If the GOP takes power, they’ll try to ban abortion nationwide. They’ll take health care away from tens of millions of people. They’ll roll back all the progress we’ve made fighting climate change. Other issues like education, gun control, criminal justice reform, income and wealth inequality, the cost of prescription drugs, workers rights under the National Labor Relations Board, LGBTQ rights, and more will all move backward. Obviously, we cannot allow this to happen. We must ensure that progressives running for Congress have the support and resources they need to stand up to the onslaught of Dark Money coming after them. We must make it clear that we will fight for a strong, progressive agenda that represents the needs of working people, and not just the billionaire class, corporate lobbyists, and wealthy campaign contributors. So I am once again asking for your financial support: [**Please, use this link to make a contribution to the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC. Let us stand together in the fight for a world of economic and social justice for all of our people.**](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/42152?c0=cpc-em-may24.-DAwo7&refcode=em240505-3-Ob&t=4&akid=25172%2E3658908%2EC4VI_f) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[DONATE $3](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/42152?c0=cpc-em-may24.-DAwo7&refcode=em240505-3-Ob&t=5&akid=25172%2E3658908%2EC4VI_f)**
---
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/42152?c0=cpc-em-may24.-DAwo7&refcode=em240505-3-Ob&t=6&akid=25172%2E3658908%2EC4VI_f)**
---
It is not a radical idea to say that the very wealthiest people in this country should not be able to control our political system and our representation in government. This nation and its government belong to ALL of our people, and not to a handful of billionaires and their super PACs.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ Click here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.weareprogressives.org/survey/less-emails/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=25172%2E3658908%2EC4VI_f) | [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://act.weareprogressives.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=8&akid=25172%2E3658908%2EC4VI_f)
---
|
---

---

**We elect bold Progressives to Congress who will:**

If you want to chip in to be a part of our movement, **_click here._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cpc-em-wrapper-footer?refcode=em-footer&amount=5&t=11&refcode2=25172_3658908_C4VI_f&akid=25172%2E3658908%2EC4VI_f)
| | [CHIP IN $5 TO ELECT PROGRESSIVES ->](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cpc-em-wrapper-footer?refcode=em-footer&amount=5&t=12&refcode2=25172_3658908_C4VI_f&akid=25172%2E3658908%2EC4VI_f)

We're emailing you today -- _because we need to elect a wave of Progressive leaders._
Without the help of our grassroots supporters, we'd have nothing. And if we can't fundraise, **Progressives will lose and Republicans will win.**
While Republicans rely on corporate SuperPACs, we count on grassroots donors like you to do our work.
Every penny goes towards electing bold Progressives across the country.

name: Kari Lake
subject: Hey, you need to see this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
Kyrsten Sinema, NOT RUNNING!

| [ ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=d973f81731c649afa80820f2fec50352&_e=xKBXRDR-ro0YkAJ6jD1tnR-VKUciVNzLplvrSJf5iOL04Fv7QSTJsJqAXP6SDRW7oLo6CNNod5iZEq9YPa3OSQrN8iqOelGJZTszxIRSmaJH4HR6SRF7_mQEueyANFs4lY2yTZ8a-rlfqLs3afd7v6xRQBKDQLouGEQnJfWEw2_0t0MY_RP1jChTlmujiiSfDWAcoAhikrtuasf_s9ZX99lZkULBtndOigdJVb3MTENHy2P69hFmsS380EZyNBNKxJ2ux55LOC-SVGo06zaXc3c4mMSjxnv2k0TLNG-mKP2ab-1Jfv1Fhic17H5w377zAFIWdB0I-6sbIQcVoyfGNg%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

_**This is the most important email you will receive all day. Kyrsten Sinema is NOT running for Senate in Arizona. It 's officially a one-on-one race. **

There will only be two candidates on the ballot running for Senate in 2024: my RADICAL opponent, Ruben Gallego, and me. It's all or nothing for Arizona, America first, or America last.

**Ruben 's a radical in every sense of the word. He would be a massive departure from the representation we have had in Arizona. He votes with Joe Biden 100 percent of the time, supported the Iran Deal, sanctuary cities, defunding the police, and voting rights for everyone pouring across the border. He even called the border wall 'stupid.' **_

**If we lose in Arizona, this entire country will be on a kamikaze mission toward total destruction. It 's now or never to step up and save this country before it's too late. ** | [ **HELP ME SAVE AMERICA** ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=d973f81731c649afa80820f2fec50352&_e=xKBXRDR-ro0YkAJ6jD1tnR-VKUciVNzLplvrSJf5iOL04Fv7QSTJsJqAXP6SDRW7oLo6CNNod5iZEq9YPa3OSQrN8iqOelGJZTszxIRSmaJH4HR6SRF7_mQEueyANFs4SU2qweFIFQgWcJoR5UAwErJQr_r8ALY587vW3KU9ir_OYfzdppWzydqZH-YaiaXSsp_lhaVKenc_H_i_X4v4mye_QtxFere1jry9Pc1Ot1aR84wPBGNWoHDnGGl_C9xZGWWyxFqSsO_M4EV6i0FktEtAaSpJJFiv9ej4el3foUrAH3knNRriZArzead0VNB-)

Folks like Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley, Lindsey Graham, and Rick Scott have all
stood strong alongside the former president, no matter how many times he
has been criminally indicted, how outrageous his statements are, or how he
desecrates our democracy.

Derek, some of
the toughest fights to defend our democracy — and make it stronger — are
going to take place in the United States Senate. And I’m ready to step
into the ring to protect our institutions and our Constitution.

Because the truth is, with Donald Trump on the ballot, we need to stand
strong in defense of our free and fair elections. We remember all too well
what happened on January 6, 2021. Eight Republican senators voted against
certifying the election.

I’m ready to stand up to Donald Trump’s enablers in the Senate. I’m ready
to debate them on the Constitution. And I’m certainly ready to hold them
to account for what Donald Trump says and does — to see if their loyalty
is to the voters who sent them to the Senate, or to their MAGA leader.

Derek, we have
six months to build a winning campaign to make it to the Senate. Whether
you’re new to our movement or have been with me for a while, I am grateful
for your support.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240505_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1011&akid=6383%2E5257348%2E6ZlHsr ]And with six months until the election, I am humbly asking for you to
chip in
$10 or any
amount you can today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

I’m grateful for the support we’ve received so far. But I won’t rest until

Thank you,

Adam

name: Adam Schiff
subject: 24-year-old me would not have imagined this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, can I tell you a quick story about this photo?
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84391391/471352824/1649325331?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240505_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0YWExZjZjLTMxMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w2CXG7jzmtFFO_uOxVt2xeEfP6GNbqBGztK9hZu9iQ4=)
That's me in 1985 — just 24 years old at my law school graduation, fresh off a student research assistant job for Professor Laurence Tribe, thinking that I had just completed the toughest challenge of my academic career. Well, up to that point, anyway. (The bar exam was still a few weeks away).

Some years later, I would become an Assistant United States Attorney, and successfully prosecute the first FBI agent charged with espionage, Richard Miller, for spying for the Soviet Union.

As a new graduate of law school, I could never have imagined I would handle a case like that.

Or that I would later investigate a president who also betrayed our country ...

...lead his impeachment and Senate trial...

...serve on the January 6 Committee...

...get kicked off the Intelligence Committee by a craven Speaker of the House for doing the above...

...and get censured by extreme partisan MAGA House Republicans under the personal threat of that corrupt president...

Life leads us in uncertain and fortuitous ways. I’m fortunate that at a time when our country has been in trouble, and our democracy at risk, I have been in a position to help do something about it.

In the Senate, I hope to do even more.

[If you're able to, will you contribute a split donation of $15 between Defeat Republicans and my campaign to help me reach the Senate, defend our majority, and defeat Trump? I would be grateful for your help in continuing my service.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84391393/471352827/1649325331?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240505_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0YWExZjZjLTMxMGItZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w2CXG7jzmtFFO_uOxVt2xeEfP6GNbqBGztK9hZu9iQ4=)

| | Sorry to bother you on a Sunday, Peter, so I'll just cut right to the chase: My multi-millionaire opponent has already spent more than **_$47 million_** of his own money on ads, and I need your help closing the gap on his financial advantage. **[So, could you do me a HUGE favor and chip in just $10 to our Senate campaign before you close out of this email?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/21700?t=9&amount=10&akid=1557%2E52803%2EkDlyOD)** | | | [Donate $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/21700?t=10&amount=10&akid=1557%2E52803%2EkDlyOD)

_How can my $10 compete with a multi-millionaire with nearly limitless resources?_
It’s because of the power of this grassroots movement, because we’ve got thousands of supporters ready to chip in what they can, when they can — _and believe me, it really does add up._
**The ultra-wealthy shouldn’t be able to just buy their way into the Senate, which is why I need your help, Peter.[Can I count on you to donate just $10 to help our Senate campaign cut through the noise and boost our Maryland-first message?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/21700?t=12&amount=10&akid=1557%2E52803%2EkDlyOD)**

Thanks for your help!
—Angela

name: Team Hawley
subject: Every conservative patriot needs to be on high alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=86e26d63362b4801ab2cb876b85a6689&_e=KBrxV_FfM-HEpHBAy-7A5PFUFKHLWjo8zDw63eTW9qCz3184pn7kSvTLKjCmu_4Yt9Tv2w6yH2xEivS3OjF6bCe780n16zMXXVvDdJOlPU7LpgdzetVmK7-hjUY5iK3N6_5vzrSOKofC9gPlisCBYATq3eVrPeFbOy_bAnVvNTkLTtlk7uJ5jleg1mHGPq5nNWltvDgS3tJ3YbdBjybuoL7YqUuvPOcSt9t5BR7RfK-VweXigLDl25sDk_Ipm0arGwfoaYp13A1wkrqoNKiyVGirwa1uyYKmcQIEHCVx8Cl3ikTZwZXaq2ZWwENUmFX5IvBI-WJTVehlsvSWjgoiNs2cLPFz1bRTPjXLIS1nk1o%3D)
---
| | Peter,

Josh Hawley is calling on every patriot to step up _[**RIGHT NOW**!](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=86e26d63362b4801ab2cb876b85a6689&_e=KBrxV_FfM-HEpHBAy-7A5PFUFKHLWjo8zDw63eTW9qCz3184pn7kSvTLKjCmu_4Yt9Tv2w6yH2xEivS3OjF6bCe780n16zMXXVvDdJOlPU7LpgdzetVmK7-hjUY5iK3N6_5vzrSOKofC9gPlisCBYATq3eVrPeFbOy_bAnVvNTkLTtlk7uJ5jleg1mHGPq5nNWltvDgS3tJ3YbdBjybuoO63xJThO5NyHiM5pXMyTb4kyXoeoTAuWECUkMWIC5cnr9gf0ZhjLOY3-XVavzYkTRzZZokA9nfwqUg-bGlqq8Vf520o3qSZf5xmDDpSrRsG8JICC_CM7xE-UTmw7-gOvwFNc7z7fZ8Ca7ATEZK3U3A%3D)_

His Senate race is going to be one of the most expensive in the country, and whether we take back our MAGA majority or not could come down to Missouri.

_And with so many politicians on BOTH sides of the aisle giving into the DC swamp establishment, we need fighters like Josh to stand up for our freedom now more than EVER!_

Friend,

_I just got off the phone with my finance team - and it’s not good news._

I hate to write to you today about this, but I know how hard times are under Biden’s far-left leadership. Bidenflation is ruining our economy and making everyday life and expenses harder on Americans; just take a look at your last grocery bill, gas station receipt, or utility charges.

[**That being said, in order to FIX what Biden has done to our country, I’m asking you for ONE FAVOR: will you chip in even $1 to my campaign today?**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=c49006304617439f9f27a124e0e850d4&_e=tIe6tZIynxDtAxMEUZKn8Bq8OyCaHsrH_aqaNZv8ro4OGYY_MXwV__I-eCqueYtVyja1mxJ-qFCHcm9W_VQf64p-q6TUg5f2SE12HzSXK1-IUON6p8CO7kOwx8nuaRmKB_BqkvdbjhihLOZsLecXhK2SLkXonH7RSwfjLCSHDBraav_dqLxdxH4taHmhZqs3KileaTuiahaJKswu-CAvsNiuMGMSRHiOO3JybZVWACX08qnBG0ZGRwmSjv8m5sdMd_Bf4uOz4wG4AKFgjP3CpySW2aDI_BYcgprXaJTOJ5S_UxrZszIzgOgyC_NPv8QhKK05t28iYKcaft_TlsUCIg%3D%3D)

It’s no joke when I tell you that our campaign runs on grassroots donations from true American Patriots like you. [**We can’t keep up the fight without your help and generosity, and even $1 will inch us closer to our goal of toppling the Biden Administration this November, Keeping the House Majority, and Flipping the Senate Red.**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=c49006304617439f9f27a124e0e850d4&_e=tIe6tZIynxDtAxMEUZKn8Bq8OyCaHsrH_aqaNZv8ro4OGYY_MXwV__I-eCqueYtVyja1mxJ-qFCHcm9W_VQf64p-q6TUg5f2SE12HzSXK1-IUON6p8CO7kOwx8nuaRmKB_BqkvdbjhihLOZsLecXhK2SLkXonH7RSwfjLCSHDBqe31wb4dvZaLuqIxJ9Y3XjA9VDKGeiQhqDlSJzVgvbzHpQ3olrly6Z4xOulrP1wSU8A-J2dzgBuInZw1OBDbkQTdQhxdrthY7riDbTWBwrm4iaerI-_N2YIM1v03YiXbEWNj3l3fvX0wfvg82DoaL7ajtMDA6pRKwYlHZNMHuEQA%3D%3D)

[**Feeling extra generous? Chip in $15 here.**](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=c49006304617439f9f27a124e0e850d4&_e=tIe6tZIynxDtAxMEUZKn8Bq8OyCaHsrH_aqaNZv8ro4OGYY_MXwV__I-eCqueYtVyja1mxJ-qFCHcm9W_VQf64p-q6TUg5f2SE12HzSXK1-IUON6p8CO7kOwx8nuaRmKB_BqkvdbjhihLOZsLecXhPB9YSsTRED7DVUJrUli9X9a8Ay360cj0ABNlhI07Bi7PXMP7RLGNNeQzEOTARpnSKjvLTnozdvTy9ttUS_h_nrfokQtlxyxyqgmv0YM2dRP6zktB5bVKGDVUDkRbEmNXqKbr41-YPB9LvHP2vdHG-fehHisJClAEWQt0YL3mkl7IG3uNSGRXuop1xj2Vajcvw%3D%3D)

Truly, Friend, every single cent counts. Your donations go directly toward resources that sustain our campaign. I can personally guarantee that every dollar given to my team is stretched as far as possible.

I appreciate you reading my email today. And, if times are hard for you and you can’t donate, that’s okay, too. Please just consider forwarding this email to 5 of your neighbors or friends who are sick and tired of Biden’s bull, just like you and me.

As always, thank you for your unwavering support of our mission to Save America.

Kevin Hern

Peter, it's Jon Tester.
Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.
That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them.
Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.**
When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.
[_**So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $3 or more donation between Upset the Setup and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. clean_body: = Peter, it's Jon Tester. Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana. That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them. Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, I will always work for you. When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Politics isn’t a game. Lives and livelihoods are put at stake when Washington Republicans continuously choose shady donors over everyday Americans. That’s why I’m fighting so hard for working families in Montana and across the country. — Jon | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. #
It’s hard to believe, folks, but Election Day is six months away. That means we have six months to ramp up our voter outreach efforts. Six months to remind people what’s at stake. Six months to make sure Democrats have the resources they need to win this fall. This is one of the most important elections in our lifetimes. But so is the next one. And the one after that. The truth is, every election is vitally important to the trajectory of our country — especially nowadays. With each election, voters have the choice between progressive change or bringing our country back to a time when far too many people had fewer rights and freedoms. So while I’m focused on the next six months, I’m also thinking ahead to elections in 2025, 2026, and beyond. And that’s why I’m humbly asking you today: **[Will you start a monthly recurring gift of $5 or $10 to my work to turn out Democrats? name: Harry Dunn
subject: This is a hard email to write.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84392219/471355827/-742709655?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.05_B2_Aftermath_U2_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmI4YTM5NmUtMzcwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JJe95-Bf_bNnQSY0xT67kOHf5kymP87puj_rFoyysFc=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84392220/471355828/-384126614?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.05_B2_Aftermath_U2_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmI4YTM5NmUtMzcwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JJe95-Bf_bNnQSY0xT67kOHf5kymP87puj_rFoyysFc=) Hey there,

I'll be straight with you, I've done a lot of tough things in my life. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL and CFL. That was tough, mentally, physically, emotionally.

I served as a Capitol police officer for over 15 years, those were tough some days.

But the aftermath of the January 6 insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain, my trauma, it didn't end on January 7.

Even after the violence of that day, I dealt with death threats. I dealt with people harassing me for speaking out. And when I decided to testify in front of Congress? It was one of the toughest things I've ever faced. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84392221/471355829/-384126614?amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.05_B2_Aftermath_U2_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmI4YTM5NmUtMzcwYi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JJe95-Bf_bNnQSY0xT67kOHf5kymP87puj_rFoyysFc=) But I did testify, because it was my duty not just as an officer, but as an American. I made a big step the day I testified for the January 6 committee. I stepped in the direction of protecting our democracy.

And honestly, I've never looked back.

[**_I'm ready to protect our democracy as a Congressman, and I need you to join me. I wouldn’t ask if this fight wasn’t absolutely critical – will you rush a donation to my campaign so I can fight for Democrats and every Marylander in District 3? clean_body: | = = Hey there, I'll be straight with you, I've done a lot of tough things in my life. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL and CFL. That was tough, mentally, physically, emotionally. I served as a Capitol police officer for over 15 years, those were tough some days. But the aftermath of the January 6 insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain, my trauma, it didn't end on January 7. Even after the violence of that day, I dealt with death threats. I dealt with people harassing me for speaking out. And when I decided to testify in front of Congress? It was one of the toughest things I've ever faced. = But I did testify, because it was my duty not just as an officer, but as an American. I made a big step the day I testified for the January 6 committee. I stepped in the direction of protecting our democracy. And honestly, I've never looked back. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With love, Harry 🖤 = = | = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | mailto:info@harrydunnforcongress.com Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress

---
Hello,

Last week, we sent you an urgent poll asking you to rate the U.S. Supreme Court after it was revealed that they could hand Jan. 6 insurrectionists a major victory by ruling that they can’t be charged with obstructing an official preceding.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t respond.** Without [11] more responses from your state, our data won’t be statistically significant.

So we’re giving you a second chance to complete the poll and rate the U.S. Supreme Court. **[_Click HERE or use the button below to complete »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade-SCOTUS?source=FFR_20240505_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=21363%2E4449941%2EFKIC1F)** | [COMPLETE POLL NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade-SCOTUS?source=FFR_20240505_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=21363%2E4449941%2EFKIC1F)
---
We’ve attached the original poll below for your records. Thanks,

\- Fight for Reform Data Team

\---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: FightForReform.org
Subject: Supreme Court decision on January 6th charge
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade-SCOTUS?source=FFR_20240505_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=21363%2E4449941%2EFKIC1F)

**WE TOLD YOU** it was only a matter of time before the ultra-conservative Supreme Court gives in to Donald Trump's criminal activities...

**WE TOLD YOU** the harmful effects decisions like this have on our country – _Roe v. Wade_ overturned, affirmative action rolled back, and now Trump and his insurrectionists could get off scot‐free...

**NOW, WE’RE TELLING YOU** we need you to complete your poll response to see how your state feels about the current Supreme Court!

body:
In just THREE MONTHS.

| Hey, Friend!

This will only take a few minutes so please, KEEP READING!

_Ruben Gallego pulled in MILLIONS of Clinton-Soros dollars during the last quarter._

Arizona will decide the future of the entire nation. The Presidency AND the Senate Majority will be WON or LOST in Arizona.

I'm asking you, if you have $1, $5, or ANYTHING to spare: **[Will you make an emergency donation of ANYTHING before 11:59 pm tonight?](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1d11dba8a98c40978fc3f66d366de890&_e=S4fi_IsRs9kbpUsZX2i8EYy5PuJ-qGMqTg0SzilyYs2tDGLIuXa2uvuPHCDdo06tWGVFbrgK_np7OpQaVJ0g6oFpZ2TQf4KauBIsw2RtcJB70JaQZ_JajkFEXlHH9ixdXDpUCEQgOmtEk-K_uLZ-6zAzJ01Riw8fOgv3_qBKZ2k2Aaj3i7tfKHO0WuIDSTQ59KGoe_8EbGcwmgz8KomFs3BNgPypt6EIucKL4DDJu41JUxbNiOuzOk7-nOw2_VflWc6Tb_c8qfs4OyYZXZJFQqExtfJgIGCx3wa3VTBQyu6iH21gDsARPgpKGYAlCflySX71ZanuOCzBWQJ5NNztAxTfhgG0EqHM3o9pTOgXCuzlNwq_bgRAMSTdPGozoq8Pq0Z7OJGSQhWpceoSpuHVAg%3D%3D)**

\- Kari

**WOW ...**

I just saw the news, and I'm shocked. We've got a big problem here in Arizona, and I've got a lot to tell you, so...

****CONTINUE READING HERE FOR THE FULL STORY!****
[](http://links.gopallies.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1d11dba8a98c40978fc3f66d366de890&_e=S4fi_IsRs9kbpUsZX2i8EYy5PuJ-qGMqTg0SzilyYs2tDGLIuXa2uvuPHCDdo06tWGVFbrgK_np7OpQaVJ0g6oFpZ2TQf4KauBIsw2RtcJB70JaQZ_JajkFEXlHH9ixdXDpUCEQgOmtEk-K_uLZ-6zAzJ01Riw8fOgv3_qBKZ2k2Aaj3i7tfKHO0WuIDSTQ59KGoe_8EbGcwmgz8KomFs3BNgPypt6EIucKL4DDJu41JUxbNiOuzOk7-nOw2_Vflf9ANcjg8tkPfV5elFaie_ykEplvbSYqF10RioI2TXwNlqdaPQDtKW0-c-fiABCofR2W23NkJjX5SAug86BSxXUtkfNAqWeK7LhdJLyMSHz_NpCf_tAZwwA6Lp9Xi7gPI7LErLbeNFJ72psfsRD5RJw%3D%3D)
**If you were to ask me if I ever thought Ruben Gallego would raise $7.5 million in just three months - I 'd say yes.

**This is no surprise.** After all, he has the backing of the Clinton-Soros money machine and a legion of Hollywood liberals throwing money at him. **

Every woke activist and liberal board member from Hawaii to New York City is begging to see Ruben Gallego in the Senate. They know he'll be a Senator for their agenda and won't give a damn about the people of Arizona.

This is how Ruben Gallego raised $7.5 million.

While Gallego enjoys showering with dark money, we're hard at work making sure every grassroots patriot in the country knows that Arizona is DO or DIE in 2024.

**This entire nation will be WON or LOST based on what we do right now,** and I don't intend to let them take over our home without a fight. The left wouldn't fill Ruben's war chest if they weren't scared of us.

They know we're in it to win it and will spend whatever they have to to try and stop us. I'm counting on people like YOU to help me stay competitive.**[I can't fight $7,5 million by myself. clean_body: In just THREE MONTHS. | Hey, Friend! This will only take a few minutes so please, KEEP READING! Ruben Gallego pulled in MILLIONS of Clinton-Soros dollars during the last quarter. Arizona will decide the future of the entire nation. The Presidency AND the Senate Majority will be WON or LOST in Arizona. I'm asking you, if you have $1, $5, or ANYTHING to spare: God bless, \- Kari Sent from my iPhone On 04/04, Kari Lake Wrote: | WOW ... I just saw the news, and I'm shocked. We've got a big problem here in Arizona, and I've got a lot to tell you, so... **CONTINUE READING HERE FOR THE FULL STORY! If you were to ask me if I ever thought Ruben Gallego would raise $7.5 million in just three months - I 'd say yes. This is no surprise. After all, he has the backing of the Clinton-Soros money machine and a legion of Hollywood liberals throwing money at him. Every woke activist and liberal board member from Hawaii to New York City is begging to see Ruben Gallego in the Senate. They know he'll be a Senator for their agenda and won't give a damn about the people of Arizona. This is how Ruben Gallego raised $7.5 million. While Gallego enjoys showering with dark money, we're hard at work making sure every grassroots patriot in the country knows that Arizona is DO or DIE in 2024. This entire nation will be WON or LOST based on what we do right now, and I don't intend to let them take over our home without a fight. The left wouldn't fill Ruben's war chest if they weren't scared of us. They know we're in it to win it and will spend whatever they have to to try and stop us. I'm counting on people like YOU to help me stay competitive. | SKIP HERE FOR THE SOLUTION Now 's when we fight back. Please just keep reading for a few more seconds. From now until MIDNIGHT, I want you to do two things. 1\. I want you to take a second and PRAY for this nation. We will Take Back America or LOSE it, depending on the outcome of the November election. 2\. (if you can) make a small dollar contribution of $5, $10, $25 or ANYTHING you can spare. **HELP FIGHT BACK AGAINST RUBEN 'S $7.5 MILLION DARK MONEY CASH BLITZ. I 'M PERSONALLY ASKING YOU TO JOIN THE FIGHT TO SAVE AMERICA! DONATE NOW! Thank you, Kari Lake Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, .

clean_body: This balance of power rests on our ability to strategize, fundraise, and rally grassroots support now so that we can be prepared to win again this November. | | | | | ---|--- Governor Whitmer emailed you last month to highlight the stakes of this year's elections. It’s no shock that Republicans are waging an all-out war on fundamental freedoms, and they have a tight-knit plan to regain power in state legislatures across the country. The GOP has a $47 million war chest dedicated to building GOP power in the states, and they're targeting our hard-won trifectas in places like Michigan to push their far-right MAGA agenda. But if grassroots donors like you can recognize these attacks and pitch in now to fuel our fight, we can give our candidates the support they need to fight them head-on at the ballot box. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Right now, more people live under Democratic trifectas in the states than under Republican trifectas, and it is this balance of power that is protecting the rights of over 150 million Americans.
